name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Stefanik vs. Hochul and Mamdani
body:
I’m running for Governor

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bvnT/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, I just made a major announcement and I wanted to tell you first: **I’m in.**
_**[I’m running Governor of New York](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bvnT/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_**.**

[ENDORSE ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bvnT/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Zohran Mamdani and Kathy Hochul are on the verge of destroying the Empire State, and I refuse to sit on the sidelines and do nothing.
**_[Please, join my campaign with your Day One Endorsement here](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bvnT/?__vbtrk=MzMzOTgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMzOTgxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

_Thank you,_

name: John Fetterman
subject: my plan to fix this sh*t (Social Security)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10428%2E434096%2EbfbM2i)
| | |
---
Derek, even while the government had been shut down, Trump and his team were pushing a plan to make it harder for older Americans to qualify for Social Security, which could result in *hundreds of thousands* of people losing benefits.
So I wanted to reach out to let you know that I'm working on a multi-prong plan to fix this sh*t.
**First, I helped reintroduce the Billionaires Income Tax Act to make the ultrawealthy pay their fair share in taxes.**
That’s money we can use to keep our promise to seniors and protect Social Security for the next generation.
Because here's the deal: Working Pennsylvanians are facing high and rising prices while the ultrawealthy and megacorporations game the system to pay next to nothing in taxes. This bill is about basic fairness – if you have billions, you shouldn’t pay less in taxes than your secretary.
**And now, I just helped introduce a second bill to help Social Security benefits keep up with rising costs and inflation – the Boosting Benefits and COLAs for Seniors Act.**
Because Social Security benefits should keep up with the real cost of living. No one who’s worked their whole life should have to choose between paying for medicine or groceries. Folks earned these benefits.
These are just two of the ways I’m standing up to these Social Security cuts – but I can’t keep up the pressure alone. I need your help to call out Trump’s schemes and spread the word.
**[_So my team and I are racing to hit our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight at midnight to sound the alarm_. Can you chip in $5 right now to help us hit our $20,000 goal and tell Trump to keep his HANDS OFF Social Security?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50993?refcode=jtk327-fr-fl&t=2&akid=10428%2E434096%2EbfbM2i) 🙏**

name: Voter Action Project Electoral College Team
subject: Presidential elections should be about votes, not square miles and state borders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Straight to the point, Team: The Electoral College is an outdated mess that political parties are using to game the system and perpetuate power for candidates who get less votes. It's simply a tool to use land mass as inflated power instead of the will of the people.
Momentum is growing to end this shady scheme once and for all but we need your help to get over the top. Support our work with $25 or more right now to relegate it to the dustbin of history >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=111625_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Fox News: End of the Electoral College is in sight if Democrats keep getting their way [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=111625_2&amount=25]
Fox News is wrong, friend -- big surprise.
Our movement to end the Electoral College isn't about partisanship. It's not about gaming the system. Fox has spent decades drowning in their own rhetoric and can't understand the simple fact of people choosing a system that's right and just over a system that benefits themselves and silences others.
Fox News is worried about political parties. We're worried about the people's voices being heard and their votes meaning something . We're worried about a system that has rewarded the popular vote loser with the job anyway five times now. We're worried about the people and the states that get ignored and lost along the way to *just enough* Electoral College votes.
The Electoral College is an antiquated system built for a vastly different America and can't stand up to the challenges we face today. RUSH $25 or whatever you can today to help end it forever >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=111625_2&amount=25]

It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again.
The vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=111625_2&amount=25]

The Voter Action Project Electoral College Team

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111625_2&amount=20]

name: Jena for CO
subject: Taking on Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251116-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251116-email]
Peter –
Donald Trump used political retaliation once again when he ordered US Space Command be moved from Colorado Springs to Alabama. He said that Colorado's vote-by-mail system was one of the reasons he was targeting our state.
Colorado took action. Our state filed a lawsuit to block the relocation. Trump’s retaliation would harm Colorado families and the nation’s military readiness. It's necessary to file these lawsuits to stop Trump’s hostile and unlawful behavior.
Fights like these are exactly why Jena is running for Attorney General.
As Secretary of State, Jena stood up to Trump’s attacks on our elections and protected Coloradans’ rights. As Attorney General, she’ll continue to defend our state, our jobs, our service members, and our democracy.
But we can’t win this race without you.
Will you chip in today to help Jena win this race for Attorney General? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251116-email]
Every dollar you give today strengthens our ability to elect an AG who can take on Trump’s abuses of power – and win.
Thank you for standing with us in this fight.
– Jena for CO

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: Now is the time to fight for Universal Healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBFtZ08I0xppr1AqhaS1f13vv21p6s0yEl_iVeHGMH7jJ4JdhVKIjTXNU8byEI6UdAtbkTVBRH4mNnDP-1yESbNVNrGAzuGIM63QDtfeOI9tlZI0WGBjoVrvXbbnWRgDP6g/4lo/DMVdA57aR_KV8vkAAR_2bg/h0/h001.ONt_t5ZvHwG9FHzXMnciEfbVvrI3FWrdr3XUopXI7x8)
---
Peter,

Last week a handful of Democrats - including my opponent Marie Gluesenkamp Perez - caved to MAGA and voted for the Republican bill to re-open the government and give in to skyrocketing healthcare costs. The Senate agreement included a plan to take up a vote on extending the ACA tax credits that millions of Americans **depend** on to afford their health insurance plans. The problem is, Mike Johnson said he will not have any such vote in the House. **Marie knew that voting for the GOP bill meant killing the ACA tax credits for good and increasing your healthcare costs - and she voted with Republicans anyway like she always does!** So what happens next? Tens of millions of Americans - including some of you - are trying to enroll in their new health insurance plans right now and facing new premiums that are double, triple, even quadruple what they paid before. A lot of them are going to skip insurance altogether and take their chances. And when they do, premiums go up for everyone else. The ACA tax credits are necessary and Democrats were right to fight for them. But the only real fix to affordable healthcare in our country is universal healthcare. [**We need a single government insurance program that covers EVERY body, and the WHOLE body - head, shoulders, knees and toes. Yes, eyes and teeth included. That's what I'm fighting for when I get to Congress.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDnqF3FAhH3lCoA-tzqPjqt1dhkBSaHJD_Us8gb_qwNNiFG7Dc9IAa3IFJLReXA4-uYAvLdBGnZm078sgL8XtK4pBrnp4gqYx2dRLpT6sWe1fQJc0DiGV5Ki3y7vLucLaceeoGsIv7u4LF1fnJld8wGdyiT_K34P8Rl-EtPItOBdV1gL0k3uZAuyr_H0o6fFY4sms5rEBYbJ2p6KieFOYG56O6CLKxKmRcIGnCEujD1xsKoIiuhAXDOx5yI-eVc-lnPqfBd45upUbcOttOF3tN82W8XFmr79tD_Hz4v43xvz_y1OaKFtZivlmLxnE-PAFo/4lo/DMVdA57aR_KV8vkAAR_2bg/h1/h001.nWpFwhzL1YPlLypZuOnpj_hJ0VA_NNGGNY1KabaZEL0) If we had universal healthcare, you would never have to worry about your premiums changing from year to year, or meeting sky high deductibles just to fix a toothache. You'd never have to worry about your wife's cancer treatment lapsing just because you got laid off from a job, or affording an urgent care visit when your newborn runs a dangerously high fever. Universal healthcare means you don't have to stress about surprise ambulance bills, $50 copays, or choosing between medication and groceries for the week. You. Just. Go. To. The. Doctor. And here's the best part: Universal healthcare saves us TONS of money. Even conservative think tanks like the CATO Institute have determined that universal healthcare that covers EVERYONE will save us _trillions of dollars_. [**Don 't let MAGA or their enablers like Marie Gluesenkamp Perez keep playing games with your life. Donate now to help me flip this seat and let's fight for healthcare for ALL.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDnqF3FAhH3lCoA-tzqPjqt1dhkBSaHJD_Us8gb_qwNNiFG7Dc9IAa3IFJLReXA4-uODl6IAFE2v2r1oS02TDJ2a0fpIhs5cICS7hnUO1RCNrP_gOVEPr8iL0ttONOIjB4ypzu-9c5vj8khgNbxcJaxzn0DFkguF6ngmprw6bHISSIC9L1eGjx5IA7SDwjAxhsuO70dLNoPdrELl6vcPQ9HAOIhaxix6gu7Fu1O6pZnwXL5vtVUDh655enHIkB7t2EFV0Xgk4lXCQNPAA_3wQsSk2ddr0GcsOSG7AwBNB9IoMzEnxnhRnDJMCY02fPeqLE/4lo/DMVdA57aR_KV8vkAAR_2bg/h2/h001.A7Jok_WizAVFwRTFuodXrdD7N8eh80qS7VB87PiraxI) We must VOTE BLUE, **BUT IT MATTERS WHO!** Let's Heal Washington!

Brent Hennrich
---
[ **SUPPORT BRENT TODAY** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDnqF3FAhH3lCoA-tzqPjqt1dhkBSaHJD_Us8gb_qwNNiFG7Dc9IAa3IFJLReXA4-t_vggopst4wYdjBCJnLThkl0dHBPqDab3siQRs3DZlIvO8zKxxNdocrEAhkKdv68hez_FfYnxRYJLwLqI_1FqocdA-zgpChexh2m6n6l9SuLbyl0ldh6saGGMvSSCTGg9XvUDrdlq6_hc9gb7o1ceV-nN29FerdWEntdjwH_fPBEYVulGNZEpedFJE8eQYol8T-us_FXxtGHHps5_-umLPbUYF4tyxk6zjShn3zKmWW6r1KyJVPz_fNG5-75Ep-Bs/4lo/DMVdA57aR_KV8vkAAR_2bg/h3/h001.3IU0ItFjiqveKzmYmSGHQlmbagJcsZPe3peXd8a4wac)

You'd never have to worry about your wife's cancer treatment lapsing just because you got laid off from a job, or affording an urgent care visit when your newborn runs a dangerously high fever. Universal healthcare means you don't have to stress about surprise ambulance bills, $50 copays, or choosing between medication and groceries for the week. You. Just. Go. To. The. Doctor. And here's the best part: Universal healthcare saves us TONS of money. Even conservative think tanks like the CATO Institute have determined that universal healthcare that covers EVERYONE will save us trillions of dollars. We must VOTE BLUE, BUT IT MATTERS WHO! Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. Chip in now to help elect a Democrat ready to stand up to MAGA. | | | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2025 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . clean_body: Donald Trump just warned that Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid are “going to be gone.” | = This is not a drill. Donald Trump just warned that Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid are "going to be gone." 69 million Americans rely on Social Security to make ends meet. The consequences of Trump's Social Security cuts would be beyond devastating. | | Trump is crossing a dangerous line. Cutting Social Security would leave millions of vulnerable Americans without a safety net. To make matters worse: It's sickening to think that Trump is willing to slash Social Security benefits in the name of giving bigger tax breaks for billionaires. Livelihoods are at stake and we refuse to allow this to happen on our watch. | – Off the Sidelines PAC © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: We’re required to report what we’ve raised after our next deadline.

Derek, In just a few weeks — for the first time since Democrats’ historic sweep in the 2025 elections — we will be required to report what we’ve raised this month. The truth is, _everyone_ will be watching that number. **There is nothing Donald Trump and his Republican cronies would like more than for us to take this resounding victory as permission to take our foot off the gas.** If we want to take back the House and Senate in 2026 and put a major check on Trump’s power, we cannot slow down even for a second. Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=6a8d63ba8ca34771aa2a8356cefc0972&_e=lhEBJOGwK4KnGX2RytlY-RKSGiAxc2FjSxffH-MTzS4FIl3ITAgdHTHMaA8xhAGRi1MKFnlNlcU5QRCli6slMv7b_QfHtnHBqcS9exxQ2tc8sFVhERuVvS4UTpMcWbXUXV8Z8wgzTE8FlwJ2-LRmOvaPZ7G-yP6iulpfgq-rAaPX0nB-6ydqmtdiJRpqMQoTdWhfjYThM_QL-2pU--kc4ik8SQ1cdVdKmuUZXC6j0zl06yTW58QJ5Z55KJw_DdvPpnhPxBj44Hq7g8UNfyOtGlZUbL1GJovejy8xEAC9hZW6aKExRtet3fJPJ6E3f1VZ22RaC_C7ykYdp96H4TcLLfI1P8-mdWrkiFBZnNIdDynUGjMOFduA2kHBRwRwep64a_1z9I7Spnp-SqHEAa5io3-S7ogVDDQo-zUkjiLjKBRNaE3HhFooRRllVM-BdPGcysUGyFyy4jWuLRm6FDQvXSiwuPtXUgLi8ml6L8eHvLxmph35ewU-FydVlSb4NQ3nesjLoAnQ7NeBB0ZNBgUP6MutO8SMaQKsUmcJnihwRvJOyCrmrcyhiBvfjPl5PCql)

Donald Trump and Republicans are simply terrified to face the voters.
They have done literally everything they can to try to stack the deck ahead of the 2026 Midterms:
❌ Chaotic executive orders trying to limit states’ right to run their own elections;
❌ Trying to proclaim a ban on vote-by-mail from the White House;
❌ Deploying unnecessary “election monitors” to intimidate voters in blue states;
❌ Ordering Texas to redraw their districts to eliminate 5 blue seats;
❌ And now even SUING to try to nullify Proposition 50 in California that neutralizes Texas’ gerrymandered maps.
Donald Trump and Republicans have a record of failure. A record of unaffordability. A record of blatant corruption. A record of soaring healthcare costs and boondoggles for billionaires. They know there’s a blue wave coming in 2026, so they are trying everything they can to stop democracy in its tracks.
The California Democratic Party is on the frontlines of this fight. We are hiring organizers, opening regional offices, and ensuring every legal vote is counted with our Voter Protection efforts. ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=23e13d6261dcd666f6b728aa0795e12529b84c8d243e6f8e0d850f25ff20e14166909e72db623841a46cc32d45b5757d07cd1b9af208efd0bc580605d42250c9)**Most retirees take Required Minimum Distributions in cash. That means more taxes for Washington - and **less for you.** But IRS Code 408(m)(3) gives you another option.[**How To Avoid The RMD Trap**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=23e13d6261dcd666f6b728aa0795e12529b84c8d243e6f8e0d850f25ff20e14166909e72db623841a46cc32d45b5757d07cd1b9af208efd0bc580605d42250c9)
---|---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835be1a5208efdb7bacb2f6df1a516c720ead88fd1a175f0d5eac4ea35d150fa675b7fa62ca4f0c3d531d4daace366cbf518e074a2030155a7ae7) | **[What If The Falling Dollar
Isn't An Accident? ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835be1a5208efdb7bacb2f6df1a516c720ead88fd1a175f0d5eac4ea35d150fa675b7fa62ca4f0c3d531d4daace366cbf518e074a2030155a7ae7)**
It sounds crazy - but powerful people actually want the **dollar to fall.** Here's how a weaker dollar could benefit them - and hurt Americans with savings and retirement plans. [**Click To See Why**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835be1a5208efdb7bacb2f6df1a516c720ead88fd1a175f0d5eac4ea35d150fa675b7fa62ca4f0c3d531d4daace366cbf518e074a2030155a7ae7)
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835bed8071c151c275eaa2ff4d2dd4a036675c8840a23b7938a5baa13e09c4daf267289567269a2083b73508cd903d1b2a468eb6f7a28ea669404) | **[Gold $5,000. Silver $65.
](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835bed8071c151c275eaa2ff4d2dd4a036675c8840a23b7938a5baa13e09c4daf267289567269a2083b73508cd903d1b2a468eb6f7a28ea669404)**BofA, HSBC & SocGen just raised forecasts to **record highs by 2026** amid rising debt, deficits & rate cuts. They're already positioning before markets react. Why? [
**Get The Full Details**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835bed8071c151c275eaa2ff4d2dd4a036675c8840a23b7938a5baa13e09c4daf267289567269a2083b73508cd903d1b2a468eb6f7a28ea669404)

* * *
**[Imagine waking up and finding out you have:](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835be072f61b3173bcf9dbab0498a6563ccf1cd7557c2abbee07f66f117d9f18957b02a539a461e985ae86a8c4f153828ad6e759c48d06c8877f6)**
* No access to your savings.
* No way to pay bills.
* No way to buy groceries or medicine.

That's not a movie script. It's not a scare tactic. It already happened this year when two U.S. banks collapsed - Pulaski Savings Bank in Illinois and Santa Anna National Bank in Texas. And the FDIC has quietly admitted there are **[63 more banks](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835be072f61b3173bcf9dbab0498a6563ccf1cd7557c2abbee07f66f117d9f18957b02a539a461e985ae86a8c4f153828ad6e759c48d06c8877f6)** on its “problem list.” Now, would you believe your bank could be next? Probably not. But here’s the reality: the depositors at Pulaski Bank and Santa Anna believed the same thing... until it was too late. **The Shocking Truth: Banks May Not Be as Safe as You Think**
* **Liquidity is evaporating.** The overnight repo market - Wall Street’s emergency cash valve - has collapsed 91% since 2023. The plumbing of the financial system is running dry.
* **Bond traps are back.** Just like Silicon Valley Bank, institutions are drowning in “safe” bonds that turned toxic when rates shifted.
* **Defaults are rising.** Commercial real estate, credit cards, and small business loans - sparks waiting to ignite a crisis.
* **$57 trillion in derivatives.** JPMorgan alone holds more than the U.S. national debt. Warren Buffett once called derivatives “financial weapons of mass destruction.”

This isn’t stability. It could be a **[recipe for disaster.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835be072f61b3173bcf9dbab0498a6563ccf1cd7557c2abbee07f66f117d9f18957b02a539a461e985ae86a8c4f153828ad6e759c48d06c8877f6)** And here’s the part most Americans don’t realize: in the next crisis, **bail-outs are over. Bail-ins are legal.** That means if your bank fails, they can freeze your account... and use **[your deposits](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835be072f61b3173bcf9dbab0498a6563ccf1cd7557c2abbee07f66f117d9f18957b02a539a461e985ae86a8c4f153828ad6e759c48d06c8877f6)** to stay alive. And yes, you may say the FDIC exists. But even they admit they may not have the resources to save everyone if multiple banks collapse at once. So when the dominoes fall... who gets rescued first?
* Big banks? Big depositors? Politicians?

And who gets left waiting in line?
* Retirees. Savers. Everyday Americans?

**[What If Your Bank Seizes Up?](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835be072f61b3173bcf9dbab0498a6563ccf1cd7557c2abbee07f66f117d9f18957b02a539a461e985ae86a8c4f153828ad6e759c48d06c8877f6)**
* Will you be able to withdraw when you need to?
* Could your retirement accounts be drained by panic selling?
* Will you really recover your “insured” deposits - and if so, how long will it take?

By then, it won’t matter what the Fed or Washington promises. The damage will already be done. Don’t wait until you see “Bank Run” or “Bail-In” scroll across your newsfeed. You will panic - and by then, it’s too late. Smart savers are already **[moving part of their wealth into assets](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835be072f61b3173bcf9dbab0498a6563ccf1cd7557c2abbee07f66f117d9f18957b02a539a461e985ae86a8c4f153828ad6e759c48d06c8877f6)** that don’t freeze, don’t default, and don’t depend on Washington’s promises. Gold has no counterparty risk. It cannot be “bailed-in.” And it has outlasted every failed banking system for thousands of years. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e32c475b6c1835be072f61b3173bcf9dbab0498a6563ccf1cd7557c2abbee07f66f117d9f18957b02a539a461e985ae86a8c4f153828ad6e759c48d06c8877f6) **_TO LEARN HOW BANK FAILURES PUT YOU AT RISK -
AND HOW TO PROTECT YOURSELF_** **Because you’ve worked too hard to watch your savings become someone else’s lifeline.**

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Tell Trump: "Stop dodging the question, and promise not to pardon Ghislaine Maxwell"
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# ["President Trump, stop dodging the question, and promise not to pardon Ghislaine Maxwell"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td977a7cf-a777-4800-b27a-8c7c50fa7c4c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66a0a71f-a15c-477c-8e28-bb35af0b087b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | It's a simple question -- will Donald Trump rule out a pardon or commutation for Epstein accomplice and **convicted child sex-trafficker** Ghislaine Maxwell? [**And yet, Trump refuses to answer it.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb9b881ad-9530-4ca1-a9ae-a9001c8bcb24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This should be easy. But instead, he either clams up entirely (highly unusual for Trump) or dodges the question by claiming he "hasn't thought about it." This is someone who might be able to connect the dots that put Trump in a whole lot of trouble, and maybe a whole lot of jail. And he hasn't thought about it? And at the same time, Maxwell is being given all kinds of special privileges in her jail, not being asked tough questions by Justice officials, and being treated in a special way that just screams out "please don't testify and put me in jail." Trump needs to answer the question now, and pledge not to pardon her. Even his MAGA supporters agree with us on this. And reporters and others need to keep asking him every day until he answers. And sure, he's famously full of crap, and could always lie and then do it. But at least we'd make it clear to Americans across the political spectrum (and future juries) that he is hiding something big -- and bigly. [**Please sign on: "President Trump, stop dodging the question, and promise not to pardon Ghislaine Maxwell"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb92acf9-a75f-402d-a979-52a6d9736b4e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3db8201c-7df9-478d-a719-fea7233d7f8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff265926-45eb-46a1-b07d-416e402492c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb752fad2-092b-4380-9df2-d7cbb65b7c0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tecd0df33-2e56-48aa-846c-535f4f8262e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Follow Us | [](https://Facebook.com/LeftAction)

Parler Investor Webinar Replay

Parler Technologies is capturing attention for all the right reasons.

Our investor webinar gave a clear look at how the company is positioned to redefine digital freedom through its fully owned ecosystem connecting cloud, payments, media, and commerce that is integrated with the Optio blockchain.

If you joined live, thank you for being part of it. If you missed it, you can now watch the full replay and see why so many investors are paying attention.

During the presentation, the leadership team outlined how Parler is:

- Creating independence from Big Tech through a self-owned infrastructure
- Building new revenue streams across cloud, media, and fintech
- Expanding its reach in the fast-growing creator economy

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=022773dfeb51d098f340c70e975622f672313f3ba58a4afe48c99a1f2ccdcca03657aa7cc92fd2a7a216e56c9774807494ccfe08b2b2fe784bf4db45039751b6
Watch The Webinar Replay

We will be hosting more investor briefings and Q&A sessions soon, and you will receive an invitation when registration opens.

If you would like to schedule a time to speak with an investor relations representative from our team, you can book a call here.

For immediate questions, please email us at
mailto:invest@parler.com
invest@parler.com or call or text us at (214) 560-2565.

The opportunity is open under Regulation D 506(c) for accredited investors.

About Parler Technologies, Inc.

Parler Technologies powers a connected ecosystem that includes the Parler social network, PlayTV streaming service, Cartix marketplace, and Kyvo, a peer to peer payment platform, supported by the Company’s proprietary cloud and content delivery infrastructure. For more information, visit

invest.parler.com .

Best regards,

Parler Team

body:

|

Peter,
Lauren Boebert took to Twitter to once again blame the left for growing political violence across America, "It's time for Leftists to start admitting the rhetoric they've espoused is inspiring their own people to start shooting at the patriots in this country."
This is a dangerous lie from one of the most inflammatory politicians in America (remember when Boebert tweeted the location of the US Speaker to a violent mob on January 6?)
Boebert won't protect communities from gun violence. She won't take on the big tech platforms profiting from toxic hate.

clean_body: She is responsible for taking this theory from the fringes and into the political mainstream. No Democratic politician is sharing anything even close to this. The violence is coming from her, not us. | | | | | == | Peter, Lauren Boebert took to Twitter to once again blame the left for growing political violence across America, "It's time for Leftists to start admitting the rhetoric they've espoused is inspiring their own people to start shooting at the patriots in this country." This is a dangerous lie from one of the most inflammatory politicians in America (remember when Boebert tweeted the location of the US Speaker to a violent mob on January 6?) Boebert won't protect communities from gun violence. She won't take on the big tech platforms profiting from toxic hate. Lauren Boebert is a propagator of the Neo-Nazi white replacement theory, cited in dozens of white supremacist mass shootings. | == The conspiracy theory posits that jews acting in league with the liberal political establishment are working together to flood the West with immigrants with the goal of eliminating the white race via racial miscegenation. Since it began to catch steam in the late 2010s the theory has been cited by: The 2018 Pittsburgh Tree of Life Synagogue shooter who killed 11 people The 2019 Christchurch shooter who killed who killed 50 at Mosques in New Zealand * And the 2019 El-Paso shooter who targeting Latinos killing 23 at a Walmart and 2022 Buffalo shooter who targeted black people killing 10 at a grocery store That's just the tip of the iceberg, the theory is taking the modern white supremacist movement to new heights and has caused so much death, destruction, and suffering that it is impossible to list all the evil it has spawned. Boebert is doing her part to spread it. In a video unearthed by Colorado news anchor Kyle Clark at 9 News, Boebert states "there is a replacement theory that's going on right now." She is responsible for taking this theory from the fringes and into the political mainstream. No Democratic politician is sharing anything even close to this. The violence is coming from her, not us. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == She is beyond vulnerable and with your support 2026 will be the election we defeat her. Hi Peter, Finding a church that aligns with your values isn’t always easy. Especially one that’s unafraid to speak truth, stand firm, and lead boldly. That’s why we built the [**Find A Church**](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VVY_nY4T7DFNVs_r9W71VT3nW2NZxg55F_8VqN93kXGC3qn9qW7lCdLW6lZ3pPW40qVLd7868xhW2H0V9_709WPdVS-pbq5LFdvRN2RxVSGcG9bpW2R6VQ13P0STSW2Ls4X61sKpCSW1tgwcW4fKfWYW2KTByg4N8K0nW76GvTM4jb1fzW9lZnwk1czn4xN22LYhJ4rkc1N74jCDdGPqcCW7X44869kJ-v0W1sLg1C1Q0ZMcW7BD-Wn2bQD9BW3l6Xy62WHVyjW73Yc2l6j9T36W3rhnzQ4hzn2VW3wy1Z52MRMcpW4Yf7yl6fljKfW30bjKD7ZrVBDW5Dwnfr5JrgnVW3vQz7H9fn4NTV7MSks8RDxqGf6C2zZq04) map. It’s a new tool that helps you locate churches in your area that share your convictions and won’t compromise on Biblical truth. You can explore the map at [**tpusafaith.com/map**](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VVY_nY4T7DFNVs_r9W71VT3nW2NZxg55F_8VqN93kXGC3qn9qW7lCdLW6lZ3l9W6bRLjP247b9JW5H_22F23Y4JHW7QbN262l0W-8MyV5h7W1Jc0W6bqDg94blvPPVdVXnb4jkkQ0W74dzF72GcDsTF4p-8GszKLlW8fsyJh8KcqBLW5sMJRg75c81gW27nv8r6VMck5VxbBDl3QLMVzW7DZFlW2c2_f9W66X65q8fBwKRMD0LVtkw4PCN552Xy-4F0BLW4qr5VF6SrpZrVPqX675lBSwYW3b2PGc3tYTSsW2cQl3q7WJSztW1H52J76DrSnqW8Wh8pp1H8dB3W4Vm0dj3x_g5YW8MwwF96c6Qx6f48HZdR04). That means more taxes for Washington - and **less for you.** But IRS Code 408(m)(3) gives you another option.[**How To Avoid The RMD Trap**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0ab47556817c2607d84762aa9bff2922e948beae757954fc72fe3018ff525bd9335f1ccd1689573b4f538821d31b111cddb2ee3d2206efe1ae2)
---|---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0ab26cf9495f179bae4134d937fe3b7336ebdaa759faa3d1e2062e0f533cb44a3faf2ebc401a20b841ce67fe2ba645f789e6665a5052d1176fb) | **[What If The Falling Dollar
Isn't An Accident? ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0ab26cf9495f179bae4134d937fe3b7336ebdaa759faa3d1e2062e0f533cb44a3faf2ebc401a20b841ce67fe2ba645f789e6665a5052d1176fb)**
It sounds crazy - but powerful people actually want the **dollar to fall.** Here's how a weaker dollar could benefit them - and hurt Americans with savings and retirement plans. [**Click To See Why**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0ab26cf9495f179bae4134d937fe3b7336ebdaa759faa3d1e2062e0f533cb44a3faf2ebc401a20b841ce67fe2ba645f789e6665a5052d1176fb)
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0aba2976ae36c6640c6e8bf3802222e1038c7af16b54e6866ae44ee2e00e01c8723c77ae07bc462eedd97c879b045357b531a7331500a143c67) | **[Gold $5,000. Silver $65.
](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0aba2976ae36c6640c6e8bf3802222e1038c7af16b54e6866ae44ee2e00e01c8723c77ae07bc462eedd97c879b045357b531a7331500a143c67)**BofA, HSBC & SocGen just raised forecasts to **record highs by 2026** amid rising debt, deficits & rate cuts. They're already positioning before markets react. Why? [
**Get The Full Details**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0aba2976ae36c6640c6e8bf3802222e1038c7af16b54e6866ae44ee2e00e01c8723c77ae07bc462eedd97c879b045357b531a7331500a143c67)

* * *
**[Imagine waking up and finding out you have:](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0abc48e85177887186b12da0125351a2638c2f643653c0cebc5b19142dd1da6c17429fab0d8c291212847018c86b06ac4cab7bff256551300f6)**
* No access to your savings.
* No way to pay bills.
* No way to buy groceries or medicine.

That's not a movie script. It's not a scare tactic. It already happened this year when two U.S. banks collapsed - Pulaski Savings Bank in Illinois and Santa Anna National Bank in Texas. And the FDIC has quietly admitted there are **[63 more banks](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0abc48e85177887186b12da0125351a2638c2f643653c0cebc5b19142dd1da6c17429fab0d8c291212847018c86b06ac4cab7bff256551300f6)** on its “problem list.” Now, would you believe your bank could be next? Probably not. But here’s the reality: the depositors at Pulaski Bank and Santa Anna believed the same thing... until it was too late. **The Shocking Truth: Banks May Not Be as Safe as You Think**
* **Liquidity is evaporating.** The overnight repo market - Wall Street’s emergency cash valve - has collapsed 91% since 2023. The plumbing of the financial system is running dry.
* **Bond traps are back.** Just like Silicon Valley Bank, institutions are drowning in “safe” bonds that turned toxic when rates shifted.
* **Defaults are rising.** Commercial real estate, credit cards, and small business loans - sparks waiting to ignite a crisis.
* **$57 trillion in derivatives.** JPMorgan alone holds more than the U.S. national debt. Warren Buffett once called derivatives “financial weapons of mass destruction.”

This isn’t stability. It could be a **[recipe for disaster.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0abc48e85177887186b12da0125351a2638c2f643653c0cebc5b19142dd1da6c17429fab0d8c291212847018c86b06ac4cab7bff256551300f6)** And here’s the part most Americans don’t realize: in the next crisis, **bail-outs are over. Bail-ins are legal.** That means if your bank fails, they can freeze your account... and use **[your deposits](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0abc48e85177887186b12da0125351a2638c2f643653c0cebc5b19142dd1da6c17429fab0d8c291212847018c86b06ac4cab7bff256551300f6)** to stay alive. And yes, you may say the FDIC exists. But even they admit they may not have the resources to save everyone if multiple banks collapse at once. So when the dominoes fall... who gets rescued first?
* Big banks? Big depositors? Politicians?

And who gets left waiting in line?
* Retirees. Savers. Everyday Americans?

**[What If Your Bank Seizes Up?](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0abc48e85177887186b12da0125351a2638c2f643653c0cebc5b19142dd1da6c17429fab0d8c291212847018c86b06ac4cab7bff256551300f6)**
* Will you be able to withdraw when you need to?
* Could your retirement accounts be drained by panic selling?
* Will you really recover your “insured” deposits - and if so, how long will it take?

By then, it won’t matter what the Fed or Washington promises. The damage will already be done. Don’t wait until you see “Bank Run” or “Bail-In” scroll across your newsfeed. You will panic - and by then, it’s too late. Smart savers are already **[moving part of their wealth into assets](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0abc48e85177887186b12da0125351a2638c2f643653c0cebc5b19142dd1da6c17429fab0d8c291212847018c86b06ac4cab7bff256551300f6)** that don’t freeze, don’t default, and don’t depend on Washington’s promises. Gold has no counterparty risk. It cannot be “bailed-in.” And it has outlasted every failed banking system for thousands of years. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=16e556d00173f0abc48e85177887186b12da0125351a2638c2f643653c0cebc5b19142dd1da6c17429fab0d8c291212847018c86b06ac4cab7bff256551300f6) **_TO LEARN HOW BANK FAILURES PUT YOU AT RISK -
AND HOW TO PROTECT YOURSELF_** **Because you’ve worked too hard to watch your savings become someone else’s lifeline.**

---

name: Craig Riedel for State Senate
subject: Riedel Campaign November Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Craig Riedel
body:
| | | | |
---
Riedel Campaign Update | November 17, 2025
---
Riedel Speaks to TPUSA Chapter at Bowling Green
---
|
---
|
This month, Craig was invited to speak to the Turning Point USA chapter at Bowling Green State University. Craig spoke about his background and experience in the business world, and also shared his beliefs and why he's a conservative. Craig answered questions on many various topics and left the meeting very excited for the future of America with the next generation of conservatives.

---
|
---
Craig Attends Rotary Clubs Throughout the District As a Rotarian and member of the Defiance Rotary Club, Craig has enjoyed the opportunity to meet other club members across the 1st Senate District. Over the last month, Craig has attended meetings with the Ottawa-Glandorf, Van Wert, and Napoleon Rotary Clubs.
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Craig and Danette Attend Fall Dinner
Craig and Danette were thrilled to attend the Hancock County Fall Dinner last month. Vivek Ramaswamy was the event's keynote speaker, followed by many other conservative voices from across the state.
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Riedel Campaign Hosts Fundraiser in Van Wert
The Riedel campaign hosted a fundraiser event this month in Van Wert. Craig spoke to supporters about why he's running and what he hopes to accomplish as our next State Senator. Craig and Danette are extremely gracious for all of the support and encouragement that they are receiving from people all across the district.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
# Craig and Danette Walk in Halloween Parades

Craig and Danette had a great time walking in the Findlay and Defiance Halloween parades. Both parades had huge turnouts of excited kids and families celebrating Halloween. In Findlay, the Riedel campaign joined the Hancock County Young Republican float to pass out candy and celebrate America.
---
| |
---

---
| |
---

---
| |
---

---
| |
---
| Craig Speaks to Fulton County Patriots in Action
This month, Craig was invited to speak to a conservative group in Fulton County called Patriots in Action. Craig shared his vision for Ohio in the coming years and answered questions about issues currently facing Fulton County. Craig shared how his experience and values will allow him to best serve the people of Northwest Ohio.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Paid for by Friends of Craig Riedel

name: The Flyover
subject: USS Ford Arrives, Bitcoin for Heat, and a Fake Food Influencer
body:
The _USS Gerald R. Ford_ aircraft carrier, the nation's most advanced, [arrived in the Caribbean Sea on Sunday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u7CAQBeCnwR2WAWPWBcVt3O1tU1r8DOuJWLMCbGvz9BFR3iDdjEYane983Ne7wYj74795gq4hrTtcJUKtkNejlJCyNznjCcVidQn3kPK28oFLyhhlavUG43sdO68DAAfRgWZqEkIpKVW3aTY7K6aBCTZJZo0fVJglzLfpJsQYnOlQt2-MMcXYIOXUOz77cHODUh68DCMZB_BYU-4_E-51gxDf6YTcu_Tsot5qfRUi_hG-EL5c19U7W5qi3Qlf2kj4cpRCH5BN9LShqMHssgmVuuaDTH-ZbUdrwezUHhj98aIn7PB1QDSEL13W_nVhjFgmRcbh8TQYf5LUP9V3av4dAAD___kph0o), completing the largest U.S. military buildup in the region in generations, dubbed Operation Southern Spear.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkc2u2yAQhZ8G7xLB8OcsvKhkZXe77RIRGOKpMFhAcnXfvnJ736DbT59Gc8759eE-PGUqz59-x2Wk6gp-9oxjYHOv3lNt0bdGb-wPGqFSSbVtDjjoixAXYV30lL-cmuKSEAHlhIuwRkprtbbTtgQxKx0Bwy1aznE28ADL58ctasPn9JhoOa8JIawQXGtzDXCLaQ7c2ohRJ8UUx0ijtuvvSmVsmPJXfWO7hrpPednGODqTPxjcGdypvLGPa_ORysB89XRyea9MrkorBiYcTK6ag2VgPJOr1ApOTJHJFYSVDMx-KoaBOd3EwLzG7np9tYBMrg192C7fX7jdU3H9qKXX9m0Gvx-enoXJ9fBtFGx9o0PM_CK1dP96exUa3ik1G224lcpObYnHJ-VM3Vim-HP3lP9mHP81zHuBPwEAAP__wrWckw) | |
# Monday, November 17, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1968, NBC cut away from a nail-biter between the Raiders and Jets to air _Heidi_ , missing two game-winning touchdowns in the final seconds. The fiasco, dubbed the [Heidi Bowl](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u4yAUxfHVQGeLy2dSUEzjLtNOaWFzse8ImwiYWNn9KO8t4bXnSL_i_-cxPwJlOrff4UDfU5lPvFrG3rHO_1pLpcZQK72wLdTXQmcqdZ-lkGYAGMDNMVB-z5pHnxAlKo4enFXKOWMc3_2iFxuiSVbZRagQlNF3pwBQwv1m9Y2T_2gA4ACEMXZc5T2m2yqcixhN0kwLjNRLHf8WOvuOKb_LC-u4loNnv_f-bEz9YnJicrquazxT_nxMTiAEk1OptNEZcvtehq1i6Ng6k9MWDmyDBl59fF6UMzXrmBbbEegL4f1HVV5e_g8AAP__5fV07w), sparked national outrage and led the NFL to mandate that all games be shown in full. ## USS Ford Enters Caribbean Near Venezuela
The _USS Gerald R. Ford_ aircraft carrier, the nation's most advanced, [arrived in the Caribbean Sea on Sunday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u7CAQBeCnwR2WAWPWBcVt3O1tU1r8DOuJWLMCbGvz9BFR3iDdjEYane983Ne7wYj74795gq4hrTtcJUKtkNejlJCyNznjCcVidQn3kPK28oFLyhhlavUG43sdO68DAAfRgWZqEkIpKVW3aTY7K6aBCTZJZo0fVJglzLfpJsQYnOlQt2-MMcXYIOXUOz77cHODUh68DCMZB_BYU-4_E-51gxDf6YTcu_Tsot5qfRUi_hG-EL5c19U7W5qi3Qlf2kj4cpRCH5BN9LShqMHssgmVuuaDTH-ZbUdrwezUHhj98aIn7PB1QDSEL13W_nVhjFgmRcbh8TQYf5LUP9V3av4dAAD___kph0o), completing the largest U.S. military buildup in the region in generations, dubbed Operation Southern Spear. The Trump administration [stated the deployment](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO3CAQBuCnwR2WwQZ2C4pr6O4SKUVKC8OwOwlrrIG15bePnFe4eka__v_7_Tl_esy4Pr78C2xLZV7hqBlaA5rftaZC0RPhDnXBFgquqdBzloNUXAguzBw95nOeumgTgISxAyuMHkdjlDLd006TDkvyi4cb3KNSOo33dAexaB-D0dChvdKEEEaIQSndB3mP6RYGYyJElSY2DRCxFer_FFzbE1I-yw7Uh_Lqsn22tlU2fjDpmHTHcfSr38_-hZlJ95OgVv4jJQzApPuCo_JfrRBCZdJFrFv2J782M-k-qGHI1980jlLLG5PuAeRz5MQvCR4uCyBeG-Ff4A8q743D2oDqdcNlAb_yCp5J15GN24E5Y9WGTcPj5TH_79y-Bb1b-S8AAP__WqiVDA), which includes a carrier strike group with fighter jets and guided-missile destroyers, is focused on a large-scale counterdrug operation targeting "narco-terrorism." The U.S. government has repeatedly asserted that Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro is complicit in drug smuggling operations, having formally indicted him in 2020 as the leader of a cocaine trafficking network. [Here's an overview of the situation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAUAL8Gb1gGY0gGhi7e0rWjRcwjfhUBC56N0q-v0l_ofNLpdF-35eYwYnp8uidYCnlJ0GoEIijLUWvIxbtS8IR6R1ozppDLtshBTlwILsziHcbXojpvA4CEsQMrjB5HY6bJdJs194vTSrugLkGMWoVBa5DBjO5qxqu4d2jfNiGEEWKYJt2v8urDZR2M8eCnoJgawCPl0n9nTLRBiK98QunX_Oyi3Yj2ysYPJmcm59Za79sbMTlDYnLOOxRHmBOv-aANSuJ1B1d42xxxrJw24EflPmN68BwCPyHBzwHRVb5mV4nJ2XGjjB7EJLti_d4wRqzaMDU8ng7jXwr9699p5W8AAAD__7kchaI). The buildup follows a [series of recent U.S. strikes](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u7CAUBOCnsTsswLDYBcVtttvbprRYOKxPwo8F2Nbm6SPnFdKPRt_Mx2N5GAyYXv9NBN18XhKcNUBrUJa9Vp-LM6XgAfWJzWZMPpd14ZRLwhhhanEGw3sRvdMegMPYg2bqNo5KSan6VdtxVpMU9jlyRycrZ2qEmiU3inrLxNSjvtoYY4oxKuVtsHx2frJUKQdOetEJCg5bLsNnxtRW8OGdDyiDzbEPem1tq934r-P3jt_P8xyuCSfA1xXo-P2ABN87BEO2AhUdpEYi1GpeQFxOJjjSyh43YiIUtCZVktDmYCqJxu0lkwsm5pn1RbvtxBCw3lQn6CsaDL-M9qfvDs1_AgAA__8-NIWK) against alleged drug-smuggling vessels that have killed at least 83 people, and comes as President Trump has told reporters he "sort of made up [his] mind" on potential military operations in Venezuela.
## UK Cracks Down on Asylum Rules
The United Kingdom's Labour government is launching a [major crackdown on asylum rules](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb8GOiPPGDApXLwmXV67JXLsMczG4MhMEuXvV9lf2P7qHp3zdZkvnjPvy3-_kZNU5p1eRyYRqvPjOFKp0dfKTzquLKHwnkpdZ9Q4KAAFdo6e83vu2-gSEZJpyYEdjbF2GGy7ujGNPU4a_dVM4ZoSjuakQzARQUNIU8vu8wYAFkAPw9gFPMU0BW1tpDikvuk1RZZSu-_Cu6yU8rs8qXahbG12q8j9aMy_Bs8Nnh-37mPQvf1aymfR4JlzpsVnxdvGS_XCZVdCvvK-qMdN-buvomAyxoDV2K2y5ba6eH9xznyMtun1snnOv0D5U6Wnw58AAAD__9OKfLw), with Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood warning that illegal migration is "tearing the country apart" and eroding public support for the system. The new measures will require people granted asylum to wait 20 years instead of the current five before they can apply for permanent settlement, and their refugee status will be regularly reviewed to ensure their home countries are not deemed safe for return. Under the new plan, housing and financial aid will no longer be guaranteed--especially for asylum seekers who are allowed to work but choose not to. [Watch Mahmood explain the proposal](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdF5hs-BN4WKjiO5GilKkRMYeL5PrH2QPsLx9RF7hdqM5-o6Ovj8f04fBgOn100TQ5POU4KgBiKBMW60-F2dKwR3qjGQzJp_LMslW9lwILtTkDIZzujdOewAJXQNaqKHrlOp71Szaz8PgLcyitw_RzW4eZKv8QwnpWiF726C-2oQQSoi274ebld-cf9hWKQeu93d2b8Eh5XL7mzHRAj6ceYdyszk2QS9Ea2Xdk8mRyfE4jlus6cqYHCHxrTI5rjkgob3O14WmCImYHOeCZDBxyvx6L2YL3NQzbJFfiD15NJ_AC_jtBcArGdoqJ4hrLqacTI478udT_Hq_PzfWjdmiY92P75dQOOpvKGtTtFsPDAHroNi9fUWD4f90-pLvXct_AQAA___6LpkN). The plan is [already facing opposition](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAQhU8DmRFlMO4OHGxC1ptuiIxdbmqnwMg2jbj9iLnCZE960vd-_r2mlyWm7f3XrmhKiNOGZ2YsBdN05Bxi8jYl-mCeqbhIW4hpmWQrlQAQoCdvia-pr70JiBK7Gg3ooeu0VkrXi3nAPIDGAWffgQL17Ho1z86DR4Te25rMTQMADdAqNTROPn14uFZrj16Fvupb9FRiav5H2sqCga_4wdS4uNZsllL2XHV_KjlWcjzPs3FzvlfcfiXHW1ZyPMSX2NluWZQofLK5kLPMl0joD4diT7GgKxS3LEJMImE43ohZ3FGLPVjYfPGxij0yOcKbWSfj95OYKQ-66tv3aol_apVfffkx8jsAAP__9--NKg) from both political sides, with Conservatives demanding even faster deportations and some Labour members of the parliament expressing concern over the government's increasingly hardline stance.
## Dog Shoots Owner in the Back
A Pennsylvania man was hospitalized and required multiple surgeries after [his dog accidentally shot him](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1ugzAUBeCnMZuRfzAug4dKFVu6VFVHZPA1ODXcyL5JlLevklfo_ElH55yf03TyKadj_fQ7OIo4HXCvGYigTNdaI5bgS0k3qHOiBdMRsWyTEspwKbm0U_ApP6auCS4CKNANOGl7ra01xjabgwg9DL0R2s-D0dAbIboQ52DNDFrGJrlnmpTSSimM6dtFDSG-LcLaAMHEjnUCQiIs7RnTQRvE_MAblHbBvcluI7pUpt-ZGpka_bw8F7QrPpmp8fuLqTHgyuuGSJXj_YDCZ7_8ch8JCj9f90s6Xk7r9eAZIjE1VsLyYHpMgekPqWw3KDX0TXHhck85p9pb1ol19ym_itC_3rs59RcAAP__7YaEog) in the back on Tuesday night in Shillington. The 53-year-old victim told police he was [cleaning his shotgun](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb_G7iYyGJukoNgm3dt2S4vAYE-EGQsmifL3q-QXXnuvdHR0_v0sP54ylfWv39FJ4qXgq2UUwbo8Wktco6-VnthuJIGpJK7bogc9gVKg7BI95fdi-ugSosaxR6fsPI7WTpPtNzdH4731KRhMqOzFBkQd0jnFwXpjTU_uQ1NKWaWGaZpPQV9iOofB2ohxSqYzA0YSrqc7U5ENU37zE-sp8N5nt4kcrRv_dPra6euBfGT8XJ2-Rl6hbczSgF8FK_gkWOH-2A8qK3AB2RBuGMGXCA1FvnNKsD4KHJwpIDT_BqXO5mLM3FcXjxflTG22nRnW3VP-esiv4j2d_h8AAP__x42GNw) and had placed it on the bed, just before one of his dogs jumped onto the bed and caused the weapon to fire. Officials, who were initially informed that a dog had set the gun off, found the man conscious on the floor with a wound to his lower back. The shooting appears to be accidental, but police are still investigating the incident, which occurred with two other dogs and the victim's son present in the residence.

Ford aircraft carrier, the nation's most advanced, , completing the largest U.S. military buildup in the region in generations, dubbed Operation Southern Spear. | | | | | | Monday, November 17, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1968, NBC cut away from a nail-biter between the Raiders and Jets to air Heidi , missing two game-winning touchdowns in the final seconds. The fiasco, dubbed the , sparked national outrage and led the NFL to mandate that all games be shown in full. Today in The Flyover , we're looking at the Pennsylvania man who landed in the hospital after in the back--a reminder that even man's best friend can have terrible timing. Do you have an interesting story involving your pet? Reply to this email to let us know. **** Keep an eye on your inbox. We're about to send an important message from our sponsor, , about the financial risks exposed by the recent government shutdown and what Americans can do to protect their retirement savings. Get early access to AI's fastest riser from today's sponsor, at $0.81/Share, read more in today's edition. | USS Ford Enters Caribbean Near Venezuela The USS Gerald R. Ford aircraft carrier, the nation's most advanced, , completing the largest U.S. military buildup in the region in generations, dubbed Operation Southern Spear. The Trump administration , which includes a carrier strike group with fighter jets and guided-missile destroyers, is focused on a large-scale counterdrug operation targeting "narco-terrorism." The U.S. government has repeatedly asserted that Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro is complicit in drug smuggling operations, having formally indicted him in 2020 as the leader of a cocaine trafficking network. . The buildup follows a against alleged drug-smuggling vessels that have killed at least 83 people, and comes as President Trump has told reporters he "sort of made up [his] mind" on potential military operations in Venezuela. UK Cracks Down on Asylum Rules The United Kingdom's Labour government is launching a , with Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood warning that illegal migration is "tearing the country apart" and eroding public support for the system. The new measures will require people granted asylum to wait 20 years instead of the current five before they can apply for permanent settlement, and their refugee status will be regularly reviewed to ensure their home countries are not deemed safe for return. Under the new plan, housing and financial aid will no longer be guaranteed--especially for asylum seekers who are allowed to work but choose not to. . The plan is from both political sides, with Conservatives demanding even faster deportations and some Labour members of the parliament expressing concern over the government's increasingly hardline stance. Dog Shoots Owner in the Back A Pennsylvania man was hospitalized and required multiple surgeries after in the back on Tuesday night in Shillington. The 53-year-old victim told police he was and had placed it on the bed, just before one of his dogs jumped onto the bed and caused the weapon to fire. Officials, who were initially informed that a dog had set the gun off, found the man conscious on the floor with a wound to his lower back. The shooting appears to be accidental, but police are still investigating the incident, which occurred with two other dogs and the victim's son present in the residence. Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.

Weaponizing the U.S. Mail: Fake Bailey Campaign Postcard Could Trigger a Felony Carrying up to 20 Years in Federal Prison (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/weaponizing-the-u-s-mail-fake-bailey-campaign-postcard-could-trigger-a-felony-carrying-up-to-20-years-in-federal-prison.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d618169084-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/weaponizing-the-u-s-mail-fake-bailey-campaign-postcard-could-trigger-a-felony-carrying-up-to-20-years-in-federal-prison.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d618169084-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(Paul Weaver/SOPA Images/LightRocket via Getty Images / Getty Images)
By Illinois Review

As Darren and Cindy Bailey mourn the heartbreaking loss of their son, daughter-in-law, and two young grandchildren, most Illinoisans have responded with compassion. But even in this moment of profound grief, political operatives appear to be exploiting tragedy for gain — and possibly violating federal law in the process.

On Sunday morning, Illinois Review reported that local political figure and candidate Julie Cho posted that she had received a postcard supposedly from the Darren Bailey for Governor campaign.

The problem? The postcard used an outdated 2022 Bailey campaign logo, not the current version featuring the Chicago skyline. The postage date — November 6, 2025 — only deepened the suspicion, suggesting someone pulled an old postcard and attempted to pass it off as an active campaign mailing.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/weaponizing-the-u-s-mail-fake-bailey-campaign-postcard-could-trigger-a-felony-carrying-up-to-20-years-in-federal-prison.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d618169084-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
Opinion: Gov. Pritzker Is More Vulnerable Than Ever: Here’s How Republicans Can Defeat Him in 2026 (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/opinion-gov-pritzker-is-more-vulnerable-than-ever-heres-how-republicans-can-defeat-him-in-2026.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d618169084-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/opinion-gov-pritzker-is-more-vulnerable-than-ever-heres-how-republicans-can-defeat-him-in-2026.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d618169084-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Vice President Kamala Harris at a rally to support Illinois Democrats with Illinois Lt. Gov. Juliana Stratton (L) and Gov. JB Pritzker on Sept. 16, 2022, in Chicago. (Photo: Scott Olson/Getty Images)
By Illinois Review

For the first time in years, the political winds in Illinois are shifting – and Gov. JB Pritzker is more vulnerable today than at any point in his political career. Despite his billions and his national ambitions, Illinois voters are waking up to a simple truth: under Pritzker’s leadership, this state has become less safe, less affordable, and less free.

When Pritzker first took office, he promised “progress.” What Illinois got instead was chaos – a dangerous experiment in soft-on-crime policies, record spending on illegal immigrants, punishing taxes, and an exodus of families and businesses fleeing the state.

Nowhere has the failure been more devastating than on public safety.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Weaponizing the U.S. Mail: Fake Bailey Campaign Postcard Could Trigger a Felony Carrying up to 20 Years in Federal Prison () (Paul Weaver/SOPA Images/LightRocket via Getty Images / Getty Images) By Illinois Review As Darren and Cindy Bailey mourn the heartbreaking loss of their son, daughter-in-law, and two young grandchildren, most Illinoisans have responded with compassion. But even in this moment of profound grief, political operatives appear to be exploiting tragedy for gain — and possibly violating federal law in the process. On Sunday morning, Illinois Review reported that local political figure and candidate Julie Cho posted that she had received a postcard supposedly from the Darren Bailey for Governor campaign. The problem? The postcard used an outdated 2022 Bailey campaign logo, not the current version featuring the Chicago skyline. The postage date — November 6, 2025 — only deepened the suspicion, suggesting someone pulled an old postcard and attempted to pass it off as an active campaign mailing. CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () Opinion: Gov. Pritzker Is More Vulnerable Than Ever: Here’s How Republicans Can Defeat Him in 2026 () Vice President Kamala Harris at a rally to support Illinois Democrats with Illinois Lt. Gov. Juliana Stratton (L) and Gov. JB Pritzker on Sept. 16, 2022, in Chicago. (Photo: Scott Olson/Getty Images) By Illinois Review For the first time in years, the political winds in Illinois are shifting – and Gov. JB Pritzker is more vulnerable today than at any point in his political career. Despite his billions and his national ambitions, Illinois voters are waking up to a simple truth: under Pritzker’s leadership, this state has become less safe, less affordable, and less free. When Pritzker first took office, he promised “progress.” What Illinois got instead was chaos – a dangerous experiment in soft-on-crime policies, record spending on illegal immigrants, punishing taxes, and an exodus of families and businesses fleeing the state. Nowhere has the failure been more devastating than on public safety. name: With Honor Action
subject: Veterans: "The Leaders America Still Believes In" 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/withhonor/invitation-two-parties-two-veterans-one-conversation-rep-lalota-rep-ryan-special-session-with-president-carter-alumni-14055048?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=8d6ab858f8&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | Friends,

Last week, Congress voted, on a bipartisan basis, to end the longest government shutdown in American history. While it's an imperfect solution, it took the courage of leaders who were willing to step across party lines to break the stalemate; leaders like **Rep. Don Davis** , an Air Force veteran and co-chair of the For Country Caucus, and **Rep. Jared Golden** , a Marine Corps veteran and former co-chair.

It was with veteran lawmakers like these in mind that With Honor Co-Founder & CEO Rye Barcott wrote an article for **No Labels** that veterans are "[The Leaders America Still Believes In](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=63c474670e&e=33f53a5b1a)." You can read the entire piece below, but the key takeaway is this: A new generation of veterans across the nation is entering the political arena. And they need a nation willing to support leaders who put the country above party and service above self-interest.

Thank you for standing with us.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=f6a62889a7&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| **The Leaders America Still Believes In**
_By Rye Barcott, co-founder & CEO of With Honor_

A few days after the tragic killing of Charlie Kirk, I stood alongside members of the Problem Solvers Caucus on the steps of the United States Capitol. Our message was simple: political violence has no place in America. Living up to that message, however, is far more difficult because healing our democracy requires not just condemning violence but confronting the divisions that fuel it.

Last week’s [Politico poll](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=1e0fd507e1&e=33f53a5b1a) underscored that challenge. 55% of Americans now expect politically motivated violence to increase. Even more alarming, nearly one in four believe there are circumstances in which such violence is justified. That sobering reality reflects how fragile our civic fabric has become and how urgently we need leaders capable of restoring trust and civility to public life.

It was out of that same concern for our fraying democracy that I co-founded With Honor in 2017 with U.S. Marine Corps veteran Peter Dixon and the late David Gergen, a longtime presidential advisor and U.S. Navy veteran. We began with a simple conviction: that one way to heal America’s growing partisanship, especially in Congress, was to elect more principled veterans.

Today, as trust in nearly every major institution continues to erode, one group still stands apart: those who have served. This Veterans Day, a [landmark Gallup–With Honor survey](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=41f438b2e5&e=33f53a5b1a) reveals a striking truth: Despite our divisions, Americans continue to hold veterans in high esteem. They trust us to lead with integrity, to put the country over party, and to bridge what divides us; precisely the qualities our democracy needs most right now.

**Trust Forged in Service**

In a nationwide survey of more than 2,000 adults, 55% of Americans say military service makes them more likely to vote for a candidate, compared with just 7% who say it makes them less likely. That level of confidence is virtually unmatched by any other background — political, corporate, or academic.

Americans associate veterans with the very qualities our democracy needs most. 82% say veterans possess strong leadership skills. 78% believe they put the nation’s interests ahead of their own. 77% agree they work effectively across differences.

These aren’t just favorable impressions, but the result of values shaped through real experiences under pressure, where teamwork, accountability, and a commitment to the mission take precedence.

**Leaders Beyond the Uniform**

Veterans have already proven their courage, answering the call to protect our nation when it mattered most. Today, many continue that service in new arenas, bringing integrity, civility, and courage to the boardroom, the classroom, and, yes, even to Congress.

Take the current generation of veterans who have stepped up to serve in Congress. Leaders like Representatives Don Bacon and Chrissy Houlahan, who, despite standing on opposite sides of the aisle, joined forces to deliver [a historic 14.5% pay raise for junior enlisted](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=40eac7e1e8&e=33f53a5b1a) service members. Likewise, Representatives Pat Ryan and Jen Kiggans are working side by side to champion [bipartisan legislation that extends military health care coverage](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=aad508ccf0&e=33f53a5b1a) to dependents up to age 26, ensuring parity with private insurance plans.
---
|
---
| _Reps. Bacon and Houlahan, both Air Force veterans, co-led the House Armed Services Committee’s Military Quality of Life Panel, which passed 25 of its 30 recommendations in last year’s NDAA._
---
| In the Senate, Senators Todd Young and Mark Kelly are driving forward transformative legislation to [overhaul, rebuild, and revitalize America’s shipbuilding capacity](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=15c0102c9d&e=33f53a5b1a), a cornerstone of our national strength, while Senators Roger Wicker and Jack Reed, the leaders of the Senate Armed Services Committee, are spearheading a [generational reform of our military’s acquisition and procurement systems](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=8a213267ef&e=33f53a5b1a).

Leadership like this isn’t forged in isolation. It’s shaped through shared service, sacrifice, and a belief in something greater than self. Whether strengthening our national defense through advances in health care, biotechnology, and artificial intelligence, or expanding opportunities for all Americans to serve, in and out of uniform, these veterans in Congress are proving what principled, mission-driven leadership looks like.

**Restoring Purpose to Public Life**

A new generation of veterans across the nation is stepping into the political arena. After our first election cycle in 2018, the veterans that With Honor supported [came together to found the For Country Caucus](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=ab4bc87013&e=33f53a5b1a), a group of now-37 U.S. representatives not drawn together by any ideological or political litmus test, but by their shared military background and commitment to putting their country before themselves.

Looking ahead to the 2026 midterms, an upward trend is expected among veterans from both parties running for office. To date, With Honor is tracking 474 verified veteran candidates running in federal races across the nation.

Of these candidates, 395 are running for the House of Representatives, and 79 are running for the Senate. With just over seven months to go until the final federal candidate filing deadlines, and with likely more open seats, retirements, and new district lines to come, veteran candidates are on track to outperform their numbers from last cycle, in which 513 veterans across both chambers ran.

These candidates are stepping forward to serve again, this time in a different uniform. Their sense of duty, discipline, and results-oriented approach can help restore civility and purpose to our governance. But they can’t do it alone. They need a nation willing to support leaders who put the country above party and service above self-interest.

**The Gallup–With Honor Study**

That’s why With Honor partnered with Gallup to better understand a vital question: how can the character and leadership developed through military service help heal our divisions at home?

The study’s findings reveal that Americans’ trust in veterans extends far beyond the realm of elections:
* 83% say they trust veterans to lead disaster response efforts.
* 70% trust them to help shape foreign policy.
* 68% trust veterans to serve effectively in community leadership roles.

In short, Americans see veterans not only as defenders of the nation but as pragmatic problem-solvers at home.

**A Call to Trust and Follow**

When I stood on the Capitol steps with nearly 30 members of Congress, half were veterans or currently serving in the military.

For a weary and divided electorate, their example matters. Americans are searching for leaders who stand for something larger than themselves. Veterans have already proven they can do that. The data confirm what most of us already know in our hearts: service builds character, and character builds trust.

This Veterans Day, let’s do more than offer gratitude. Let’s give those who’ve earned our trust the opportunity to lead once again — in our communities, in our institutions, and in our politics. Because when veterans lead, America is stronger, steadier, and more united.
---
|
---

We’ve set an ambitious goal of gathering ONE MILLION endorsements before the month ends, and we can’t reach this goal without everyone doing their part. | Together, we’ll save America! Thank you, Team Marsha | | | | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund PO Box 3750 Brentwood, TN 37024 This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community. To unsubscribe from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund ,

subject: 🗞️Freedom Virginia In the News🗞️
body:
Last week, we were featured in several articles as we called upon Virginia’s congresspeople to stand firm in fighting for Virginians’ access to affordable healthcare.
| | |
---
| |
---
| Friends-
Last week, we were featured in several articles as we called upon Virginia's congresspeople to stand firm in fighting for Virginians' access to affordable healthcare. Though the government shutdown is now over, we continue to call upon our congresspeople to stand up for the nearly 300,000 Virginians who will lose access to affordable healthcare coverage if Congress does not extend the insurance tax credits that are set to expire.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: “Hey Yang, Where’s My Thousand Bucks?”
body:
Hello, I've got a medium-sized announcement!

* * *
# ["Hey Yang, Where's My Thousand Bucks?"](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=179093187&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MDkzMTg3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjMzODUwNDQsImV4cCI6MTc2NTk3NzA0NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.FyaufFhQZWkWeJ2__w3X4fp6hV9acdDvu3LAebeG-bI)

| Nov 17

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=179093187&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MDkzMTg3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjMzODUwNDQsImV4cCI6MTc2NTk3NzA0NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.FyaufFhQZWkWeJ2__w3X4fp6hV9acdDvu3LAebeG-bI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

---

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/andrewyang/p/hey-yang-wheres-my-thousand-bucks?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hello, I've got a medium-sized announcement! I have a new book coming out on February 3rd called, "Hey Yang, Where's My Thousand Bucks? And Other True Stories of Staggering Depth." Yes, for real. It's a humorous inside account of my personal journey, starting at the beginning and going through the last several years to today.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/07c3e2e6-dd75-4c7c-bbaf-4fd194384ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I wrote this book for a few reasons. First, I wanted to share my experiences with those who have supported me since the presidential campaign - like you! We've been through a lot, and a ton has happened behind-the-scenes. What was it like backstage? Is there a person there? I intend this book as a "Thank You" and a love letter to all who have made 'Andrew Yang' a thing.
Second, I thought that people might enjoy some levity in a tough time. Humor is often the best way to escape. The alternate title was, "Hey, am I racist, or are you Andrew Yang?" which yes, I've been asked.
Third, it's a bit of therapy for me. A little self-indulgent, but I understand things better if I write them down. If I tell some of the stories of the past number of years maybe we can enjoy them together and have a better spirit.
Last, I like to stay creative and productive. There was a book inside me, and now it's outside of me.
The book is now available for [pre-sale](https://substack.com/redirect/af57e989-dcbe-4345-85f8-9811db7f7888?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and I hope you consider buying a copy! Use code UBIUBI for 25% off. It will make a great gift.
Here is an adapted excerpt:
**Visiting Chappelle**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8e470aec-95bd-46d3-911c-cf551929711d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"Hey Yang, you coming to summer camp or what?" I got that message from a friend in late June.
The summer camp he was referring to was Chappelle Summer Camp, which began in 2020 when Dave started a comedy show in a cornfield in Yellow Springs, Ohio during Covid. That summer, Michelle Wolf, Kevin Hart and many others were guests because it was the only place you could perform live comedy in the country during lockdown. It felt like the center of the world. Dave invited me that first year and I've been back multiple times, so now I've become something of a familiar figure in town. Chappelle Summer Camp has taken on a life of its own and thousands go each year. If you're a comedy fan, I highly recommend it.
Dave refurbished a local firehouse into a club called the YS Firehouse. He joked, "I spend my money buying up old buildings in this town and making them nice. If I were white, you'd call it gentrification. But because I'm black . . . there's no word for what I'm doing."
The first couple summers I went, I would just hang out backstage with Dave and his crew. It was a thrill just to be there. But then last summer, I asked Dave if I could get on stage, in part because it seemed lame to be hanging out with the greatest comedian of all time and not do anything. Dave was very encouraging. Dave introduced me saying, "Here's the guy who got everything right in 2020, but no one listened because he's Asian, Andrew Yang!"
I came out to a tepid response and said, "Hello Ohio! How are you all doing? Yes, I did run for President. Any of you support me?"
Some scattered applause.
"Well thank you. For the rest of you, fuck you. Fuck you all."
Laughter.
"Congratulations. You're why we're all still poor," I go on.
"The magical Asian man from the future comes and wants to give you all money. And you're like, 'I don't know about this guy. . . let me wait and see if someone else comes with a better offer. Maybe $2,000?'"
I had a tight five minutes about filming videos with Dave and saying "I'm Chris Tucker . . . and I'm Jackie Chan. It's Rush Hour 4, America, the path to freedom!" and some other jokes about how Minions are racist, traveling to Asia with my kids and losing one of them at the mall, J.D. Vance and a migrant reality tv show, and Asian male stereotypes. I closed on how social media is killing us and how people getting together in real life to have a few laughs is the antidote. I ended with a few kind words and closed with an "O - H?"
"I - O!" The crowd responded. It's an easy way to wrap a speech in Ohio, and also works for a comedy crowd.
One of the joys of Dave's shows is that no one has a phone. He is very scrupulous about that. It makes it a lot easier to say what you want and push a boundary. He's famously not on social media himself, yet he still sells out arenas around the world.
When I got off the stage, Dave said, "Man, that was actual comedy! Have you been practicing?"
"A little bit," I said, which was the truth. I'd been on hundreds of stages in front of people in all sorts of contexts, but on maybe half-a-dozen comedy stages up to then.
The other comedians backstage welcomed me back warmly. One of them said, "What are you doing our job for? It's not like I'm running for President!"
"Maybe you should," I said. "It wouldn't be any worse than what we have right now."
He laughed and replied, "For sure, for sure, maybe I should, maybe I should."
\-------------------
As you can tell, the book is a bit different for me. I hope you check it out and pick up a copy! Here is a link to [pre-order](https://substack.com/redirect/af57e989-dcbe-4345-85f8-9811db7f7888?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) - use code UBIUBI for 25% off. I'll be heading on a book tour in February so keep an eye out for that.
I discuss the book and Zohran with Zach on the [podcast](https://substack.com/redirect/935bca8b-c952-4d3f-9ae8-61e30a846d8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Offline](https://substack.com/redirect/b5eac71e-a460-428d-84eb-76c3218d7f81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is coming to Boston, Baltimore and NYC upcoming! Email [matt@noblemobile.com](https://substack.com/redirect/53894d08-1e5b-4adc-a6e6-0003e1458cf7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) if you want a few months off from your wireless bill and want to be rewarded with [Noble Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/9f0ed8ce-2f93-4476-a041-16846e8d7e4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Remember to look up.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9ccbb48-f9f7-4632-b61c-a08fe29ae881?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

One of the joys of Dave's shows is that no one has a phone. He is very scrupulous about that. It makes it a lot easier to say what you want and push a boundary. He's famously not on social media himself, yet he still sells out arenas around the world. When I got off the stage, Dave said, "Man, that was actual comedy! Have you been practicing?" "A little bit," I said, which was the truth. I'd been on hundreds of stages in front of people in all sorts of contexts, but on maybe half-a-dozen comedy stages up to then. The other comedians backstage welcomed me back warmly. One of them said, "What are you doing our job for? It's not like I'm running for President!" "Maybe you should," I said. "It wouldn't be any worse than what we have right now." He laughed and replied, "For sure, for sure, maybe I should, maybe I should." \------------------- As you can tell, the book is a bit different for me. I hope you check it out and pick up a copy! Here is a link to - use code UBIUBI for 25% off. I'll be heading on a book tour in February so keep an eye out for that. I discuss the book and Zohran with Zach on the . is coming to Boston, Baltimore and NYC upcoming! Email if you want a few months off from your wireless bill and want to be rewarded with . Remember to look up. | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Andrew Yang 111 Sutter Street, 7th Floor, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?
