Stress. Fear. Anger. They don't just steal your peace--they spike cortisol, pack on belly fat, and leave you rage-filled and exhausted.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/90b9b6eb-93ed-4745-bf01-d7b142527591?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In this powerful conversation, I sit down with Jason Hewlett--clean comedian, keynote speaker, and current opener on the Megyn Kelly Live Tour (I first met him on the Tucker Carlson Tour in 2024)--to talk about why joy is not a luxury... it's a weapon.

We laughed. I cried. And by the end, I was more centered and battle-ready for the times we're living in.

If you're feeling:
Worn down by the news
Heavy in your body and your soul
Worried about where our nation is headed
...this is your reminder that joy, humor, and faith are not distractions from the battle--they prepare you for it.

| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KA91MPMSWHANT3DM9CCMJTV2_0)

| | | | Hey Peter,

**I wish we had better news.

** Across the country, GOP lawmakers are rewriting election rules to make it harder for students, seniors, and workers to vote.

The Brennan Center’s [latest report](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KA91MPMSWHANT3DM9CCMJTV2_1) shows dozens of new bills limiting mail voting and reducing polling hours, a coordinated plan to suppress turnout.

We can’t let them silence our voices. Read what’s happening here.

body:

# Meet Me in Tennessee and Texas
Dear Friends and Supporters,

I am writing this letter a few days before our road trip to visit family, so please let me wish you an early “Happy Thanksgiving!”

I am truly grateful for all that America has provided me. Only in America could someone like me come here 37 years ago with nothing, build a life for myself, raise a family, start a home business, and eventually become a Republican nominee for the U.S. Congress in New Hampshire.

Happy Veterans Day vets! 11/11/2025 was Veterans Day. Thank you! This is our family photo from 2012 when my second son just finished basic training at Ft. Benning and my oldest son was attending the Air Force Academy. I am a very proud mother of two veteran sons.

**Oct. 29 - Lily on Fox News**
I was on _Fox & Friends_ to discuss President Trump’s trip to Asia.
Trump was in South Korea to meet with Xi Jinping of China for high-stakes talks
| Fox News Video [https://www.foxnews.com/video/6384234638112](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=4e426ed91e&e=c338950e03)

**My Upcoming Travel - Come and Meet me!**
Nov. 18 - Knoxville, TN at 7pm
Nov. 19 - Loudon, TN at 9am
Nov. 22 - Austin, TX at 7pm

If you are a current supporter, or wish to get involved to support my campaign and live near one of these locations, I would love to meet you in person. Please respond to this newsletter if you are interested in coming.

I am so thankful to count you as one of my supporters as I campaign hard to win in 2026. Thank you and God Bless!

[https://www.lilytangwilliams.com/congress/donate/](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=9e93beae9e&e=c338950e03)

_We are doing something different here at By the Ballot for this edition. We 're teaming up with [Dogwood News](https://substack.com/redirect/a7388872-a33c-4c0b-9449-6175084e169e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to bring you more perspectives on the state of the Commonwealth, our economy, and the Virginia workforce. Think of this as a trading places, since I will be writing over at Dogwood News for their newsletter. Make sure to check that out._
_This week 's By the Ballot is written by **[Michael O'Connor from Dogwood News.](https://substack.com/redirect/a7388872-a33c-4c0b-9449-6175084e169e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Michael is an award-winning journalist who started covering Virginia news in 2013 with reporting stints at the Richmond Times-Dispatch, Virginia Business, and Richmond BizSense. A graduate of William & Mary and Northern Virginia Community College, he also covered financial news for S&P Global Market Intelligence._
_Michael is the author of the Virginia Capital, a two-times-a-week newsletter that explores the landscape of Virginia 's policy disputes and labor battles and why they matter. I highly encourage you all to subscribe if you haven't already, to stay up to date, especially as we head into the 2026 Virginia. **[Sign up here.](https://substack.com/redirect/a7388872-a33c-4c0b-9449-6175084e169e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
_Without further ado, I 'll let Michael take it from here._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d1647da9-208f-4061-9f23-8e85bdb0a90c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As the dust settles on Virginia's historic elections earlier this month, one thing that's becoming clear is that unions helped fuel significant gains for Democrats on election night, even as many of these winning candidates did not make expanding worker power a focus of their campaigns.
I witnessed this as a reporter covering campaign events leading up to Democrat Abigail Spanberger's [landslide 14-point victory](https://substack.com/redirect/26683b12-154e-43e8-b25d-a82afa6ca55c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the governor's race over MAGA Republican Lt. Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears.
Whether it was at the raucous [Spanberger rally](https://substack.com/redirect/597511df-0a5d-4071-b38e-5780ca0d5514?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Norfolk headlined by former President Barack Obama, rallies in downtown [Richmond](https://substack.com/redirect/18c46263-ba91-498f-8e73-701d6def9659?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or small panel discussions featuring Democrats seeking seats in the House of Delegates: I could always spot union members, most often in the purple-and-yellow shirts of members of the Service Employees International Union (SEIU) or from the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE), along with carpenters and kitchen workers.
And, as the publication [NOTUS reported](https://substack.com/redirect/c197c925-f006-4e78-8b70-189894b4748b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), federal layoffs, shutdown furloughs, and rising health care costs energized union members with AFGE, which endorsed Spanberger, to get out and vote and volunteer with campaigns in a massive way.
More often than not, these workers and unions got a shout-out from candidates, and they raised their concerns when they were allowed to do so.
But the question now is what pro-worker policy changes can we expect from Virginia Democrats now that they've been given full control of the General Assembly and Governor's Mansion in historic fashion?
It's worth noting that on Friday, Spanberger announced the members of her transition team's policy committees.
The co-chairs of the labor committee are: Greg Akerman, president of the Baltimore-D.C. Metro Building Trades Council; Shawn Avery, president and CEO, Hampton Roads Workforce Council; David Broder, executive director, SEIU Virginia State Council; and Paige Shevlin, a former strategic advisor for infrastructure workforce development in the U.S. Department of Transportation.
Still, readers of By the Ballot are likely aware that Spanberger's position on repealing "Right-to-Work" in Virginia is squishy, to put it politely.
As a candidate, she was clear that she didn't support rolling back "Right-to-Work," even though it's a law that has been shown to hurt union power, and repealing it would [strengthen](https://substack.com/redirect/02b77916-02f0-41c7-a68d-918bfe170806?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) workers' position at negotiating tables across the commonwealth. (P.S. If you want to learn more about the history of right-to-work and its roots in the Jim Crow South, I recommend [this piece](https://substack.com/redirect/a9c98b42-56a7-4813-bc0a-7d7e5e74b8bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)
And, despite the broad mandate voters handed him with a 13-seat gain in his chamber, Democratic House Speaker Don Scott was [preaching restraint](https://substack.com/redirect/0445c83c-ab77-4dc4-96e7-5afd0b7e041c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the day after the election and warning against overreach.
Taken together, that probably doesn't bode well for a "Right-to-Work" repeal in the upcoming session. I wouldn't be surprised if a legislator filed a bill to do so, but odds are, and Matt can correct me if I'm wrong, it gets bogged down in debate and dies in committee.
However, such a debate, especially one spearheaded by an experienced legislator, could help set the stage for actually getting something to Spanberger's desk before her term is up. What she would do with it at that point would almost certainly be a flashpoint in her tenure.
Much more likely in the near term is that Spanberger and Democrats will quickly raise the minimum wage.
Spanberger has always been on board with raising the minimum wage. The tougher question is by how much she will support doing so.
Anyone who's been to the grocery store or pays rent can tell you that $15 an hour is not a living wage. Workers I've spoken to tell me they need "$25 to thrive." (Democrat Leslie Mehta [told me](https://substack.com/redirect/50d445fe-2ba4-42e0-8bcd-902bd3cc313f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) she supported that goal before she went on [to flip](https://substack.com/redirect/e2ca4621-1673-4879-bdab-76a7004cbbab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) her Chesterfield-area House seat).
The other thing workers, especially public school teachers and home care workers, need is a statewide right to collectively bargain. Right now, whether most public sector workers have that right is subject to the whims of local school boards and city councils that may be getting advice from anti-union consultants.
Candidate Spanberger said she would work with the General Assembly to expand collective bargaining rights, so odds are good that more Virginia workers will win this right.
Beyond fairness in the workplace, another area worth watching is creating fairness in the tax code. But it's less clear, at least to me, how much political will there is around this. This could look like, as The Commonwealth Institute recently highlighted, [raising taxes](https://substack.com/redirect/b6011a26-975e-40b0-bb46-cfebafb9c2ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on wealthy Virginians with a 10% tax on income over $1 million, something that was attempted in the previous session but failed.
Currently, Virginia's top income tax rate of 5.75% applies to anyone making more than $17,001--so most Virginia taxpayers. That means the income of the average teacher in Virginia, making $70,441 in 2024, is taxed at the same rate as the income of, say, Robert Blue, the CEO of Dominion, whose base salary was $1.2 million last year.
It seems uncontroversial to try to change that, and a similar law proved [successful](https://substack.com/redirect/ddafbe11-b598-4b69-a2d0-2052f08332e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Massachusetts without resulting in a mass exodus of wealthy New Englanders from the state.

clean_body: Unions helped Democrats win big -- now the question is whether Richmond will deliver for the workers who delivered for them. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Unions helped Democrats win big -- now the question is whether Richmond will deliver for the workers who delivered for them. | | and | Nov 17 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | We are doing something different here at By the Ballot for this edition. We 're teaming up with to bring you more perspectives on the state of the Commonwealth, our economy, and the Virginia workforce. Think of this as a trading places, since I will be writing over at Dogwood News for their newsletter. Make sure to check that out. This week 's By the Ballot is written by Michael is an award-winning journalist who started covering Virginia news in 2013 with reporting stints at the Richmond Times-Dispatch, Virginia Business, and Richmond BizSense. A graduate of William & Mary and Northern Virginia Community College, he also covered financial news for S&P Global Market Intelligence. Michael is the author of the Virginia Capital, a two-times-a-week newsletter that explores the landscape of Virginia 's policy disputes and labor battles and why they matter. I highly encourage you all to subscribe if you haven't already, to stay up to date, especially as we head into the 2026 Virginia. Without further ado, I 'll let Michael take it from here. | | ---|---|--- As the dust settles on Virginia's historic elections earlier this month, one thing that's becoming clear is that unions helped fuel significant gains for Democrats on election night, even as many of these winning candidates did not make expanding worker power a focus of their campaigns. I witnessed this as a reporter covering campaign events leading up to Democrat Abigail Spanberger's in the governor's race over MAGA Republican Lt. Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears. Whether it was at the raucous in Norfolk headlined by former President Barack Obama, rallies in downtown , or small panel discussions featuring Democrats seeking seats in the House of Delegates: I could always spot union members, most often in the purple-and-yellow shirts of members of the Service Employees International Union (SEIU) or from the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE), along with carpenters and kitchen workers. And, as the publication , federal layoffs, shutdown furloughs, and rising health care costs energized union members with AFGE, which endorsed Spanberger, to get out and vote and volunteer with campaigns in a massive way. More often than not, these workers and unions got a shout-out from candidates, and they raised their concerns when they were allowed to do so. But the question now is what pro-worker policy changes can we expect from Virginia Democrats now that they've been given full control of the General Assembly and Governor's Mansion in historic fashion? It's worth noting that on Friday, Spanberger announced the members of her transition team's policy committees. The co-chairs of the labor committee are: Greg Akerman, president of the Baltimore-D.C. Metro Building Trades Council; Shawn Avery, president and CEO, Hampton Roads Workforce Council; David Broder, executive director, SEIU Virginia State Council; and Paige Shevlin, a former strategic advisor for infrastructure workforce development in the U.S. Department of Transportation. Still, readers of By the Ballot are likely aware that Spanberger's position on repealing "Right-to-Work" in Virginia is squishy, to put it politely. As a candidate, she was clear that she didn't support rolling back "Right-to-Work," even though it's a law that has been shown to hurt union power, and repealing it would workers' position at negotiating tables across the commonwealth. (P.S. If you want to learn more about the history of right-to-work and its roots in the Jim Crow South, I recommend .) And, despite the broad mandate voters handed him with a 13-seat gain in his chamber, Democratic House Speaker Don Scott was the day after the election and warning against overreach. Taken together, that probably doesn't bode well for a "Right-to-Work" repeal in the upcoming session. I wouldn't be surprised if a legislator filed a bill to do so, but odds are, and Matt can correct me if I'm wrong, it gets bogged down in debate and dies in committee. However, such a debate, especially one spearheaded by an experienced legislator, could help set the stage for actually getting something to Spanberger's desk before her term is up. What she would do with it at that point would almost certainly be a flashpoint in her tenure. Much more likely in the near term is that Spanberger and Democrats will quickly raise the minimum wage. Spanberger has always been on board with raising the minimum wage. The tougher question is by how much she will support doing so. Anyone who's been to the grocery store or pays rent can tell you that $15 an hour is not a living wage. Workers I've spoken to tell me they need "$25 to thrive." (Democrat Leslie Mehta she supported that goal before she went on her Chesterfield-area House seat). The other thing workers, especially public school teachers and home care workers, need is a statewide right to collectively bargain. Right now, whether most public sector workers have that right is subject to the whims of local school boards and city councils that may be getting advice from anti-union consultants. Candidate Spanberger said she would work with the General Assembly to expand collective bargaining rights, so odds are good that more Virginia workers will win this right. Beyond fairness in the workplace, another area worth watching is creating fairness in the tax code. But it's less clear, at least to me, how much political will there is around this. This could look like, as The Commonwealth Institute recently highlighted, on wealthy Virginians with a 10% tax on income over $1 million, something that was attempted in the previous session but failed. Currently, Virginia's top income tax rate of 5.75% applies to anyone making more than $17,001--so most Virginia taxpayers. That means the income of the average teacher in Virginia, making $70,441 in 2024, is taxed at the same rate as the income of, say, Robert Blue, the CEO of Dominion, whose base salary was $1.2 million last year. It seems uncontroversial to try to change that, and a similar law proved in Massachusetts without resulting in a mass exodus of wealthy New Englanders from the state. While there 's many different ways to power and the Right wants to take over our country by hook or by crook, we want to help Democrats help Americans by making a government for the people by the ballot. name: Chrystian Woods, Campaign Manager, Team Cori
subject: The most unbossed, unbought leader to ever fight for MO-01
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251117_recurring_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251117_recurring_act]
Hey there, Peter,
I’m Chrystian, Cori’s campaign manager, and I am so proud to be working for the most unbossed and unbought leader to ever fight for Missouri’s 1st District.
Every single day, I’m working to get Cori back in that office. Can I count on you to support Cori by donating to her campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251117_recurring_act]
Listen, as a new campaign, every dollar we raise early on matters. We’re building our team. Hiring organizers. Talking with voters.
And Cori?
She’s out on the ground, talking to families across the district, hosting food drives, and showing up for St. Louis like only she can.
Our nation continues to face relentless attacks from Trump and his billionaire allies. This isn’t politics as usual; this is survival. To fight back, we need leadership that is built for this moment. Not politicians who play by broken rules, but fighters who change them.
That’s Cori. She shows up when it’s hardest, lifts voices too often dismissed, and proves what’s possible when you fight for everyone. Brick by brick, St. Louis built her, and now we’re building the campaign that will send her back to Washington. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251117_recurring_act&recurring=1]
MAKE IT MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251117_recurring_act&recurring=1]
Your recurring contribution [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251117_recurring_act&recurring=1] ensures our team can plan ahead, stay on the ground, and keep fighting for St. Louis.
Thank you for standing with us,
Chrystian Woods
Campaign Manager, Cori Bush for Congress
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251117_recurring_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251117_recurring_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251117_recurring_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251117_recurring_act&recurring=1]

St. Louis, MO 63132
United States

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |

Patriot,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
Of all the things the Deep State did to me – _raiding my home, arresting me, holding me in the most violent jail in America, pushing me to the brink of bankruptcy..._
---
_...The worst thing they did was**DISBAR** me._
---
As the Bible says, earthly possessions will always fade, money comes and goes, but there are greater _priceless_ treasures.
---
_You see, I used my law license to defend the innocent, to take down bad guys, and to uphold our Constitution._
---
Truth be told, I didn’t make much money with my law license. But I _did_ make a difference. It was my legacy of justice – and it’s worth more than gold.
---
**_And the Left has STOLEN that from me._**
---
__Not only that, but I can no longer use my law license to defend myself from the Democrats’ lawfare.__
---
**Right now, I am facing a DEADLINE on 11/21 that will determine whether the Democrats’ last remaining RIGGED TRIAL against me proceeds or is thrown out for good!**
---
And because it’s in _state_ court, the President _cannot_ save me with a _federal_ pardon...
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, and no money for a top-notch legal defense team, I’m running out of options.**
---
**_BUT DEADLINE BE DAMNED, I WILL FIGHT FOR MY FREEDOM UNTIL THE VERY END!_**
---
_That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust._YOU_ truly are my final hope._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund before the 11/21 TRIAL DEADLINE so that I can keep fighting to ensure my TRIAL IS DROPPED.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-w/s5o43a12ca3)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-w/s5o43a12ca3)

[**WE TOLD YOU:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70049?t=5&akid=23619%2E4449941%2E_Ft4aE) Donald Trump is making good on his promise to make billions of dollars in cuts to our Social Security benefits to support his MAGA agenda. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70049?t=6&akid=23619%2E4449941%2E_Ft4aE) [**WE TOLD YOU:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70049?t=7&akid=23619%2E4449941%2E_Ft4aE) The only way to PROTECT Social Security once and for all is to DEMAND Congress take action to SAVE IT!!!!

But, the deadline to sign our petition to SAVE Social Security came and went, [**_and we never saw your signature._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70049?t=8&akid=23619%2E4449941%2E_Ft4aE) [ **LAST CHANCE FOR YOU: Sign onto our petition before midnight to DEMAND Congress protect Social Security from Trump’s cuts >>** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70049?t=9&akid=23619%2E4449941%2E_Ft4aE) | [SIGN ON NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70049?t=10&akid=23619%2E4449941%2E_Ft4aE)

Please, we CANNOT let Trump and his Republicans dismantle Social Security any further.

Every second that we ignore this issue, millions of Americans are at risk.
[ **So please, don’t miss the opportunity to sign our petition and DEMAND Congress protect Social Security from Trump’s cuts >>** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70049?t=11&akid=23619%2E4449941%2E_Ft4aE)

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Help us keep New Hampshire Income Tax FREE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
They're up to their old tricks again

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,

When I sent my last message warning that Concord liberals were testing the waters for an **income tax** , some people said, _“They’ll never actually try it.”_ Well, here’s the truth — **they already are.**
Andru Volinsky and others are calling it “the thinkable.” They’re trying to soften the ground, hoping Granite Staters will give up and accept an income tax as inevitable. **Not on my watch.** New Hampshire’s economy works because we keep government lean and trust people to spend their own money. That’s what makes us different from every other state in New England — and it’s exactly what the left wants to destroy. If they succeed, every paycheck in New Hampshire gets smaller — and every excuse for new taxes gets bigger.
**We can’t let them win the message war or the policy fight.** [I’m asking you to join me right now by contributing **$25, $50, or $100** to **Granite Solutions PAC** so we can push back hard, fast, and loud.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/1/0100019a9237bcb7-78c3ff3b-4788-458a-9810-3e7ee54199f9-000000/I_jwgww_kuNOm4Tn5UYngspAvfA=452)
We’re building the firewall that protects New Hampshire’s future — **town by town, voter by voter.** [**Help us stop the income tax before it spreads any further →**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/2/0100019a9237bcb7-78c3ff3b-4788-458a-9810-3e7ee54199f9-000000/UUBlzu9Qltd9BmBWWCBkhxhPnDk=452) [Every dollar we raise stays right here in New Hampshire — defending our values, our economy, and our freedom.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/3/0100019a9237bcb7-78c3ff3b-4788-458a-9810-3e7ee54199f9-000000/Q24faxqKbYtkzl4pxzoljzXi7Rk=452)
Best,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I am officially running for governor of New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.

You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbum4vm3lfpmtngs4uk6vqkbvb2nuvain36beiv8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5g66p72chh2bs)
---
**_OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally...
---
**_I’m officially launching my campaign for governor of New York – and I’d like _YOU_ to be one of our very first Founding Members!_**
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeovgvqp581qmue9us9pegq6aib1nrma8ubudttg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5g66p72chh2bs)
---

Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she’s brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda.
---
__But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw.__
---
**As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover!**
---
This isn’t just another election, Friend.
---
**_It’s the _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever!_**
---
Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees.
---
**But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ that protects New Yorkers from this insanity!**
---
We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a _**ONE-POINT LEAD**_ – _and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign!_
---
As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory.
---
That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign.
---
Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state!
---
**_That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,_600% MATCH_!_**
---
When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank...
---
**_Our Founding Members like _YOU_ who had my back on day one!_**
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to become an official Founding Member of my gubernatorial campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul – and help unlock a 600% MATCH.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6cfemn0p33c2coo4lbdv3k3bip2tk0q585mjk90_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5g66p72chh2bs)

clean_body: You deserve to be among the FIRST to know. You deserve to be among the FIRST to know. | OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK Friend, As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally... I’m officially launching my campaign for governor of New York – and I’d like YOU to be one of our very first Founding Members! Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she’s brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda. But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw. As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover! This isn’t just another election, Friend. It’s the FINAL BATTLE to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever! Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees. But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the FINAL FIREWALL that protects New Yorkers from this insanity! We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a ONE-POINT LEAD – and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign! As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory. That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign. Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state! That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,600% MATCH! When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank... Our Founding Members like YOU who had my back on day one! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Haley S.
subject: This is why I’m running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Michiganders shouldn't have to feel afraid

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1382%2E49239%2EQWvHvw)
I’m ready to fight for the people that I love in the state that I love
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8853?t=2&akid=1382%2E49239%2EQWvHvw)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8854?t=3&akid=1382%2E49239%2EQWvHvw)
null – see that little girl in the photo? That’s me! Way before I had the honor of serving Michiganders in Congress and launching this battleground campaign to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator. I was about 12 or 13 years old there.
But don’t be fooled by school picture day (_and my trendy beaded necklace_). Growing up as the daughter of small-business owners – Mom and Dad had their own landscaping business – I was always around a lot of dirt, grease, grime, and heavy machinery. **I wouldn’t have had it any other way.**
My parents taught me the value of hard work – a value that binds all of us in Michigan together. After all, we’re the state that built America. The state that built the middle class.
In fact, do you know what one of my favorite memories is from growing up? When I got the keys to my first car, a used Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. That car represented the newfound freedom of teenage years. **But it was more to me than just that – it also meant I had a piece of Michigan.**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8854?t=4&akid=1382%2E49239%2EQWvHvw)
I love Michigan. I love the people here. And I love that I’ve been able to fight for my state in Congress. But as I’ve traveled our state recently, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid. They’re afraid because of the chaos and uncertainty that Donald Trump and the GOP are inflicting upon our nation.
All across our state, I hear concerns about rising costs, fear of uncertainty in our auto industry, and worries about the future of Social Security and Medicare. And you better believe people are outright disturbed by Trump’s attacks on our democracy and personal freedoms. **This fear, uncertainty, and chaos – all of it is**** _unacceptable._**
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. I’m ready to fight for the people I love and help block Trump’s dangerous agenda. But the path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan – and this battleground race is being called a “Toss Up” by elections experts.
**null, I need your support to continue reaching out to voters and win in Michigan.[Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to my grassroots campaign?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8854?t=5&akid=1382%2E49239%2EQWvHvw)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8855?t=6&akid=1382%2E49239%2EQWvHvw)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8856?t=7&akid=1382%2E49239%2EQWvHvw)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8857?t=8&akid=1382%2E49239%2EQWvHvw)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8854?t=9&akid=1382%2E49239%2EQWvHvw)
---
Thank you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8858?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1382%2E49239%2EQWvHvw) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8853?t=11&akid=1382%2E49239%2EQWvHvw)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. He showed us HOW WE WIN. Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you. How We Win is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up." Let that be you, Fellow Patriot. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth. The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies. Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. For Charlie, The Turning Point USA Team 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

## A Message from Team Keenan
We just want to thank you for your support for our campaign and want to reach out and let you know how you can help us elect the next great conservative congressman from the East Valley, Daniel Keenan. Daniel's Key Positions:
* Supporting President Trump's mass deportations and stopping any plan for amnesty.
* Eliminating migrant worker visa scams that put Americans out of work and drive up the cost of housing.
* Stopping seniors from getting ripped off by pharmaceuticals charging them up to 20x more for drugs than patients in other countries.
* Restoring the expanded tax deductions for working families with children.
* Mandating election integrity: proof of citizenship to register to vote, ID required to cast a ballot, and requiring all votes to be counted on Election Day.

We have a tremendous need for volunteers and many opportunities to help us by collecting ballot petitions, knocking doors, tabling at events, and putting up signs. To let us know if you're interested and what you're interested in doing, please sign up to be a volunteer here: [https://DanielKeenanforCongress.com/Volunteer](https://contact.danielkeenanforcongress.com/l/mSfSkzsIqMjwhbMhvYtrcQ/7vwyJo3UuM3PFzXInUul892Q/V892Vo4EoBPrk4cyZ2Qo3aHw). subject: Colorado’s biggest embarrassment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zPiObal4ltwEe0R14XpIm_AgL-OZRhpbbYGhHhOGG_qzg8INhk4kdoOc0Li4JoKOEauzVunOtFud855sMbHgE3fpkStxkaperZYG5mCst0YTV4HjbNW2VRDDyvZiL4PClA8su3hvELhalHz9seQhS1eYQskq6DlmyOYbuAnuwYDw46CAzXyJJl5z5o74-hWEivZUGfzRRbzVShhbBGjOTGVsWwwLMzGdNFhpo6AmYnc=&c=NM_OhQF5xWODuJGBNVnePG_kxyQvqc3NGk9yhxdSyuAzBrn4jaryUA==&ch=vfxhWRnig_XiiQDLDOq5yjbR1BuWTowM8VxTXtEoWdgEBBhIWdG-yw==)

Peter,
Every time Lauren Boebert makes national headlines, Colorado becomes the punchline.
The scandals. The chaos. The conspiracy theories. The racist halloween costume. The theater incident that made us all cringe. While families here are working two jobs, coaching little league, taking care of aging parents, and trying to make ends meet, their congresswoman is starring in one humiliating spectacle after another.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zPiObal4ltwEe0R14XpIm_AgL-OZRhpbbYGhHhOGG_qzg8INhk4kdoOc0Li4JoKOEauzVunOtFud855sMbHgE3fpkStxkaperZYG5mCst0YTV4HjbNW2VRDDyvZiL4PClA8su3hvELhalHz9seQhS1eYQskq6DlmyOYbuAnuwYDw46CAzXyJJl5z5o74-hWEivZUGfzRRbzVShhbBGjOTEKaBkq0cHUK5hBPASYQURw=&c=NM_OhQF5xWODuJGBNVnePG_kxyQvqc3NGk9yhxdSyuAzBrn4jaryUA==&ch=vfxhWRnig_XiiQDLDOq5yjbR1BuWTowM8VxTXtEoWdgEBBhIWdG-yw==)
---
Colorado is a proud state. We work hard. We solve problems. We look out for each other.
But that's not the image Boebert gives the world.
Instead, she gives us dysfunction. She gives us chaos. She gives us extremism and noise and absolutely nothing that helps the people she is supposed to represent.
This is not who we are. This is not what we deserve. And this is not what our future has to look like.
Boebert survived by 546 votes. That's not a mandate. That's a warning -- we can beat her.
In 2024, Trisha Calvarese, Boebert's Democratic opponent, had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district - overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county. Now she's back to finish the job.
Let's restore our dignity and our leadership. Let's elect someone who shows up, listens, and fights for Colorado families.
[Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us end the Boebert era once and for all?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zPiObal4ltwEe0R14XpIm_AgL-OZRhpbbYGhHhOGG_qzg8INhk4kdoOc0Li4JoKOPugUm3TXIuqFRZIzNjrvZgLiCJfmifCt12QJNLD5Howrt7sQaEXlBIeblcZUf6iJd3sF3R7QIn78Z_8YaCR73fxMb-A8IAJskPWnnLVJWXn2w-zFBHZ8NcpntNzGVzqrb6OG6Sw_Z4Jwy33FEZr65n84PmiSjoGovXH2Im3mJk535m1HvBsr_Q==&c=NM_OhQF5xWODuJGBNVnePG_kxyQvqc3NGk9yhxdSyuAzBrn4jaryUA==&ch=vfxhWRnig_XiiQDLDOq5yjbR1BuWTowM8VxTXtEoWdgEBBhIWdG-yw==)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m confident that we share these values, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Will you help me fight for a better country?
I want to tell you about a few things that are important to me, Peter, so I hope you’ll give me just a minute or two of your time today:
**Public education:** My mom was a public school teacher right here in North Carolina, and I attended public schools all the way from first grade through university and law school. Our future leaders are learning in public schools today. I believe _every_ child deserves an excellent public education — no matter where their parents live or what they earn — and I’ll make public education a priority in the Senate.
**Health care access:** Expanding Medicaid was one of our most impactful accomplishments during my service as Governor of North Carolina. America is the richest country in the world, and every one of us deserves the care we need to stay healthy — and bringing Medicaid Expansion to NC helped more than 670,000 people get it. But the entire Medicaid system is now at risk because national Republicans decided to slash Medicaid funding and give a handout to the rich instead. I will fight to save Medicaid for all Americans.
**Voting rights:** North Carolina has been a proving ground for the GOP’s worst efforts to undermine voting rights and access. They’ve enacted ultra-partisan gerrymanders and restrictive anti-voter laws. In the wake of a 2024 election loss, Republicans even launched a lawsuit attempting to throw out tens of thousands of valid ballots and change the result. We must defend and expand voting rights to ensure that every one of us can have our fair say in our democracy — and we have to be prepared for the GOP to try to steal future elections that they lose.
**[Peter, I know we share many of the same values, beliefs and hopes for our nation’s future. I’m ready to do everything in my power to make this country better for all of us, but I need your help to make it to the U.S. Senate. Can I count on you to split a $25 donation between our campaign and Heartland Patriots right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97585?refcode=em20251117-9706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9706%2E614464%2EX0rKJQ)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97585?refcode=em20251117-9706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9706%2E614464%2EX0rKJQ)**
I appreciate all your help in this fight,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97585?refcode=em20251117-9706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9706%2E614464%2EX0rKJQ)

President Donald Trump said Sunday on Truth Social that "House Republicans **[should vote to release the Epstein files,](https://substack.com/redirect/58ee2d9c-e410-4741-aa9a-ffc67e6e87b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** because we have nothing to hide," reversing his previous opposition to a measure forcing the Justice Department to make public all materials related to the case, which the House is expected to vote on Tuesday after a discharge petition received the required 218 signatures last week.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e6db2c74-bd86-40a1-8af1-e77581836273?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Discharge petition succeeded despite GOP leadership opposition:** The petition was signed by all 214 House Democrats plus four Republicans--Reps. Thomas Massie, Nancy Mace, Lauren Boebert, and Marjorie Taylor Greene--"much to Trump's ire," forcing the vote despite GOP leadership's opposition, though the legislation must also pass the Senate and be signed by Trump himself.
* **Epstein emails claim Trump knew about abuse:** Last Wednesday, the House Oversight Committee released over 20,000 pages from Epstein's estate, including emails where the convicted pedophile--who was found dead in his Manhattan jail cell in August 2019--insisted Trump was "fully aware" of his practice of grooming girls as young as 14, writing "of course he knew about the girls as he asked Ghislaine to stop" recruiting victims from Mar-a-Lago's spa.
* **Trump says release will expose Democrats:** The president called the Epstein files a "Democrat Hoax perpetrated by Radical Left Lunatics" to deflect from Republican success, claiming Democrats are using GOP members and urging the party to "get BACK ON POINT" and talk about "Record Setting Achievements," while ordering DOJ and FBI to investigate Epstein's "involvement and relationship with Bill Clinton, Larry Summers, Reid Hoffman, J.P. Morgan, Chase, and many other people."

* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/4787a054-efa7-4cc8-af1d-c4a5198f0abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [[EXPOSED] Bigger than the Epstein Files?](https://substack.com/redirect/4787a054-efa7-4cc8-af1d-c4a5198f0abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4787a054-efa7-4cc8-af1d-c4a5198f0abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
Trump won... But the deep state is alive and well...
And they just scored a HUGE win for Jeffrey Epstein's clients.
After years of hype, the DOJ has officially dropped the Epstein investigation... And let countless unnamed conspirators off the hook. But now the deep state has an even **[bigger target](https://substack.com/redirect/4787a054-efa7-4cc8-af1d-c4a5198f0abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
**[A secret](https://substack.com/redirect/4787a054-efa7-4cc8-af1d-c4a5198f0abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that, if revealed, could cost them hundreds of billions in profit.
RFK Jr and the Trump administration are now perfectly positioned to expose everything... But after what just happened with the Epstein files, we're not taking any chances.
We're taking this opportunity to reveal _**everything**_ in the first in the first 5 minutes of **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/4787a054-efa7-4cc8-af1d-c4a5198f0abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
**[Watch it here now](https://substack.com/redirect/4787a054-efa7-4cc8-af1d-c4a5198f0abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.
[Watch Now](https://substack.com/redirect/4787a054-efa7-4cc8-af1d-c4a5198f0abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. The **[deep state secret](https://substack.com/redirect/4787a054-efa7-4cc8-af1d-c4a5198f0abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** revealed in this video is explosive and may bring down a lot of very powerful people. But it could also save your life. Learn the truth **[here now](https://substack.com/redirect/4787a054-efa7-4cc8-af1d-c4a5198f0abe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while you still can.
* * *
# **Failed Trump assassin Thomas Matthew Crooks had "furry" fetish and "they/them" pronouns on DeviantArt**
Online accounts linked to would-be Trump assassin Thomas Matthew Crooks on the DeviantArt platform under usernames "epicmicrowave" and "theepicmicrowave" **[showed he had a"furry" fetish obsessed with anthropomorphized cartoon characters ](https://substack.com/redirect/95c71757-894d-485e-9ff5-2c6da4c0a079?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**with muscular bodies and sexualized female heads, with his profiles describing him as having "they/them" pronouns.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7650532c-f4fa-4f11-b02d-2e72cd35c1bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Interacted with terrorist-linked account encouraging violence:** Crooks reportedly interacted with an account called "Willy Tepes," uncovered by Tucker Carlson, which encouraged violence and claimed to have been contacted by Russian and American intelligence agencies, with Tepes being a member of the Nordic Resistance Movement that has been designated as a terrorist organization by the U.S. State Department.
* **Extensive digital trail ignored despite red flags:** Despite then-FBI Director Christopher Wray claiming the agency couldn't find online history pointing to Crooks' ideology or motive, sources told the Post that 17 online accounts across multiple platforms documented his "radicalization, violent rhetoric and obsession with political violence" under his real name for over five years, with other users flagging him and mentioning law enforcement, yet "none of this online activity was referenced in the final congressional report released in December 2024."

* * *
# **Bessent confirms $2,000 tariff checks for "working families"**
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent told Fox News Sunday that the proposed $2,000 tariff dividend checks **[would go to"working families" ](https://substack.com/redirect/721c3331-8ed6-41f1-91f9-738556e10858?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**with an income limit, though the administration has not clarified specific income thresholds for eligibility or the total cost of the proposal, with Trump saying last Sunday the dividends would go to "at least" most Americans while using remaining tariff revenue to pay down the $38.12 trillion national debt.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/721c3331-8ed6-41f1-91f9-738556e10858?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Congressional approval required, COVID stimulus precedent cited:** The proposal would need to pass Congress first, similar to the three rounds of COVID-19 stimulus checks, with two rounds under Trump's first term providing full payments to individuals making up to $75,000 and married couples making up to $150,000 annually, while more than 476 million payments totaling $814 billion were distributed across all three pandemic rounds.
* **Tariff revenue insufficient as costs passed to consumers:** The Treasury Department has collected $195 billion from tariff duties through the first three quarters of 2025, while firms have passed on costs from Trump's April tariffs to Americans, who now face an average effective tariff rate of 18 percent--the highest since 1934 according to Yale Budget Lab--with the real median household income in the U.S. at $74,580 as of 2022 per the Census Bureau.

* * *
# **Trump defends Tucker Carlson 's right to interview with Nick Fuentes**
President Donald Trump **[brushed aside concerns](https://substack.com/redirect/7e4d2fd7-bdc2-4284-a275-950567977cd2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Sunday about Tucker Carlson's recent podcast interview with Nick Fuentes, a far-right activist known for antisemitic views, saying "you can't tell him who to interview," while Fuentes responded by posting "Thank you Mr. President!"
[](https://substack.com/redirect/be48cb63-313d-4075-90c3-10199fc684c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Trump destroyed interrupting Bloomberg reporter:** Trump snapped at a reporter for interrupting his answer about Carlson's interview, saying, "Will you let me finish my statement? You are the WORST! I don't know why they even have you!"
* **Heritage Foundation controversy and past Mar-a-Lago dinner:** The Carlson-Fuentes interview roiled the Heritage Foundation, where President Kevin Roberts initially defended Carlson before later denouncing Fuentes' views, while three years ago Trump hosted Fuentes at Mar-a-Lago with rapper Ye (formerly Kanye West), drawing condemnation from Republicans including Mike Pence, who said it was wrong to give "a white nationalist, an antisemite and Holocaust denier, a seat at the table."

I can say with confidence that Tom Malinowski is a genuine public servant. I've had the privilege to see him serve and deliver for New Jersey over the years. | | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016BgLQt1M0_3_yQLJvQHBQ2tnHMFo6Ni3cKuNFDbyuz-bNkIKGMYuIdlYUJmRZ9qnc9KNW5STtGFnXkSwI_958jHkzVHn5Ta-z24iEr7OqQanryyqKAlyFSNsXHcDF_jq3qeFd_9ZQ0pzKSXpUDAq9IRKQpDgvVJVV2896_qWQnTPjeUutA-_MR_5KPAOwITi2Zlfx4N_8ko4csYcad-jKqdsPirA7rg7jTg-tZ5uPIg=&c=ReAFz2E6sXzE4nn03h79l-DUgvCKr7KX-nEYpG56yQ29V_O6zDMcyQ==&ch=tvAB2hfbcyvMt-oqYzTw5HkeJWfgWouoGKmTMGkNuRi4mBNKHjM0ng==)

Peter,
Every time Lauren Boebert makes national headlines, Colorado becomes the punchline.
The scandals. The chaos. The conspiracy theories. The racist halloween costume. The theater incident that made us all cringe. While families here are working two jobs, coaching little league, taking care of aging parents, and trying to make ends meet, their congresswoman is starring in one humiliating spectacle after another.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016BgLQt1M0_3_yQLJvQHBQ2tnHMFo6Ni3cKuNFDbyuz-bNkIKGMYuIdlYUJmRZ9qnc9KNW5STtGFnXkSwI_958jHkzVHn5Ta-z24iEr7OqQanryyqKAlyFSNsXHcDF_jq3qeFd_9ZQ0pzKSXpUDAq9IRKQpDgvVJVV2896_qWQnTPjeUutA-_MR_5KPAOwITi2Zlfx4N_8ko4csYcad-jKqM7s4mRSkH3ruLFrWKS2Z4=&c=ReAFz2E6sXzE4nn03h79l-DUgvCKr7KX-nEYpG56yQ29V_O6zDMcyQ==&ch=tvAB2hfbcyvMt-oqYzTw5HkeJWfgWouoGKmTMGkNuRi4mBNKHjM0ng==)
---
Colorado is a proud state. We work hard. We solve problems. We look out for each other.
But that's not the image Boebert gives the world.
Instead, she gives us dysfunction. She gives us chaos. She gives us extremism and noise and absolutely nothing that helps the people she is supposed to represent.
This is not who we are. This is not what we deserve. And this is not what our future has to look like.
Boebert survived by 546 votes. That's not a mandate. That's a warning -- we can beat her.
In 2024, Trisha Calvarese, Boebert's Democratic opponent, had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district - overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county. Now she's back to finish the job.
Let's restore our dignity and our leadership. Let's elect someone who shows up, listens, and fights for Colorado families.
[Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us end the Boebert era once and for all?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016BgLQt1M0_3_yQLJvQHBQ2tnHMFo6Ni3cKuNFDbyuz-bNkIKGMYuIdlYUJmRZ9qnePH9hdA6qNSP80pype7IhCljvHdRVnR--Pjsv4kvKJI_3QztayhYLOrnsKM6jhM44W-7cmfgaqKezunxHdFDxI4Yh0E2YMrPyrq-LC4ijBUUWc8CQ7yeACgdVsFGOQf_oChvuEtaY4Z9olqsekQHf_psxioQuAyQcLCVnFG-qVXP2-H7tswaQQ==&c=ReAFz2E6sXzE4nn03h79l-DUgvCKr7KX-nEYpG56yQ29V_O6zDMcyQ==&ch=tvAB2hfbcyvMt-oqYzTw5HkeJWfgWouoGKmTMGkNuRi4mBNKHjM0ng==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Every time Lauren Boebert makes national headlines, Colorado becomes the punchline. The scandals. The chaos. The conspiracy theories. The racist halloween costume. The theater incident that made us all cringe. While families here are working two jobs, coaching little league, taking care of aging parents, and trying to make ends meet, their congresswoman is starring in one humiliating spectacle after another. | == Colorado is a proud state. We work hard. We solve problems. We look out for each other. But that's not the image Boebert gives the world. Instead, she gives us dysfunction. She gives us chaos. She gives us extremism and noise and absolutely nothing that helps the people she is supposed to represent. This is not who we are. This is not what we deserve. And this is not what our future has to look like. Boebert survived by 546 votes. That's not a mandate. That's a warning -- we can beat her. In 2024, Trisha Calvarese, Boebert's Democratic opponent, had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district - overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county. Now she's back to finish the job. Let's restore our dignity and our leadership. Let's elect someone who shows up, listens, and fights for Colorado families. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: I'm running for Congress!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111725_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111725_1]
It's official...
I'm running to represent NY-12 in Congress! This is the district where I was born and raised, and the place that five generations of my family have called home.
Hi Peter, I'm Jack Schlossberg, and my grandfather, President Kennedy, is my hero.
In high school, I spent hours watching his speeches. He taught us all that politics isn't about serving yourself — it's about serving others. And that's exactly why I'm running for Congress.
This isn't going to be your average campaign — we’re at the forefront of a movement backed by real people who are ready for a new generation of leadership. I won't be bought or intimidated. Instead, I'll be relying on folks like you. So, if you're willing to be one of the first donors to my campaign, will you split a donation between myself and Real Texas PAC right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111725_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111725_1&amount=25]
I've always been passionate about politics — you can probably gather as much if you've seen any of my social media posts :) I pride myself on my hot (correct!) takes. But public service has always been my driving force. I come from a long legacy of public service, from my great-great-grandparents to my mother, Caroline Kennedy.
I have big shoes to fill. I've known it all my life. But this is even bigger than living up to my family name. This is about serving the people of New York — the city that shaped me into the person I am today.
Right now, our country is in crisis. Donald Trump and his buddies (my cousin RFK Jr. — to name just one) are tanking the economy, attacking free speech, and sowing distrust in decades of scientific research.
We need to revive empathy and effort. I want to be excited and feel hopeful about our future, and I want my fellow New Yorkers to feel the same way. I believe in a politics that works for the people it was intended to serve, and I'm ready to fight for it.
And Peter, I happen to think caring is cool.
None of this will be easy. But in the words of my grandfather, I'm doing this "Not because it is easy but because it is hard."
Together, we can build a new Congress and a New York City that works for everyone. Will you join our movement today by splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and Real Texas PAC ? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111725_1]
Talk soon,
Jack
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-adelita?refcode=111725_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-adelita?refcode=111725_1]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=0lgYtzQptxTDqW9ZZ%2FT8C%2FmMvlNBebuf7NREx0OhQyDdxStBSwGn4PC6bIrMR0w7SzUpANhig7%2BOX8R%2BTX1y9RQ3ItqMojXSuVPkBc9D0Mx8MZU78lX%2FaTy5yB%2BmhOsbSTgmXfvXzWPOIKiQCxfNFNt7B1oNsF%2FpiTJcYv%2Fze%2Ft8IuHDH5ne4kkErGJ5DjZy0agwMwDQMewV0vkhnvrt09L0txs1bJXFr0Z40SmMIRAIVQoInHCp69VZZwSS30OUWttyftuG%2BgLlxuqIymiBcV2AzP3DBr3eMBNVFtWBA0mYI21%2BBExMKCguuMvs2TSLvVFG0mNwSB4IFU1QMbn1Cu9ybpBW5jfypNt8fvdeeqS1OErK%2BvEA0ED4q4v9fgzE7M4hCwnUF0GiL%2Fpn98ppX1ErO2KqmJXZoXttxw%2B42i4%3D .

name: Team Kinter
subject: YES or NO? (Reply back!)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARIALANA KINTER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Should BIG money control our elections?

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kinterforcongress.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f6a723b5c3bc1add1f7a8ca4d&id=c02705cb90&e=d995135712)
| |
## **Reply Yes or No!**
---
| |

**YES OR NO:** Do you think special interest groups and big donors should control our political elections?
**Reply directly to this email with your answer.**
I'm asking because I'm Marialana Kinter, a Navy veteran challenging Republican Congressman Cory Mills in FL-7, and **I am the ONLY candidate in this race refusing all big money and corporate PACs.**
My campaign is 100% grassroots. I use my funds for tangible community results _now_ , from food drives to advocacy, not just ads.
If you want a representative accountable only to you, not special interests, join us.

---
|
---
| |

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: And now his new warning is the most terrifying truth Americans need to hear in 2025.| | | | November 17 | | | | | Dangerous prescriptions, hidden illnesses, ignored warnings. | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
