He was right about: COVID lab origins Microplastics in our bodies FDA corruption And now his new warning is the most terrifying truth Americans need to hear in 2025. Millions are in the crosshairs... If you were born before January 1, 1965 , this threat affects you first. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | | | | 🟡 News >From "American Alternative Assets" | (Sponsored) ---|---

Derek, we just wanted to make sure you saw this message: **2026 Official Democratic Member Cards are on their way, and we need your help choosing a design.** Make sure to pick your favorite design today, and we’ll get to work printing the design with the most votes! **[VOTE](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251117_5288_fr&akid=5288%2E22930333%2ENToYb9)** After you’ve picked the design you like best, make sure to [**make a donation of $7 or whatever makes sense for you to reserve your 2026 Member Card ahead of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?amount=7&refcode=em_20251117_5288_fr&refcode2=5288_22930333_NToYb9&akid=5288%2E22930333%2ENToYb9) Thank you, The Democrats

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Team DNC** <[feedback@act.democrats.org](mailto:feedback@act.democrats.org)>
Date: Sun. Nov 16, 2025
Subject: Help us pick a winner → Derek, as we prepare to close the books on 2025 and gear up for 2026, we’re requesting input from dedicated supporters like you: **We’re getting ready to release our Official 2026 Democratic Member Card, but we need your input on which design you’d like to see.** [**Can you take a few seconds to vote on your favorite member card design? Your input will help inform what this year’s member cards look like:**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251117_5288_fr&akid=5288%2E22930333%2ENToYb9) [](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251117_5288_fr&amount=7&akid=5288%2E22930333%2ENToYb9)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251117_5288_fr&amount=7&akid=5288%2E22930333%2ENToYb9)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251117_5288_fr&amount=7&akid=5288%2E22930333%2ENToYb9)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251117_5288_fr&amount=7&akid=5288%2E22930333%2ENToYb9)
Democrats in every corner of the country will carry their official DNC Member Card with them into the 2026 midterm elections — a reminder that there are millions of us who didn’t vote for Trump’s agenda and aren’t standing idly by while it’s enacted.
This year, we’ve held town halls in all 50 states. We’ve invested in every single Democratic state party. We turned out millions of voters to support Democratic candidates and ballot initiatives, sweeping races nationwide. **And in 2026, we’ll continue building on that momentum as we take back Congress.**
[**So, Derek, as an invaluable part of this team, we know your input is critical. Will you be one of the first supporters to select your favorite member card design?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251117_5288_fr&akid=5288%2E22930333%2ENToYb9)
**[VOTE](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251117_5288_fr&akid=5288%2E22930333%2ENToYb9)**
Thank you for your continued support,
The Democrats

Democrats in every corner of the country will carry their official DNC Member Card with them into the 2026 midterm elections — a reminder that there are millions of us who didn’t vote for Trump’s agenda and aren’t standing idly by while it’s enacted. This year, we’ve held town halls in all 50 states. We’ve invested in every single Democratic state party. We turned out millions of voters to support Democratic candidates and ballot initiatives, sweeping races nationwide. And in 2026, we’ll continue building on that momentum as we take back Congress. Thank you for your continued support, The Democrats P.S. If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. name: Bushra
subject: Does school board = enough experience to run for Congress?
body:
How does experience serving on a school board, an unglamorous and often overlooked position, equate to effective leadership at the federal level?
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TcDwK-aowl6Z4XG3TFe2Is4nK6304UgzA9GIJINnuHTPoB3QwN5jSA-2P7UJoj3Qg7JLeZcQZqF_vaptM1j9XaMTmH8stpfQbhVVyQ_8VO_uapmsIKVdX-KVIzYdRt7L0bKQ2-gPDkhLmzOp-2-yG0WtfXYpZ_Wj0LqB-OaameOiyw0aYgwZAw1VOjswXfnXSBR2PBg11Rf1ozT7WTjhJmphGwFwmM32_bR2w2EwpRo=&c=Y7yA-tDjaw0CyvThPvWeuqOJoQWjQZiLCyiJTPh46ixE-FnyE2mO4A==&ch=2zQIXk2UD_RyHOCMCEPP46kZ9J7GR_ObiGjaS_0wM7TtIHYrtZ1FNA==)
---
|
Hello Peter,
As a 27 year old, when I talk to people about my campaign, one of the first questions I often get asked is do you have enough life experience to run for office?
As the first woman in my generation to win an election to public office, a highly contested school board seat - a role which I've continued to serve in for the past seven years, my response to that question is a resounding yes.
But how does experience serving on a school board, an unglamorous and often overlooked position, equate to effective leadership at the federal level?

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TcDwK-aowl6Z4XG3TFe2Is4nK6304UgzA9GIJINnuHTPoB3QwN5jSA-2P7UJoj3Qg7JLeZcQZqF_vaptM1j9XaMTmH8stpfQbhVVyQ_8VO_uapmsIKVdX-KVIzYdRt7L0bKQ2-gPDkhLmzOp-2-yG0WtfXYpZ_Wj0LqB-OaameOiyw0aYgwZAw1VOjswXfnXSBR2PBg11Rf1ozT7WTjhJtLxl5D_2ia2lPyjlhxFwrY=&c=Y7yA-tDjaw0CyvThPvWeuqOJoQWjQZiLCyiJTPh46ixE-FnyE2mO4A==&ch=2zQIXk2UD_RyHOCMCEPP46kZ9J7GR_ObiGjaS_0wM7TtIHYrtZ1FNA==)
---
Time Magazine featured me on their cover back in 2018 for my historic run. That's me circled on the bottom left.
---
One of the accomplishments I'm most proud of from my tenure on the school board has been ensuring that Jewish and Muslim students in the schools I oversee could receive kosher and halal food options in our district.
I attended the same schools that I presently oversee on my school board and I remember the lack of food options that met my dietary needs growing up. So, upon getting elected to the board of education in 2019, one of my first initiatives was to mandate halal, kosher and vegetarian options in every school I oversaw.
This initiative proved so successful that I was able to advocate for an equivalent at the state level, the Faith by Plate Act, which offers the same accommodations in every state funded facility: schools, prisons and hospitals. I testified in front of the Illinois General Assembly in favor of the bill and my schools were used as a case study to convince legislators of its feasibility. The act was ultimately signed into law by Gov. Pritzker in 2025.
This is a diverse district made up of Jewish, Muslim, Hindu, Catholic, and so many more families, and providing children food they can eat at school is indicative of the coalition building I plan to continue at the federal level.
[As we head into the 2026 midterms, we need Democrats with more than just a D next to their name. To win we need people with proven track records of leadership in their communities. I've fought for IL-09 students for eight years and this district knows I have their back. Can I count on you to make a donation to help us build the campaign we need to win and take this leadership to the federal level? ](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TcDwK-aowl6Z4XG3TFe2Is4nK6304UgzA9GIJINnuHTPoB3QwN5jSA-2P7UJoj3QX6g66oER4_5NHPJzBjA_x4W-b-0ps1B_g9PT3SVXHnMI5tZHzwJp9jqSQZC5hixFeS31aUc6OaXjOrpJti7UBC46O0SdzSCd7ZHWJwPL4P2yRbrH-ZRA8-BZhTzv4Cn-ju7xyUwVkv4zbi3b3e9WEKpo4hXTO59faLb3CQjequsCJX3tKFEaew==&c=Y7yA-tDjaw0CyvThPvWeuqOJoQWjQZiLCyiJTPh46ixE-FnyE2mO4A==&ch=2zQIXk2UD_RyHOCMCEPP46kZ9J7GR_ObiGjaS_0wM7TtIHYrtZ1FNA==)

clean_body: | | | Peter, this is Bart – Lauren Daniel’s dad. I’ve included a picture of me holding Lauren’s first baby – my first grandbaby – to share the blessings I feel every day as a grandfather. Now, that wasn’t an easy decision for my daughter to make . . . After all, she was just when she found out she was pregnant. She felt the Her counselors even told her when she kept her baby. Not only did she graduate high school, she went on to earn her degree from Georgia State and become an elected official in her home state of Georgia. Now watching her fight every day for Georgia’s families – all thanks to the incredible support of patriots like YOU . . . And watching her and Zak today raising their now four beautiful babies – my four beautiful grandbabies . . . But the left-wing media doesn’t feel that way. And neither do the Georgia Democrats. Sadly, they HATE Lauren and everything her accomplishments represent:>>> LIFE in the face of a culture that celebrates abortion without limits>>> FAMILY in the face of a culture that tears us down>>> GOD in the face of a culture that mocks our faith and our Lord In short, And while I know Lauren’s made of stronger stuff than these left-wing radicals . . . The radical Democrats know that if they can take out Lauren in Georgia, they can take out ANYONE who stands up for our Christian faith anywhere in America. Which is another reason I’m counting on your support today, Peter. Because right now, they’re coming after Lauren and her campaign harder than ever. Whatever you can give today – whether that’s $5, $10, $25, $50, or more – every dollar counts.Every dollar will help her hold the line against the WAVE of left-wing cash coming at her . . . name: Voter Action Project
subject: Sign on to stop the SAVE Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
Donald Trump recently pardoned top MAGA allies who aided his bid to subvert the 2020 election , including Rudy Giuliani, Mark Meadows, and dozens of others. This is another dangerous and embarrassing blow to American democracy from a White House dead set on rigging the 2026 midterms.
Trump has stacked his administration with election deniers who back his claim that the 2020 elections were stolen . These Trump loyalists are overseeing the midterms, and they’re dismantling systems meant to secure voting and striking fear into election officials.
Republicans in Congress are backing Trump’s power grab by pushing the SAVE Act — a devastating voter suppression bill that will make it harder for tens of millions of people to cast their ballots.
Send a message to your U.S. Senators: Stop the SAVE Act! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Trump has tried to make mail-in voting illegal and registering to vote extremely difficult . He so-called election monitors to California and New Jersey who could seize ballot boxes and fix the election for him. Governor Gavin Newsom said, “ Deploying these federal forces appears to be an intimidation tactic meant for one thing: Suppress the vote .”
Fueled by the far-right’s propaganda about so-called “non-citizen voting,” the SAVE Act would require people to prove that they’re citizens in order to vote by providing a birth certificate, passport, or naturalization papers. 21 million eligible voters don’t have these documents readily available.
Opponents of voting rights in the U.S. House already jammed the bill through , so we must stop it in the Senate.
Block Trump’s attempts to steal the 2026 midterms, add your name to oppose the SAVE Act today >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111725_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111725_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=KYo5TKlx0xcztAKqojEMV6MNiM11sKp5heHnaNa7KKLqh3C%2Fb1BqpleCdVCa7DQNkGQDMs75saPNeVEJ%2Bm5AWyiss%2BQhthIiiVTlXH1Ypgw8ykRXDK3Oq4demXktnTYSwId8oAlRgggzu%2BrEGaY3QNC8lBzExwJek2H0dHRJyYIpHeAlY8jLktUZcBZeJe4oeO1Qd9ZzkKXtLsrn3qAB3g5w5iqxKzI898PHmY11v2vtPARLIpaqcoD9rSdqzCr%2BP7%2FETTiAL%2FfHsGjuVVCsmC5vDr9MhA37fGlWvkLIIiUlHEBx5GpLuZ5fM1q2vPces%2BnDLrDV5slb0cT3RrsttO5Ja1CN%2B4wiCXwIWyEFHC3FQkJooFORSTG2N0Lhn%2FcbqALX1am2%2Bgc%2BnQpo%2FsA%2FXgXv3QbZEdDLYHxV3PtVcv0%3D .
clean_body: Voter Action Project [] Folks, Donald Trump recently pardoned top MAGA allies who aided his bid to subvert the 2020 election , including Rudy Giuliani, Mark Meadows, and dozens of others. This is another dangerous and embarrassing blow to American democracy from a White House dead set on rigging the 2026 midterms. Trump has stacked his administration with election deniers who back his claim that the 2020 elections were stolen . These Trump loyalists are overseeing the midterms, and they’re dismantling systems meant to secure voting and striking fear into election officials. Republicans in Congress are backing Trump’s power grab by pushing the SAVE Act — a devastating voter suppression bill that will make it harder for tens of millions of people to cast their ballots. Send a message to your U.S. Senators: Stop the SAVE Act! >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Trump has tried to make mail-in voting illegal and registering to vote extremely difficult . He so-called election monitors to California and New Jersey who could seize ballot boxes and fix the election for him. Governor Gavin Newsom said, “ Deploying these federal forces appears to be an intimidation tactic meant for one thing: Suppress the vote .” Fueled by the far-right’s propaganda about so-called “non-citizen voting,” the SAVE Act would require people to prove that they’re citizens in order to vote by providing a birth certificate, passport, or naturalization papers. 21 million eligible voters don’t have these documents readily available. Opponents of voting rights in the U.S. House already jammed the bill through , so we must stop it in the Senate. Block Trump’s attempts to steal the 2026 midterms, add your name to oppose the SAVE Act today >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? name: Tim Walz
subject: My opponents have promised to roll back abortion rights
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
Reproductive freedom is on the ballot next November.
#
Peter,
As Governor of Minnesota, I’ve been an unapologetic champion for reproductive freedom since Day 1. I’m a governor for choice – and that will never change.
**That’s why I’m proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Minnesota, North Dakota, South Dakota Action Fund in this race for reelection.**
[](https://act.timwalz.com/go/145?t=1&akid=108%2E34582%2E72wa89)
After Donald Trump’s far-right justices on the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade and Republicans unleashed a wave of attacks on abortion rights, I signed the Protect Reproductive Options Act and the Protect Access to Contraception Act, codifying access to abortion and expanding insurance coverage for reproductive care in Minnesota.
But this progress is under threat. My far-right opponents have promised to roll back these protections and set our rights back a century if given the chance – so we need your help now to ensure that doesn’t happen.
**[Reproductive freedom is on the ballot next November, and I need your support to stay in office and protect it. Can you chip in any amount today to fuel our people-powered campaign?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251117.Y6X10f&amount=5&refcode=em20251117-108&t=2&akid=108%2E34582%2E72wa89)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251117.Y6X10f&amount=5&refcode=20251117-108&t=21&akid=108%2E34582%2E72wa89)**
I will always stand with you, Peter, and your right to choose.
With gratitude,
Tim

Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more.
**[Now we need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from dragging us backward. Pitch in $5 today to help us win this race and keep moving forward — together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251117-108&t=22&refcode2=108_34582_72wa89&akid=108%2E34582%2E72wa89)**
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251117-108&t=23&refcode2=108_34582_72wa89&akid=108%2E34582%2E72wa89)**
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

# [The Common Thread Between the Epstein Coverup and Trump's Corrupt Pardons](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=179152651&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MTUyNjUxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjMzOTYwMjAsImV4cCI6MTc2NTk4ODAyMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8Fg8rZ5awa_FSYW6U039XJWJspF0kVSpYrqtRzqaMjw)
### Two scandals, one truth.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Nov 17
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=179152651&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MTUyNjUxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MzM5NjAyMCwiZXhwIjoxNzY1OTg4MDIwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GK1irdNlPYV0h4cGmebBkgByiW8BQ_NlqDoRRmL8kG8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=179152651&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MTUyNjUxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjMzOTYwMjAsImV4cCI6MTc2NTk4ODAyMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8Fg8rZ5awa_FSYW6U039XJWJspF0kVSpYrqtRzqaMjw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=179152651&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MTUyNjUxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjMzOTYwMjAsImV4cCI6MTc2NTk4ODAyMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8Fg8rZ5awa_FSYW6U039XJWJspF0kVSpYrqtRzqaMjw)
---
| | [](https://substack..XzKEYoC6NU8seFYUZDdpkhVEFcjDaTwEU_M3EMryXow?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/the-common-thread-between-the-epstein?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/45b188cf-597d-478c-a101-ca5f43473b29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/45b188cf-597d-478c-a101-ca5f43473b29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
I continue to be completely bewildered that the biggest story in the country isn't Donald Trump admitting--on live TV, on _60 Minutes_ , just two weeks ago--that he has no idea who he's pardoning. He said it out loud, and the media just kind of shrugged and moved on.
Now, obviously, this past week we've all been rightly focused on the new Epstein emails--and we should be. That story matters. Two thousand girls and boys were trafficked and abused by a network of powerful, connected predators who have never faced real consequences.
But the thing is--these two stories are essentially the same.
I went to see Scott Galloway and Kara Swisher record their podcast in Chicago last week, and Galloway said something that stuck with me. He said, yeah, he dislikes Donald Trump and everything he stands for--but if one of his kids got in trouble, he knows he could drop a few million dollars and buy access to the president. Essentially buy a pardon.
And that right there is the entire problem.
The pardon power exists for the moments when the justice system fails. It's not supposed to be a goddamn get-out-of-jail-free card for rich people and their kids.
But we've built a justice system that's fundamentally two-tiered--one for the rich and powerful, and one for everyone else. The connected can bend it, break it, and abuse it without consequence. They get away with everything.
Just look at who Trump's pardoned:
* A crypto scammer his sons told him to pardon.
* George Santos.
* Rudy Giuliani, who tried to help him steal an election.
* A Ponzi schemer who, after being pardoned by Trump in 2021, went on to rob people of tens of millions more--and will probably get another one from Trump again.
* Ghislaine Maxwell, sitting in a minimum-security prison, biding her time for the commutation she clearly expects--reportedly enjoying custom meals, private visitation, and a slate of outrageous privileges for helping bury Epstein's trail for Trump.
* Cop beaters from January 6th.
* Drug dealers.
* Sexual abusers.
* The list goes on and on...

And let's be clear: these aren't mercy cases. These are transactions. These are pay-to-play pardons.
And we're all just... sleepwalking through it.
We always ask why a third of the country doesn't even bother engaging with politics. Well--why would they? What's the return on investment? What's the point of showing up if the game is rigged?
Disenfranchisement from civic life is what happens when the people in charge--who swore an oath to uphold the Constitution and rule of law, from both parties--can get away with anything, including abusing and trafficking kids.
What the hell are we doing?
I keep going back to the 2008 financial crisis--because I'm gonna beat that drum until the day I die. One of Obama's biggest mistakes (and I love the man, don't get me wrong) was not holding the people who crashed our economy accountable. They ruined lives--tens of millions of them. People lost their homes, their jobs, their futures. And the people responsible walked away with a goddamn government bailout.
That moment broke something. It told people the system would never work for them. So why vote? Why care? Why not just clock a few extra hours at work or spend time with your family instead of pretending this is a functioning democracy?
And then Democrats come along saying, "We've got to defend democracy, we've got to protect our institutions," as if those institutions haven't already failed huge swaths of the country.
* * *
_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/45b188cf-597d-478c-a101-ca5f43473b29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/45b188cf-597d-478c-a101-ca5f43473b29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
I got asked on _NewsNation_ the other night by Leland Vittert whether the Epstein files actually matter.
I don't know if they matter politically. I doubt the Democrats win any votes by going all-in on Epstein.
But some things transcend partisanship--and the Epstein files are one of those things. The American people will remember who supported transparency and the release of the files. And they will remember who did everything in their power to hide them.
And let's be honest--if those files ever do get fully, transparently released, there are absolutely going to be Democrats in there. And that's fine. I want them out of the party. I want them exposed. I want Republicans exposed too. And independents. Celebrities. Wall Street guys. All the people Epstein kept in his pocket like so many nickels and dimes--(allow me to quote _The Godfather_ for a moment).
This goes beyond politics, beyond left vs. right, blue vs. red.
It's about morality. It's about decency. It's about doing what's right and doing your damn job--that is, actually responding to the will of the American people.
What does it say about this country if we let people off the hook for trafficking kids?
What does it say when the most powerful person in the world--the President of the United States--can cover it up and walk away?
It says we're rotten. That's what it says.
And I'm frustrated. Maybe I'm naive, but I want a system where everyone gets a shot--and everyone gets held accountable fairly. No more of this two-track justice system.
Because I promise you--if you or I did even a fraction of what's in those files, we'd be rotting in prison right now. And rightfully so. And I want the same standard applied to every single one of those sick bastards.
Maybe we're past the point of actual accountability. But the very least we can do is force these people into the light. Make them explain themselves. And if they can't, if they won't--then they should be run out of civil society. Period.
As Democrats--as people trying to rebuild this party from the inside--we've got to earn back trust. And that means proving we have the guts to go after the rot, even when it's on our side: Epstein files, pardons, insider trading in Congress, and everything else.
The Epstein cover-up is just the tip of it. They're the ugliest, most obvious symptom of a much deeper cancer. A system that strips people of their dignity so a handful of corrupt billionaires can squeeze out a few more dollars with virtually no accountability.
We can do better. And we should. And we cannot--**cannot** --let Trump and Bondi and Kash bury this scandal.
Not this time.

But the very least we can do is force these people into the light. Make them explain themselves. And if they can't, if they won't--then they should be run out of civil society. Period. As Democrats--as people trying to rebuild this party from the inside--we've got to earn back trust. And that means proving we have the guts to go after the rot, even when it's on our side: Epstein files, pardons, insider trading in Congress, and everything else. The Epstein cover-up is just the tip of it. They're the ugliest, most obvious symptom of a much deeper cancer. A system that strips people of their dignity so a handful of corrupt billionaires can squeeze out a few more dollars with virtually no accountability. We can do better. And we should. And we cannot--cannot --let Trump and Bondi and Kash bury this scandal. Not this time. Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Mike Nellis 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

The two men who brought Sidney Powell her "holy grail" witness in 2020 are feeding Trump info to justify his Venezuela crusade

# [Trump Got Venezuela Intel from Team Behind 2020 Election-Theft "Witness"](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=179077918&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MDc3OTE4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjMzOTk1MzEsImV4cCI6MTc2NTk5MTUzMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3B4c5nphgExK0dOy9EGsqWYv785PMcyIE_TdTsvUCnk)
### The two men who brought Sidney Powell her "holy grail" witness in 2020 are feeding Trump info to justify his Venezuela crusade
| | [Jonathan Larsen](https://substack.com/@jonathanlarsen) and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)

| Nov 17

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5207731c-2ba5-4601-993c-942b33337849?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
_This guest column[originally appeared](https://substack.com/redirect/60cb28f5-4168-4b2c-b74a-6d87a175ae7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the Substack of journalist Jonathan Larsen, a veteran of ABC, CNN, and MSNBC, who served as executive producer of Up with Chris Hayes. You can check out and subscribe to Jonathan's Substack [here](https://substack.com/redirect/69f50b3d-de74-4249-b4f8-6f6d4aaa454b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._
* * *
_**by[Jonathan Larsen](https://open.substack.com/users/23328754-jonathan-larsen?utm_source=mentions)**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3ee19b0e-1f16-4efb-a913-0bed0f63cc6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Pres. Donald Trump shared debunked election-rigging claims at the Jan. 6, 2021, rally in Washington. (Screengrab / C-SPAN [video](https://substack.com/redirect/8446e14a-7571-4cc6-8e53-ae8c1383f3e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/659fbd38-37ed-4414-9fe5-d0933d5c7955?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When Pres. Donald Trump's election lawyers released "the kraken" in 2020, they supercharged their claims with a mystery witness who said Venezuela rigged the machines. Now, a previously unreported court filing shows that the two men who delivered that witness are feeding intelligence to Trump that's brought the U.S. to the brink of war with Venezuela.
It was their information that was Trump's basis for seeking deportation powers under the Alien Enemies Act. Their narrative provided the premise for Trump asserting the legal right to kill people at sea.
The court filing shows that it was a right-wing Venezuelan expatriate with powerful friends in Washington who first got Trump lawyer Sidney Powell's star witness out of Venezuela. The expatriate's partner, a former CIA operative, then took that witness to Trump's legal team in 2020.
Those same two men have spent the past year feeding info to Trump and his team that's been [refuted](https://substack.com/redirect/5493f2b2-e5bd-473f-97da-b6bfa17b25f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Trump's own intelligence agencies but still drove the U.S. toward war with Venezuela. The claims of their 2020 witness were also refuted almost immediately but still helped seed the ground for Jan. 6 and election denialism that persists to this day.
The two men are former CIA Senior Operations Officer Gary Berntsen and Martin Rodil, who moved from Venezuela to the U.S. more than a quarter century ago and built a network in U.S. intelligence, law enforcement, and politics.
They're the ones who told Trump that Tren de Aragua is a paramilitary force sent by Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro to destabilize the United States. They also claim that Maduro heads a global drug cartel and leads an international conspiracy that's stolen elections in 72 countries.
For years, their work on Venezuela has been secretly bankrolled by another election denier, the former CEO of Overstock.com.
It gets crazier.
* * *
Subscribe for more great content like this.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.fVvMwMMdhcDjst7_HE1F4l_1MyifdUdIr-Sxs10bLF0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=179077918)
* * *
Rodil's court filing shows that his and Berntsen's witness had ulterior motives to implicate the Maduro regime. When the witness got here in 2015, it was his intelligence-sharing with U.S. officials that transformed the Venezuelan regime, in the eyes of American law enforcement, from complicity with drug dealing, to running it.
However, Rodil's statement -- describing an "agenda" behind providing that witness -- didn't come out until 2023, years later. And it's not clear whether U.S. officials, then or now, knew about an internal assessment by STRATFOR, the private intelligence firm, cautioning that Rodil was biased against the regime and his information "needs evaluation."
It's also not clear whether Trump's current intelligence leaders know about Berntsen's and Rodil's 2020 activities, or that Trump's own researchers dismissed their witness's claims.
But Rodil's 2023 legal [filing](https://substack.com/redirect/cddd780b-185a-4b01-961d-d3cd5cbef6b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) completes the chain of custody that brought a Venezuelan military hero from his home country to the 2020 Trump witness list. Trump's legal team brandished his statements to argue that Maduro stole the presidential election, fueling first the legal challenges and then the Jan. 6, 2021, insurrection.
The claim of Venezuelan election-rigging remains a barely concealed subtext of Trump's current campaign against Venezuela. The still-secret legal justification for his maritime boat attacks [reportedly](https://substack.com/redirect/c1785aa2-716f-4fa3-82e6-c8f08564c461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) cites Maduro's ostensible deployment of Tren de Aragua to wage covert war on the U.S., the central allegation pushed by Berntsen and Rodil.
Trump last week issued[ pardons](https://substack.com/redirect/d6ed18e5-a13f-4959-8184-37575a7da568?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to anyone, named or not, involved in efforts to overturn Joe Biden's victory. Trump listed Powell specifically, along with former Trump counsel Rudolph Giuliani, who also dealt with Berntsen and Rodil.
The two men have been tied to questionable political plots before. Rodil is currently wanted in Spain in a case involving efforts to dig up dirt against the progressive party there.
Their role in Trump's current Venezuelan intel has gone virtually unscrutinized if only because Democrats and mainstream media remain largely unaware of it. And because the two men speak mostly to fringe outlets.
Some national-security reporters are tracking their crusade. Seth Hetenna [reported](https://substack.com/redirect/650d3744-54a8-4ec9-b8f1-8c253dd31f72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) new details confirming that Berntsen and his team are briefing members of the Trump administration.
One high-profile Jan. 6 instigator, former Overstock CEO Patrick Byrne, has [bankrolled](https://substack.com/redirect/ee7c9ec3-293c-49a3-93a2-9f6cae92eae8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Berntsen and Rodil for years, claiming the three made 172 international trips seeking evidence and witnesses to the supposed conspiracy. (Byrne [says](https://substack.com/redirect/ee7c9ec3-293c-49a3-93a2-9f6cae92eae8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) he has committed international felonies along the way.)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d1b18fd5-e149-42b5-bde4-bcb741076608?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/53131e6f-b7c4-41ae-aa00-811d3e128364?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f56566b2-a5e8-4ae1-a61a-289166ac0997?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Former CIA official Gary Berntsen, Venezuelan expatriate Martin Rodil, and former Overstock CEO Patrick Byrne
Byrne was part of the notorious Dec. 18, 2020, White House meeting in which he and Powell fed Trump their conspiracy theories.
On Nov. 13, 2020, Powell famously said that her team was going to "release the kraken" with evidence and legal challenges to overturn Biden's victory. Earlier that same day, the Venezuelan witness had videotaped a statement for the legal team.
The witness was a former Venezuelan Navy captain named Leamsy Salazar. His story was internally debunked, almost immediately, by Trump's own researchers. But that debunking didn't become public until well after Jan. 6.
What has remained unclear until now was how Powell got the witness, the "holy grail" of election denial, in the first place.
It started with a corrupt Venezuelan billionaire.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/659fbd38-37ed-4414-9fe5-d0933d5c7955?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
#### **Coming To America**
When questioned by the January 6 committee about her beliefs on election rigging, Powell [said](https://substack.com/redirect/eec8d705-28c1-4310-aa47-3fe6a93e2a1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 2022, that "a witness came forward who had been in Venezuela sitting at Hugo Chavez's right hand for the briefings and discussion of starting it up ... and he saw the votes change on election night to make sure Chavez won."
An Associated Press reporter [speculated](https://substack.com/redirect/ae7ecfc3-4144-449d-b9a9-9f6a0930bfe2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as early as Nov. 19, 2020, that Powell's witness was Salazar, but the evidence was circumstantial. Then, in Powell's 2022 deposition, she was asked, "Mr. Salazar?" Answer: "Yes."
But Salazar hadn't just come forward. He was brought forward. By people with motives.
More than once, billionaire Raul Gorrin had turned to Rodil, persona non grata back in his homeland, for help getting fellow Venezuelans out of the country. Official corruption was rampant, but so were suspicion and rivalries among the nation's elite.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5aa17174-3e68-4af3-bad2-5c6edbb677d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Raul Gorrin appeared in a screengrab of 2017 video posted in an Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) wanted notice. (Screengrab / ICE [photo](https://substack.com/redirect/1fe9337e-340d-45f4-832d-33bbcce7cc6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)
Gorrin, a Venezuelan media mogul, was no fringe figure. A few years later, during the first Trump administration, Gorrin would present himself as a Maduro emissary, [meeting](https://substack.com/redirect/067e9640-b8a3-4a75-82ca-3eac034337f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with Rubio, Sessions, and then-Vice Pres. Mike Pence, even as U.S. investigators zeroed in on him for [money laundering](https://substack.com/redirect/1fe9337e-340d-45f4-832d-33bbcce7cc6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Gorrin was looking to get the Maduro regime out of the jackpot.
But in 2014, Gorrin was gunning for a Venezuelan leader who would soon become one of Maduro's top men.
Typically, Gorrin and others turned to Rodil because someone had good reason to flee the country. A powerful enemy had it in for them, for instance.
It wasn't that getting out was impossible. But with corruption so prevalent, many feared the legal consequences from U.S. prosecutors if they fled. Rodil could help with that.
The typical deal worked like this: A corrupt Venezuelan official wanted out, so they told Rodil what evidence they had about corruption, drugs, or other crimes. In the ideal scenario, Rodil hooked them up with the Drug Enforcement Agency (DEA) or Dept. of Justice (DOJ) and their evidence won them a get-out-of-jail card. They might not even have to forfeit all their assets, ill-gotten or otherwise.
Rodil described this kind of work in his 2023 [filing](https://substack.com/redirect/cddd780b-185a-4b01-961d-d3cd5cbef6b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), sharing details on how he got several people out. One of them was Salazar.
But Salazar wasn't a typical case. Salazar was a tool serving Gorrin's political agenda.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ed2be559-2722-4993-9ac3-7599206f840f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Leamsy Salazar appeared behind Diosdado Cabello, left, and then-President Hugo Chavez. (Uncredited / [Photo](https://substack.com/redirect/73c7200d-f2ed-48c4-8f36-62525184ab5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) via InsightCrime.org.)
Gorrin called Rodil about Salazar in late 2014. Rodil explained in his filing:
> > "Gorrin wanted to know if I could work with Leamsy Salazar regarding potential cooperation with the DEA. ... Gorrin wished to have Leamsy Salazar cooperate with the DEA to provide information regarding the narco-trafficking activities of Diosdado Cabello."
Cabello was a top lieutenant of then-Pres. Chavez. With Chavez's death, Cabello joined Maduro's inner circle.
Why did Gorrin, the billionaire, want Salazar, the military hero, singing to the DEA about Cabello? Rodil explains: "Gorrin's agenda regarding Leamsy Salazar was distinct from his agenda" for getting others out. He wanted Salazar singing because Cabello was Gorrin's "rival."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5f1c600a-d827-4967-9792-1d57350cd9a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Excerpt of May 5, 2023, Rodil statement. (Screengrab / _Antonio Caballero v. FARC et al._ plaintiff [exhibit](https://substack.com/redirect/cddd780b-185a-4b01-961d-d3cd5cbef6b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)
In other words, Gorrin needed Rodil to help him jam up Cabello. Rodil did just that. And by January 2015, Salazar was cooperating with the DEA, elevating Cabello from narco-enabler to druglord.
It's hard to overstate the potential implications of the previously secret machinations behind Salazar's activities here.
There's little doubt that Cabello is one of many corrupt Venezuelan leaders. And he's a central figure in the U.S. case -- legal and public-relations -- against the regime. But while delivering anti-Cabello witnesses to the U.S., Rodil, was also being paid by a billionaire who had it out for Cabello and wanted the DEA's help.
Salazar's 2020 declaration for Powell isn't questionable just because of the agenda behind it. Or just because Gorrin paid Rodil and paid for Salazar's flight from Venezuela.
Testimony in another case suggests that Rodil pushes his dissident clients to give the U.S. government good stuff, juicy stuff, on Venezuelan officials.
In a 2017 [text exchange](https://substack.com/redirect/85fedc77-9259-43c6-a811-2c46c7aef472?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) revealed in that case, Rodil used the Spanish word "gordo," meaning fat. He wrote, "[S]o that the ice creams talk to us again we need to bring something very big to him."
"Helados" is Spanish for ice cream. It's also slang for agents of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) and affiliated agencies, such as, in this case, Homeland Security Investigations (HSI).
If you want to talk to the ice creams, Rodil was saying, you gotta bring the gordo.

---|---|---
Rodil WhatsApp message on Oct. 23, 2017, and the translation entered into evidence in a case involving another Rodil client. (Screengrab / _U.S. v. Claudia Patricia Diaz Guillen_ defense [exhibit](https://substack.com/redirect/85fedc77-9259-43c6-a811-2c46c7aef472?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Rodil said something similar in a book that came out last month, "Stolen Elections," discussing his partnership with Berntsen. The mountain of assets held by their clients, Venezuelan dissidents, meant the partners would make more money the more valuable their clients's evidence was to the U.S. The book explained:
> > The basic concept is that if you provide significant and relevant information to the US that leads to them recovering money earned in the course of a criminal enterprise--like sales of illegal narcotics by the Mexican drug cartels--you, as a whistleblower can apply for a percentage of the money recovered.
So both U.S. officials and Rodil/Berntsen pushed witnesses to serve up something juicy.
By Jan. 5, 2015, Salazar was in Spain, one leg of his journey to the U.S., according to another book, "Boomerang Chavez," produced with Rodil's cooperation. Salazar arrived in Washington, DC, on Jan. 26, 2015. Somehow, [word got out](https://substack.com/redirect/b3cc7e84-7c4b-487a-8cf6-d28be81ecf37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that same night.
A journalist who later reported on Berntsen and Rodil [cited](https://substack.com/redirect/b3cc7e84-7c4b-487a-8cf6-d28be81ecf37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) unnamed sources claiming Salazar was telling investigators that Cabello was the head of the Cartel de los Soles. The Miami Herald [referred](https://substack.com/redirect/b7af08f1-230a-4bfa-bc48-c4d9fdd11d2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to Salazar as America's "star witness" against the regime:
> > Venezuelan military officials have long been accused of helping run drugs under the so-called _Cartel de los Soles_ or the "Cartel of the Suns" -- a reference to military insignia -- but according to the reports, Salazar will make the case that Cabello is at the head of the organization.
It was Salazar's testimony -- not yet tied yet to Gorrin and Rodil -- that helped rewrite Venezuela's narrative from complicity with drug trafficking to running it. Five years later, Salazar would be instrumental in supercharging Trump's election narrative, as well.
