| Earlier this month, Democrats proved that affordability is the number one issue voters are concerned with.

From New Jersey to Virginia, voters sent a clear message that they’re sick and tired of politicians who posture and divide while everyday costs keep climbing. They want leaders who will make life affordable again.

I get it. We’re in an affordability crisis. **That’s exactly why I co-founded the Lowering Costs Caucus.**

By nearly every measure, life for working families is becoming less affordable. Rent, groceries, utilities, and housing costs are all rising. Meanwhile, Donald Trump’s reckless tariffs and Republican tax giveaways to billionaires are squeezing household budgets even tighter.

Our mission in the Lowering Costs Caucus is to:

→ Bring down costs for families – not protect special interests.

→ Expose policies that make life more expensive.

→ Deliver real, measurable relief for working people.

Republicans are doubling down. Trump is raising taxes on the middle class and his extremist allies in Congress are pushing a budget that raises costs. They’ll keep doing it unless we stop them.

[_**As we look ahead to 2026, I’m asking you to help us continue building momentum. Can you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today so we can elect Democrats who will make life more affordable for Michigan families?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119457669/583124483/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-11-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTk3NzE2OC1kN2MzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GeDeCJkxPS-MYXQP8OzcrtYPx4WjF2gXqCMzsDT6Bfo=)

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25?amount=25]

Team,

Democrats incredible and historic wins on Election Day 2025. We saw flips in long-held Republican seats in “Trump country”. Democrats performed well and won in places like Kansas, Mississippi, rural Virginia and rural Pennsylvania, in areas that Trump has carried.

But these candidates didn’t win by chance. They won because after 2024’s stunning defeat, candidates and operatives around the country buckled down and got to work.

And that’s how we win in 2026, by working hard NOW to build infrastructure, and getting out in our communities to connect with voters about how our candidates will improve their lives.

And that’s where you come in. Winning next November means that we have to invest now in our strategies and organizing efforts. Would you make a contribution right now to help us organize our counties and get folks to the polls? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25?amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25?amount=25] Republicans are taking their majority for granted, and are acting like they will never lose.

But if we organize and work the way that the Spanberger, Sherill, Mamdani, and Prop 50 campaigns organized and mobilized over the last year – we will win everywhere. Every race in every district is up for grabs, but it’s on us to take them.

Will you invest right now into our mobilization fund, to help us turn out voters in the most rural, Trump counties in our state? Candidates won in these races in Virginia, Mississippi, and Pennsylvania, and we’re prepared to compete here too. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25?amount=25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.$5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25?express_lane=true&amount=5] $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25?express_lane=true&amount=10] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25?express_lane=true&amount=25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25?express_lane=true&amount=50] $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25?express_lane=true&amount=100] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_nov25]
Thank you,

Dan Kovats

Democrats performed well and won in places like Kansas, Mississippi, rural Virginia and rural Pennsylvania, in areas that Trump has carried. But these candidates didn’t win by chance. They won because after 2024’s stunning defeat, candidates and operatives around the country buckled down and got to work. And that’s how we win in 2026, by working hard NOW to build infrastructure, and getting out in our communities to connect with voters about how our candidates will improve their lives. And that’s where you come in. Winning next November means that we have to invest now in our strategies and organizing efforts. Would you make a contribution right now to help us organize our counties and get folks to the polls? [] DONATE [] Republicans are taking their majority for granted, and are acting like they will never lose. But if we organize and work the way that the Spanberger, Sherill, Mamdani, and Prop 50 campaigns organized and mobilized over the last year – we will win everywhere. Every race in every district is up for grabs, but it’s on us to take them. Will you invest right now into our mobilization fund, to help us turn out voters in the most rural, Trump counties in our state? Candidates won in these races in Virginia, Mississippi, and Pennsylvania, and we’re prepared to compete here too. subject: No Access To Your Savings?
body:
---

---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| Allegiance Gold | [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304dc5ed9f3361b2d0930ab2c76cffb4cc91624ccba193397f8c5c39ef7bbc4c7991cc86b56df9cc6c9aa15b9d47e89fe6ffc9858c815c65401e) | **[Are You Making the #1 RMD Mistake?
](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304dc5ed9f3361b2d0930ab2c76cffb4cc91624ccba193397f8c5c39ef7bbc4c7991cc86b56df9cc6c9aa15b9d47e89fe6ffc9858c815c65401e)**Most retirees take Required Minimum Distributions in cash. That means more taxes for Washington - and **less for you.** But IRS Code 408(m)(3) gives you another option.[**How To Avoid The RMD Trap**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304dc5ed9f3361b2d0930ab2c76cffb4cc91624ccba193397f8c5c39ef7bbc4c7991cc86b56df9cc6c9aa15b9d47e89fe6ffc9858c815c65401e)
---|---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304d8b420747792f18111dabdd7a364a920f633655a97877d578b7a53f9a4b4a84add18690b5ccc82ecaf5f43b8a8dc9a02caf3d4f424810787f) | **[What If The Falling Dollar
Isn't An Accident? ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304d8b420747792f18111dabdd7a364a920f633655a97877d578b7a53f9a4b4a84add18690b5ccc82ecaf5f43b8a8dc9a02caf3d4f424810787f)**
It sounds crazy - but powerful people actually want the **dollar to fall.** Here's how a weaker dollar could benefit them - and hurt Americans with savings and retirement plans. [**Click To See Why**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304d8b420747792f18111dabdd7a364a920f633655a97877d578b7a53f9a4b4a84add18690b5ccc82ecaf5f43b8a8dc9a02caf3d4f424810787f)
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304daa65cf2a80be4cc417db499f1e3e6a9f86cf63da7d18766c3b80c27593ef9cb3f9d14e44943a0a3327ca08337dda88798bd0aeb2d541b0e0) | **[Gold $5,000. Silver $65.
](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304daa65cf2a80be4cc417db499f1e3e6a9f86cf63da7d18766c3b80c27593ef9cb3f9d14e44943a0a3327ca08337dda88798bd0aeb2d541b0e0)**BofA, HSBC & SocGen just raised forecasts to **record highs by 2026** amid rising debt, deficits & rate cuts. They're already positioning before markets react. Why? [
**Get The Full Details**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304daa65cf2a80be4cc417db499f1e3e6a9f86cf63da7d18766c3b80c27593ef9cb3f9d14e44943a0a3327ca08337dda88798bd0aeb2d541b0e0)

* * *
**[Imagine waking up and finding out you have:](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304d67945e1d472886b30734695958d5d74f3a65d51edd530fde201e5aa13ae168169848f3bc5a111e9c2921677d5d5f158258c76c49895442eb)**
* No access to your savings.
* No way to pay bills.
* No way to buy groceries or medicine.

That's not a movie script. It's not a scare tactic. It already happened this year when two U.S. banks collapsed - Pulaski Savings Bank in Illinois and Santa Anna National Bank in Texas. And the FDIC has quietly admitted there are **[63 more banks](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304d67945e1d472886b30734695958d5d74f3a65d51edd530fde201e5aa13ae168169848f3bc5a111e9c2921677d5d5f158258c76c49895442eb)** on its “problem list.” Now, would you believe your bank could be next? Probably not. But here’s the reality: the depositors at Pulaski Bank and Santa Anna believed the same thing... until it was too late. **The Shocking Truth: Banks May Not Be as Safe as You Think**
* **Liquidity is evaporating.** The overnight repo market - Wall Street’s emergency cash valve - has collapsed 91% since 2023. The plumbing of the financial system is running dry.
* **Bond traps are back.** Just like Silicon Valley Bank, institutions are drowning in “safe” bonds that turned toxic when rates shifted.
* **Defaults are rising.** Commercial real estate, credit cards, and small business loans - sparks waiting to ignite a crisis.
* **$57 trillion in derivatives.** JPMorgan alone holds more than the U.S. national debt. Warren Buffett once called derivatives “financial weapons of mass destruction.”

This isn’t stability. It could be a **[recipe for disaster.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304d67945e1d472886b30734695958d5d74f3a65d51edd530fde201e5aa13ae168169848f3bc5a111e9c2921677d5d5f158258c76c49895442eb)** And here’s the part most Americans don’t realize: in the next crisis, **bail-outs are over. Bail-ins are legal.** That means if your bank fails, they can freeze your account... and use **[your deposits](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304d67945e1d472886b30734695958d5d74f3a65d51edd530fde201e5aa13ae168169848f3bc5a111e9c2921677d5d5f158258c76c49895442eb)** to stay alive. And yes, you may say the FDIC exists. But even they admit they may not have the resources to save everyone if multiple banks collapse at once. So when the dominoes fall... who gets rescued first?
* Big banks? Big depositors? Politicians?

And who gets left waiting in line?
* Retirees. Savers. Everyday Americans?

**[What If Your Bank Seizes Up?](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304d67945e1d472886b30734695958d5d74f3a65d51edd530fde201e5aa13ae168169848f3bc5a111e9c2921677d5d5f158258c76c49895442eb)**
* Will you be able to withdraw when you need to?
* Could your retirement accounts be drained by panic selling?
* Will you really recover your “insured” deposits - and if so, how long will it take?

By then, it won’t matter what the Fed or Washington promises. The damage will already be done. Don’t wait until you see “Bank Run” or “Bail-In” scroll across your newsfeed. You will panic - and by then, it’s too late. Smart savers are already **[moving part of their wealth into assets](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304d67945e1d472886b30734695958d5d74f3a65d51edd530fde201e5aa13ae168169848f3bc5a111e9c2921677d5d5f158258c76c49895442eb)** that don’t freeze, don’t default, and don’t depend on Washington’s promises. Gold has no counterparty risk. It cannot be “bailed-in.” And it has outlasted every failed banking system for thousands of years. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1303a7dfa94b304d67945e1d472886b30734695958d5d74f3a65d51edd530fde201e5aa13ae168169848f3bc5a111e9c2921677d5d5f158258c76c49895442eb) **_TO LEARN HOW BANK FAILURES PUT YOU AT RISK -
AND HOW TO PROTECT YOURSELF_** **Because you’ve worked too hard to watch your savings become someone else’s lifeline.**

---

name: American Action News
subject: Thomas Sowell Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
“Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk7e3n17g5bia1l3j6ac9t0ernvnc86lpcujd24g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5i6epr4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbhi925u2tfgoctbp32md48aj0s837lgr0kqinuo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5i6epr4cjh2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkitj4977afpg99ebv8vuguipmlchkjh7at0k008_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5i6epr4cjh2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlt142m3ca88ojccqup43qi3e4bop3nekj7ptv8g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5i6epr4cjh2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7mj1u0uqq202fqkko33bk8ln8vs2kk28f905fr8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5i6epr4cjh2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

name: Lawrence Reed
subject: A troubling milestone for America
body:
Gallup recently released data showing a worrisome trend: a growing positive perception of socialism.
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18830119/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3Yvc1Jqd0gzZmR1Rw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMTc/LbmNsZXpCU3lXZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbHJTR2pwU2xLcGdscw/gaRtaDw/s5r9a7a5a08)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Patriot,

Gallup recently released data showing a worrisome trend: a growing positive perception of socialism.

This news shows us that many people today have a profound misunderstanding of history and human nature.

When people think that socialism means “fairness” or “sharing,” they forget what it really entails: **state control over individual choice, innovation, and opportunity.**

The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has been warning about the dangers and failures of socialism for nearly 80 years. **Our mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society.**

If you’ve never donated to FEE, or if it’s been over a year since your last gift, a member of FEE’s Board will DOUBLE — or even TRIPLE — your donation!
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[To help share these truths, I’d like to send you a digital copy of _Reflections on the Failure of Socialism_ — a powerful book we use to show young people what history has already proven about socialism’s empty promises — when you donate today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
As Max Eastman warns in his book: _“Yearning to do good and obsessed by the power of the state to do it... they are destroying in the name of social welfare the foundations of freedom.”_

At FEE, we know that liberty must be chosen, learned, and lived anew in every generation. This is why sparking curiosity, deepening understanding, and building future advocates for liberty is at the heart of everything we do.

**Through our classroom programs, teacher training, online content, and transformative in-person events, we teach young people the truth!**

We’re showing them that:
* Innovation and voluntary exchange create prosperity for everyone.
* Central planning and government control lead to poverty, stagnation, and oppression.
* Freedom is both a moral and practical necessity for human dignity and opportunity.

One of the tools we use to teach these lessons is _**Reflections on the Failure of Socialism**_. This powerful book shows students, with history and logic, why socialism fails — again and again — and why freedom works. [And I will send you a FREE digital copy of the book when you donate today. As a bonus, your first-time gift will be MATCHED!](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate $35 → $70](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $50 → $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $100 → $200](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $500 → $1,000](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $1,0000 → $3,000](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $1,500 → $4,500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate Any Amount](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Back in the 1980s, long before I became President Emeritus of FEE, I was a young American in Poland, determined to bring the ideas of liberty to those trapped behind the Iron Curtain.

I didn’t just see the failures of socialism firsthand — I lived among them.

I remember seeing fear in people’s eyes — fear of speaking their minds, fear of their own government.

There were empty shelves and full prisons.

**I saw that under socialism, everyone was equal... equally poor, equally powerless, equally oppressed.**

When I finally came home, I made a promise: I would spend the rest of my life teaching others what socialism really means — and why freedom is the only system that allows humanity to flourish.

Because if we don’t equip young people with these truths, they risk repeating these mistakes.

[You can help FEE show young people what history has already proven about socialism’s empty promises by donating today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
In liberty,

Lawrence W. Reed
President Emeritus, Humphreys Family Senior Fellow, and Ron Manners Global Ambassador for Liberty

**P.S.** **LIMITED-TIME MATCH!** If you’ve never donated to FEE — or if it’s been a year since your last gift — a member of FEE’s Board will **MATCH** your donation. Gifts under $1,000 will be **DOUBLED** , and gifts between $1,000-$5,000 will be **TRIPLED**.
[Get Your Donation MATCHED](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

clean_body: Gallup recently released data showing a worrisome trend: a growing positive perception of socialism. | | | | | | | | | | | Patriot, Gallup recently released data showing a worrisome trend: a growing positive perception of socialism. This news shows us that many people today have a profound misunderstanding of history and human nature. When people think that socialism means “fairness” or “sharing,” they forget what it really entails: state control over individual choice, innovation, and opportunity. The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) has been warning about the dangers and failures of socialism for nearly 80 years. Our mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society. If you’ve never donated to FEE, or if it’s been over a year since your last gift, a member of FEE’s Board will DOUBLE — or even TRIPLE — your donation! As Max Eastman warns in his book: “Yearning to do good and obsessed by the power of the state to do it... they are destroying in the name of social welfare the foundations of freedom.” At FEE, we know that liberty must be chosen, learned, and lived anew in every generation. This is why sparking curiosity, deepening understanding, and building future advocates for liberty is at the heart of everything we do. Through our classroom programs, teacher training, online content, and transformative in-person events, we teach young people the truth! We’re showing them that: Innovation and voluntary exchange create prosperity for everyone. Central planning and government control lead to poverty, stagnation, and oppression. Freedom is both a moral and practical necessity for human dignity and opportunity. One of the tools we use to teach these lessons is Reflections on the Failure of Socialism. This powerful book shows students, with history and logic, why socialism fails — again and again — and why freedom works. Back in the 1980s, long before I became President Emeritus of FEE, I was a young American in Poland, determined to bring the ideas of liberty to those trapped behind the Iron Curtain. I didn’t just see the failures of socialism firsthand — I lived among them. I remember seeing fear in people’s eyes — fear of speaking their minds, fear of their own government. There were empty shelves and full prisons. I saw that under socialism, everyone was equal... equally poor, equally powerless, equally oppressed. When I finally came home, I made a promise: I would spend the rest of my life teaching others what socialism really means — and why freedom is the only system that allows humanity to flourish. Because if we don’t equip young people with these truths, they risk repeating these mistakes. In liberty, Lawrence W. Reed President Emeritus, Humphreys Family Senior Fellow, and Ron Manners Global Ambassador for Liberty P.S. LIMITED-TIME MATCH! If you’ve never donated to FEE — or if it’s been a year since your last gift — a member of FEE’s Board will MATCH your donation. Gifts under $1,000 will be DOUBLED , and gifts between $1,000-$5,000 will be TRIPLED. FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law.

If you knew that by giving $10 now, you could guarantee we flip this Senate seat and defeat my opponent, wouldn’t you donate immediately?

If you knew that by giving $10 now, you could help us fight back against misleading attack ads and reach more voters with the truth, wouldn’t you chip in?

If you knew that by giving $10 now, you could make real progress for working people and upend a status quo that only serves billionaires and big corporations, wouldn’t it be the best $10 you ever spent?

I know that $10 doesn’t feel like it can do all of these things and more. But in a race like this, every dollar counts.

**But by the time you get to this point in the email, thousands of folks have already given their $10 – and now, they’re counting on you to do the same.**

With a new poll showing me 1 point ahead of my opponent, we can flip this seat – but not unless we capitalize on our momentum and hit our critical grassroots fundraising goals.

[**So please, friend, will you chip in $10 or more to Lisa Blunt Rochester and me today to help reach our $25,000 goal, power this campaign forward, and win in Ohio?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119460726/583134722/1562090283?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.17_Sherrod-Brown-Nov_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2E2OGY4OS1kZWMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_pw110P_z7I_KWexc7zfMLCHp4t102sy4V1pJYItxfM=)

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

name: No Kings in America! [via VPP]
subject: Sotomayor just asked this CRITICAL question >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need you to take action.
| | Justice Sotomayor just asked the question we’ve ALL been wondering: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96642?t=6&akid=21877%2E878179%2EM3kFA7) _We KNOW_ Trump is the biggest threat to our democracy in American history...

_But we ALSO know_ that if we can’t pass the No Kings Act, we won’t be able to stop Trump from becoming an out-right KING.

**_This is serious._ Trump’s attacks against our Democracy are escalating RAPIDLY. There is only one thing we can immediately do to save our Democracy from authoritarianism, _but we must act fast:_**

[This is urgent. name: Team Lizzie
subject: ICYMI: It’s Official – Lizzie’s running for re-election!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
ICYMI, Lizzie filed her official paperwork to run for re-election to represent TX07!
ADD YOUR ENDORSEMENT TO RE-ELECT LIZZIE! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/-hjjTVK4SUOIt6WfL9cjwA2]
#TeamLizzie is already working to make sure we have the resources necessary to run a winning campaign, to help to turn out voters in Harris County, in Fort Bend County, and across Texas, and to take back the House.
Endorsements
Lizzie has already received endorsements for the 2026 election from several elected officials who represent a broad coalition of people in and around the Seventh Congressional District, and the list is growing!
State Representative Ann Johnson
State Representative Ron Reynolds
State Representative Armando Walle
State Representative Gene Wu
Harris County Commissioner Lesley Briones
Harris County Commissioner Rodney Ellis
Harris County Commissioner Adrian Garcia
Fort Bend County Commissioner Dexter McCoy
Fort Bend County Commissioner Grady Prestage
Harris County Sheriff Ed Gonzales
Fort Bend County Sheriff Eric Fagan
Harris County District Attorney Sean Teare
City of Houston Controller Chris Hollins
City of Houston Council Member Sallie Alcorn
City of Houston Council Member Abbie Kamin
City of Houston Council Member Tiffany Thomas
City of Southside Place Mayor Andy Chan
And she has already earned endorsements from EMILY’s List and the Latino Labor Leadership Council of Southeast Texas as the election cycle gets underway!
ADD YOUR ENDORSEMENT! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/-hjjTVK4SUOIt6WfL9cjwA2]
We know the stakes and we know the road ahead will be challenging. That’s why we must do everything we can to re-elect Lizzie. With our help, Lizzie will do all she can to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, here in Texas and in House races across the country so that Democrats can take back the House and hold the Trump administration accountable.
Thanks,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe2511icymi?refcode=folfe2511icymi]
VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
Date: Tue, Nov 11, 2025
Subject: It’s Official.

This weekend, I filed the official paperwork to run for re-election, and today I got the confirmation that it's all in order. That means my name will be on the ballot for Texas’ Seventh Congressional District again in 2026!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe2511icymi?refcode=folfe2511icymi [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe2511icymi?refcode=folfe2511icymi]
It’s amazing to me that this is already my fifth time putting my name on the ballot for TX07. Back in 2018, people didn’t believe that this district could ever elect a Democrat. It had been more than 50 years, after all. But together we built a broad and diverse coalition to do so, and together, we made history. And we have continued together in the years since, bringing a little more Houston to Washington, D.C.
This year, the stakes could not be higher. Our democracy and our freedom are on the ballot. And so much more—from fighting for access to affordable health care, to ensuring every Texan gets fair representation, to ensuring equality and justice for all—we have so many challenges ahead.
DONATE TO RE-ELECT LIZZIE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe2511icymi?refcode=folfe2511icymi]
We know the path ahead won’t be easy. But we also know what’s possible when we work together. We witnessed it again just last week—and just in time. Our work for 2026 has already begun, and your participation will carry us to victory in 2026 and beyond, helping build a better future for all Americans.
As you know, we’ve kept our campaign office open all year as a hub for organizing, outreach, and community-building in every corner of TX07. Whether it’s making calls, sending postcards, joining a block walk, or contributing money to help us get the message out and mobilize voters—every kind of contribution matters. And they are all essential to winning. And that’s what we do on #TeamLizzie.
Today, I’d be thrilled if you could make a contribution of $20.26 to mark the moment and prepare for the work ahead. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe2511icymi?refcode=folfe2511icymi&amount=20.26]
It’s all on the line in 2026. Let’s get to work!
Together we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe2511icymi?refcode=folfe2511icymi]

VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]
3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yiT4vmtXrUCBvy-D5k60rg2?unsubscribedata=r3vTtKh5UkilqSbH5PFNrG13TWeA9VJzdehZOOlQdkToli0dBFiQdA6xsg1C6k8dTlBz22pz%2FoNAPH4Rm4Xqt517LYZGmPKq055qUpWqiCN8w%2Bctpnn8Tpx6ETFCvuueo6HBwDjJ0xmzb%2BkW5a3eJ4pDoxq4YHWUwcl%2Bmuc%2Fr9Ixs3378cvK0y2voudNwP5dNTYC8bD5DEhP70tb8Hu6eUPKoMXyFYiZPb8pXcynxZeM%2FqvQBgmU01jNHvaCKh%2BCStOw4%2BfIOHcCLcTt0CI2r6cj7yd9fP8a7IWuctBEn4uWGB8VjXJEjSkjTq%2FWDtFpKWKXC8yTz1lZ1siOXMrlq51dWdlxX%2BhSY%2BMhK3gIm3Ha1u9jVWlkmRcouooRpYQYBWRYQS%2Fu3M%2F6wG5u8P3X5sWsC7slTw%2BFwtFs6c26Zw%2F7NDrjOpGomgGjaGDRDYvk www.lizziefletcher.com [https://lizziefletcher.com/]

name: Defend Our Courts
subject: Democratic PA Supreme Court Victory spurs threats of violence
body:
| | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below.
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001TiGr7G8G0an2bTkrhnK17w%3D&ch=374622f4-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&ca=c48b940b-b485-4ac8-8f63-852e5a6c9b47) | [Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001TiGr7G8G0an2bTkrhnK17w%3D&ch=374622f4-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&ca=c48b940b-b485-4ac8-8f63-852e5a6c9b47) | [Constant Contact Data Notice](https://www.constantcontact.com/legal/customer-contact-data-notice)
---
---
| | [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Uyqz-tuQdBR6olEVICdyLbjqDivCa-awgLEfsnTmEHJ2xVa3JDXO6k4zYnDzBaYfabnz6jCVEQHvBfI8IrYSF_zazv4b4BX2yeLzzENWdlrNGJGN7R2FHLxKx1Xqmr_dJ3ji-1vUkXsKaR0xwsoO5ULmrs8TAv0z5ADY7XxR9hsAuoZVNTVJX9zYIGN-x7inOe228Q1QVLMq2tWiTuKB27NP1OwTyogZ&c=MQOZ9lzb8VAMT0G5xRrJR0OBQPimcQWI4Af6PaVFj0c4sf30ICEk6g==&ch=xt-_ZAEYK0d_s6d2JtASkdMl8Q5mbOwUDnqXloSxiHbeeRNjCololg==)
---
| Team,
Following MAGA's blowout defeat in the critical Pennsylvania Supreme Court the right has found themselves in an existential crisis.
At a meeting of the Federalist Society (the far-right organization focused on judicial capture and responsible for the GOP majority on the US Supreme Court), Chad Mizelle, a former Trump DOJ appointee laid out a new approach to winning judicial fights in the aftermath of PA:
Putting down Justices like "stray cats."
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Uyqz-tuQdBR6olEVICdyLbjqDivCa-awgLEfsnTmEHJ2xVa3JDXO6k4zYnDzBaYfabnz6jCVEQHvBfI8IrYSF_zazv4b4BX2yeLzzENWdlrNGJGN7R2FHLxKx1Xqmr_dJ3ji-1vUkXsKaR0xwsoO5ULmrs8TAv0z5ADY7XxR9hsAuoZVNTVJX9zYIGN-x7inOe228Q1QVLMqwyhBBRZg3XhbqzhIY9Vs&c=MQOZ9lzb8VAMT0G5xRrJR0OBQPimcQWI4Af6PaVFj0c4sf30ICEk6g==&ch=xt-_ZAEYK0d_s6d2JtASkdMl8Q5mbOwUDnqXloSxiHbeeRNjCololg==)
---
This is the new strategy that many on the extreme-right, including those in positions of power, are adopting: "If you can't beat em kill em."
Already we've seen this strategy begin to play out. Just last month a South Carolina Supreme Court judge who ruled against Trump had her home burn down in a suspicious massive explosion that many suspected was arson.
The reason why they are resorting to this is because the left is making a comeback in the fight for our nation's courts. On Nov. 4th, Defend our Courts helped orchestrate a landslide victory in PA that will all but guarantee Democratic control for the next decade. It sent a resounding message to MAGA: Don't mess with our courts.
MAGA can't win these judicial fights when voters are educated on the stakes of what right-wing capture of our judiciary entails. They can try to circumvent the voters' will and win through violence but in the long run that strategy will only alienate them with the American people.
These courts are the only thing standing in the way of the full implementation of Trump's agenda and if we can keep up the pressure and keep pulling off victories in supreme court races like we just did in Pennsylvania - we will survive these next three years of Trump and reclaim America.
Winning the fight in PA required going for broke, literally, and we owe tens of thousands of dollars to our hardworking staff. [To move on to the coming judicial fights in MI, AZ, and GA, we need to close the books on PA. Can you please make a donation of $50, $25, or whatever amount is meaningful to you to help us pay our team?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Uyqz-tuQdBR6olEVICdyLbjqDivCa-awgLEfsnTmEHJ2xVa3JDXO6k4zYnDzBaYfabnz6jCVEQHvBfI8IrYSF_zazv4b4BX2yeLzzENWdlrNGJGN7R2FHLxKx1Xqmr_dJ3ji-1vUkXsKaR0xwsoO5ULmrs8TAv0z5ADY7XxR9hsAuoZVNTVJX9zYIGN-x7inOe228Q1QVLMchL4NH63sVTuhMfLvEHb6&c=MQOZ9lzb8VAMT0G5xRrJR0OBQPimcQWI4Af6PaVFj0c4sf30ICEk6g==&ch=xt-_ZAEYK0d_s6d2JtASkdMl8Q5mbOwUDnqXloSxiHbeeRNjCololg==)
---
| | | | | [DONATE $10](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Uyqz-tuQdBR6olEVICdyLbjqDivCa-awgLEfsnTmEHJ2xVa3JDXO6k4zYnDzBaYf4PF1wopoe74_GI0tWQPUoyvm1zhfpiPCdAKbYeXarNyoWgGgSga3kJm-cODI99oFDTAItlyeTvYeMVZgmeLM5vhXtWtzMxjvn-gbrTaQPckwKZAGHTrwUAXgMjedSEwwAtGLCqzPnbk_5LTBI3C62-bF093zAjdteSTerqZX7fU=&c=MQOZ9lzb8VAMT0G5xRrJR0OBQPimcQWI4Af6PaVFj0c4sf30ICEk6g==&ch=xt-_ZAEYK0d_s6d2JtASkdMl8Q5mbOwUDnqXloSxiHbeeRNjCololg==)
---

clean_body: | | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below. | | | | | == | Team, Following MAGA's blowout defeat in the critical Pennsylvania Supreme Court the right has found themselves in an existential crisis. At a meeting of the Federalist Society (the far-right organization focused on judicial capture and responsible for the GOP majority on the US Supreme Court), Chad Mizelle, a former Trump DOJ appointee laid out a new approach to winning judicial fights in the aftermath of PA: Putting down Justices like "stray cats." | == This is the new strategy that many on the extreme-right, including those in positions of power, are adopting: "If you can't beat em kill em." Already we've seen this strategy begin to play out. Just last month a South Carolina Supreme Court judge who ruled against Trump had her home burn down in a suspicious massive explosion that many suspected was arson. The reason why they are resorting to this is because the left is making a comeback in the fight for our nation's courts. On Nov. 4th, Defend our Courts helped orchestrate a landslide victory in PA that will all but guarantee Democratic control for the next decade. It sent a resounding message to MAGA: Don't mess with our courts. MAGA can't win these judicial fights when voters are educated on the stakes of what right-wing capture of our judiciary entails. They can try to circumvent the voters' will and win through violence but in the long run that strategy will only alienate them with the American people. These courts are the only thing standing in the way of the full implementation of Trump's agenda and if we can keep up the pressure and keep pulling off victories in supreme court races like we just did in Pennsylvania - we will survive these next three years of Trump and reclaim America. Winning the fight in PA required going for broke, literally, and we owe tens of thousands of dollars to our hardworking staff. == | | | | | == | == | == | == Thank you for standing beside us in PA and in the battles to come. Team Defend our Courts | == | | == | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | |

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Markets shaking.| | | | November 17 | | | | | We All Saw Trump’s Voice Crack—Here’s Why It Matters | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. Have you ever wondered what you’ll be doing 10 years from now?
For whoever wins this upcoming judicial election, one thing is certain: They’ll be wrapping up their first term on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
That’s right. **Whoever voters elect next April will serve on our state’s highest court for an entire decade.**
That’s why this election matters so much. Its impact extends far beyond a 2-year or even 4-year term.
The outcome of this race will shape our state’s laws and our rights for 10 years.
Reproductive freedom.
Voting rights.
Workers’ rights.
Fair state legislative maps.
All of it is on the line, and Judge Chris Taylor is running because she’s a lifelong advocate for protecting the rights of all people.

name: Sunhee Volz
subject: Tell our lawmakers to protect our environment
body:
https://www.aacfpennsylvania.org [https://www.aacfpennsylvania.org]
Dear Peter,
Have you seen the news? Our lawmakers have finally approved the State budget. The budget contains investments in our schools, our libraries, and in services for our communities — but, there is more that we can fight for. While the state budget meets some needs of our communities now, it also rolls back environmental protections that endanger our future.
What have they cut?
The budget deal withdraws Pennsylvania from the Regional Greenhouse Gas Initiative (RGGI), an effort by 10 Northeastern states to curb greenhouse gases. Leaving the RGGI is a major blow to our efforts to limit pollution.
The budget deal also left out funding for the Home Preservation Program, a bill co-introduced by Senator Nikil Saval to bring back a whole home repair program, and did not include funding for public transit. These cuts set us back from achieving a cleaner and greener Pennsylvania.
We believe that all Pennsylvanians, from city-centers to rural towns, deserve to live in a safe and clean environment. We’re urging our lawmakers to commit to take action in other ways to protect the environment, shift us away from fossil fuels, and embrace clean energy.
SIGN ONTO OUR AGENDA [https://secure.everyaction.com/ZOmr3eWNxkaUIaz3qnfOSg2?contactdata=kyGHvNmIvtaSNTg7ssmZNNZR8JR+H2vAeLhDohABqNKT8GJ0DoeDq42vIMTgspSUtexNHNRoX2sPxRBv1HXE1TFN6qkK2Uer7rdKnOPQGTdsNG/7MrnDL6HCQNg7FuS0ZY/12qxYvQTswBuMIwqgDsO0lWPO0/A/6PMxc6kyzpg=]
In Solidarity,
Sunhee Volz
Environmental Justice Program Manager
Asian American Community Fund of Pennsylvania

# Rampant fraud in SNAP program prompts reapplication decision
The Trump administration ordered all 40 million SNAP food assistance recipients to reapply Monday, launching a sweeping crackdown on rampant fraud after uncovering benefits to 186,000 dead people and $102 million in losses, vowing to restore integrity to the $100 billion program.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2d8c9ec7-550c-4840-b0eb-bdaae0049f14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Massive Fraud Exposed** : USDA data reveals 186,000 deceased recipients, 500,000 multi-state claimants, and over 226,000 bogus approvals, which have fueled a 60% quarterly spike in illicit transactions to $102 million.
* **Aggressive Cleanup Launched** : The USDA already axed 700,000 ineligible participants and nabbed 118 for EBT card scams like skimming, with Secretary Rollins declaring fraud's era "over" to while continuing tp aid truly needy families.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/814f0831-1d4d-4934-b549-f3d870b06b9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **State Data Mandated** : Only 29 mostly Republican-led states have shared recipient info so far, delaying full verification amid nationwide push to curb misuse in high-impact areas like New Mexico and D.C.
* **Spending Surge Scrutinized** : SNAP costs hit $99.8 billion last year--up from $128 billion peaks in 2021--prompting re-eligibility checks across the system

* * *
* * *
**[Together with AMAC](https://substack.com/redirect/0c7e4169-4803-4b8c-a70e-f431275a9c54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# Trump's energy revolution goes nuclear
In a bold pivot reflecting President Donald Trump's deregulatory zeal, Energy Secretary Chris Wright announced Monday that the Department of Energy's Loan Programs Office will **[pour billions into financing](https://substack.com/redirect/77b40911-a8bf-49f8-a4d4-96b26a6c532f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the first new U.S. nuclear power plants, targeting surging electricity demands from AI data centers and reviving a long-dormant industry shackled by red tape.it
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/77b40911-a8bf-49f8-a4d4-96b26a6c532f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Wright Prioritizes Nuclear Financing** : Energy Secretary Chris Wright declared the DOE's Loan Programs Office (LPO) will channel "by far the biggest" funds toward building initial nuclear plants, echoing Trump's executive orders to fast-track deployment.
* **Vogtle Sets Precedent** : During Trump's first term, the office exclusively backed reactors at Georgia's Vogtle plant, now serving as a model for unlocking private equity in high-demand energy projects.
* **AI Surge Drives Demand** : Explosive growth in AI and data centers is spurring billions in creditworthy investments, with LPO debt matching equity 3-to-1 or higher to fuel reactor restarts and new builds.
* **Regulations Face Overhaul** : Trump's agenda targets "stifling" rules that have stalled nuclear innovation, aiming to bolster U.S. energy dominance and national security through accelerated, low-cost power expansion.

* * *
* * *
# Ford rolls on to Amazon in bold new sales plan
In a **[game-changing move,](https://substack.com/redirect/e2fd7e9d-b48c-4c30-b380-759d9847fb6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ford Motor Co. has teamed up with Amazon to let its dealers sell certified pre-owned vehicles online, launching Monday in Los Angeles, Seattle and Dallas--where buyers can finance, sign papers digitally and pick up rides, tapping e-commerce's vast reach amid easing used-car sales laws.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e2fd7e9d-b48c-4c30-b380-759d9847fb6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Strategic Amazon Alliance Forms:** Ford joins Hyundai and Hertz as the latest automaker partnering with Amazon Autos, shifting from new-car restrictions to dealer-led used-vehicle listings for broader digital access.
* **CPO Quality Assurance Shines:** Vehicles undergo rigorous Ford inspections, earning multi-level certifications with warranties up to seven years--plus a 14-day, 1,000-mile money-back guarantee--to build buyer confidence.
* **Phased Dealer Rollout Accelerates:** Over 160 U.S. Ford retailers have signed on, with a dozen now live and 10 more debuting next week, out of 2,900 nationwide to test and scale the platform.
* **Urban Expansion Looms Large:** Initial launches target high-demand markets like L.A., Seattle and Dallas, with rapid growth to other cities poised to disrupt traditional dealership models through Amazon's seamless online ecosystem.

* * *
* * *
# Jeep seeks to recharge sales with new Recon EV SUV
Jeep unveiled its rugged, **[all-electric Recon SUV Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/58cba1ae-7f7f-415b-8641-975ea9980997?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , a Wrangler-inspired SUV aimed at jolting the brand from six years of sales slumps amid fading EV incentives and fierce off-road rivalry, as CEO Bob Broderdorf's blitz cranks up the volume before the Los Angeles Auto Show.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/58cba1ae-7f7f-415b-8641-975ea9980997?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Sales Slump Sparks Revival** : Jeep's U.S. deliveries plunged 40% since its 973,000 2018 peak to less than 590,000 units last year, eroding market share from 5.4% to 3.7%, prompting an aggressive product offensive to reclaim off-road throne.
* **EV Strategy Flexes Hybrids** : The electric Recon joins the Jeep model range, as the lineup pivots to hybrids like the revamped Cherokee amid slowed EV demand and the end of the $7,500 federal tax credits for EVs, targeting 50% EV sales by 2030 with adaptive production.
* **Pricing Pivot To Boost Appeal** : Jeep is aiming to slash costs across its range shedding luxury bloat that has alienated buyers, - the Grand Wagoneer model topped out at in excess of $110,00 in fully loaded trim.
* **Recalls Test Turnaround Grit** : Over 320,000 plug-in hybrid Wrangler and Grand Cherokee units have been recalled for battery fire risks, with December software fixes underscoring ongoing quality battles in Jeep's high-stakes comeback.

* * *
* * *
# Bitcoin's brutal weekend continues in to Monday
**Bitcoin 's $600B Crash Shatters Wall Street Hopes!**
Bitcoin's meteoric rise to $126,000 in October **[evaporated in a stunning $600 billion market plunge](https://substack.com/redirect/65393ac5-4fe8-4e3a-9bdd-5f4dc49b17de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over the weekend, humbling Wall Street bulls who bet on its mainstream legitimacy amid Trump-era tailwinds and ETF inflows, with no clear trigger igniting the swift retreat.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/65393ac5-4fe8-4e3a-9bdd-5f4dc49b17de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **October Peak Vanishes Swiftly** : Bitcoin topped $126,000 last month before a rapid fall erased all of 2025's gains, it stabilized with a modest 2.4% rebound Monday in premarket before resuming its slide amid unexplained volatility and dipping below $93,000.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/175da26a-823f-4d8c-9282-48bf1abac7df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Halving Cycle Fuels Busts** : April 2024's supply-halving event sparked the boom but now echoes historical patterns of miner fueled sell-offs and delayed crashes, complicating recovery.
* **Retail Fear Drives Downside** : Sentiment among everyday investors hits rock bottom, with many preemptively exiting to dodge a potential 50% pullback, amplifying the rout.
* **Experts Eye 2026 Rebound** : Bitwise CIO Matthew Hougan warns of near-term pain but forecasts price surges next year, urging patience despite eroded conviction.

**Bitcoin mining rigs find a new role as spaceheaters**
In a bold fusion of crypto and climate, U.S. entrepreneurs are harnessing waste heat from **[Bitcoin mining rigs to warm homes this winter,](https://substack.com/redirect/5c108de3-7b4e-434b-97e7-eea8b5551819?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** turning energy-guzzling computers into cost-saving heaters amid soaring utility bills and environmental scrutiny.
* **Waste Heat Repurposed** : Bitcoin mining generates 100 TWh of annual heat--enough to warm all of Finland--yet most is discarded, spurring innovations to redirect it for home and business heating.
* **Real-World Savings** : In Idaho, Softwarm rigs offset $25 daily at a car wash and $1,000 monthly for an industrial firm's water tank, matching traditional heating costs while yielding extra Bitcoin revenue.
* **Efficiency Challenges** : Home setups struggle with low mining success rates due to specialized farms, variable electricity prices, and immobile heat, often mirroring standard heaters without guaranteed savings.
* **Scalable Innovations** : Experts envision plug-and-play devices like Bitcoin-warmed water heaters and data center integrations for greenhouses, boosting overall energy efficiency in cold-climate buildings.

* * *
# **Trading scandal ethics report now explains Fed Govs ' rapid August exit **
A U.S. Office of Government Ethics report released Friday revealed that former Federal Reserve Gov. Adriana Kugler **[violated trading rules](https://substack.com/redirect/ab1388ee-2902-4d0a-baed-4d31f3006d39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by buying individual stocks during sensitive blackout periods before key interest-rate meetings, leading to her abrupt resignation in August.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ab1388ee-2902-4d0a-baed-4d31f3006d39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Husband 's Hidden Trades Exposed**: Kugler's spouse, Ignacio Donoso, made unauthorized purchases of Apple and Cava Group shares in 2024 without her knowledge, triggering immediate divestitures and ethics notifications.
* **Waiver Denial Sparks Exit** : Fed Chair Jerome Powell rejected Kugler's request for an ethics waiver on her portfolio, barring her from the July 2025 FOMC meeting and accelerating her departure after just two years.
* **Inspector Probe Looms Large** : The ethics office referred Kugler's case to the Fed's Inspector General for deeper investigation, amid echoes of 2022 reforms banning such trades post-COVID scandals.
* **Trump Ally Fills Void** : President Donald Trump swiftly appointed economist Stephen Miran to Kugler's seat, shifting the board's dynamics while she returned to Georgetown University.

name: Democratically
subject: Trump’s approval sinks to 37%
body:
Poll shows public revolt—working families are feeling Trump’s policies.

[](https://go.m.democratically.org/l/u7onaRKSkH3XCaa2hlnKfqBoKNUakZvtYhfJ8DHhnXI)
Peter,

New polling shows Donald Trump’s approval rating has plummeted to 37%.

40 million Americans faced delayed or reduced SNAP benefits, and food-bank lines continue to be longer than they’ve been in years.

While working families pay the price for MAGA nonsense, Trump’s billionaire donors keep cashing in. This moment matters. We must spread the stories and turn anger into action.

[**Read the poll & impact report**](https://go.m.democratically.org/l/u7onaRKSkH3XCaa2hlnKfh6-XW_6FgyAKJ2BfzR5k9s)

Democratically

712 H St NE Unit #8746 Washington, DC 20002

you subscribed at the Democratically.org website.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Can I be honest with you?

name: Ro Khanna
subject: We just showed Democrats how to defeat Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
I’m going to say something blunt: for the first time ever, we have split the MAGA base, and we did it by doing what Democrats have refused to do for years.
Up to 40 MAGA Republicans are ready to support my Khanna Epstein Transparency Act, even though Donald Trump publicly told them not to. Some are prepared to lose his endorsement over it.
This didn’t happen by accident.
It happened because I’ve spent months:
* going on MAGA-aligned podcasts
* holding town halls in deep-red districts
* building personal relationships with Rep. Massie and even MTG
* treating MAGA voters with respect — not mockery
* making the case for transparency and economic patriotism
Washington didn’t believe this strategy would work. But it’s working.
It’s the most consequential crack in the MAGA coalition in nearly a decade.
And if we can break Trump’s coalition on transparency, we can break it on other issues too and build a broad, durable, cross-partisan governing majority.
But I need your help to keep showing up where Democrats never go.
Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help me keep going on conservative podcasts, holding town halls in Republican districts, and building the coalition we need to defeat extremism? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2026-house-fundraiser?refcode=RK_MS] 👉 CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2026-house-fundraiser?refcode=RK_MS]
I don’t take PAC money. I don’t take lobbyist money. I don’t take corporate money.
My campaign is powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you. Your contribution funds:
* Travel and event logistics to reach communities that beltway insiders ignore.
* Promotion and organizing to bring new people into the movement.
* Security and operations so we can keep doing this safely and sustainably.
Together, we can reshape the political landscape in ways Washington still doesn’t understand.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2026-house-fundraiser?refcode=RK_MS]
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20251104-crypto-resolution&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20251104-crypto-resolution]

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The Supreme Court hearing was telling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Mother Jones: Republican Justices Appear Poised to Destroy What’s Left of the Voting Rights Act [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=111725_2&amount=25]
We'll hand this straight to Mother Jones, Team: " The Supreme Court, with its six-to-three Republican-appointed majority, appears ready to kneecap what remains of the Voting Rights Act’s protections for minority political representation. "
The descriptive language seems harsh, but the objective of these justices seems clear -- a complete dismantling of our seminal civil rights law . We've said it before and will say it again, but it's been clear long before the MAGA movement that Chief Justice Roberts has seen the removal of the VRA as one of his top goals for his time on the Court. It appears he may be on the cusp of succeeding.
During recent oral arguments in Louisiana v. Callais , at least five conservative justices seemed ready to handicap the VRA so that it will no longer stop white majorities from locking racial minorities out of elected office through racial gerrymandering.
The consequences are simple to understand and grave for voter participation. The harder we make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. Needless to say, the less people who participate, the less our democracy and our government looks like the people it's supposed to represent.
Team: We have to spread the word about this case and the consequences of dismantling the Voting Rights Act. Fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=111725_2&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_2&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_2&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=111725_2&amount=35]
At issue in the case is Section 2 of the VRA, which requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. This provision has been used to strike down districting schemes and maps that prevented Black voters and other racial minorities from electing their preferred representatives. Since 1965, Section 2 has given people of color a seat at the table, from school boards to the halls of Congress. It appears this 60-year era is coming to an end.
“ Race is a part of redistricting always ,” Justice Sonia Sotomayor said, addressing the solicitor general from Louisiana, who was arguing against an existing map that had enabled the election of two Black members of Congress in his state. “ What you’re saying to us [is]...‘You can use [race] to help yourself achieve goals that reduce particular groups’ electoral participation, but you can’t use it to remedy that situation .’”
Striking down the last remnants of the Voting Rights Act is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $25 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=111725_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111725_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111725_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=xv5m73dIH6REN7pBKnrqO4ZkdXjUmZVmXL08M02KvP37YNooCvfkpyGbAHSSrP5v6iqEHI2lFF3l38fNKWm%2FqQl4rAyoq0HozVVKBTgnTMRLUEj8EEwT%2BZL%2B8%2FwrdR8lbAsRit7dOp%2B1g4qS51Tc3oA3AH6S%2FXTSzb%2FNbuQumO1Ig7cxxtfNpF6DWk4AEInllMFWrmcsm%2FSHbFvZhXe8DXQhxrSR3dGrfiv7dzsvZzi%2FhahR3%2FunkMzbyVE1KAZk8Qk7dhg%2F%2FQtkdxzkX1C0%2Fsb4f%2BuHkWeJZQWoKLEo4Q8WNRkDA50FI1waS9mLnkwTanEb6U7TkV2MIfOHZVa3Blar3Axx%2FMKj7W8MYoTRGAOT5R0MO8S5AebmqrGLe4ELIch0IRQ6%2FzBWUDXtZDjIwg62Rq6pUHDgk5Cn%2Bl24avA%3D .

name: Team Schrier
subject: What local businesses told Kim about Trump's trade wars:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119466286/583153662/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTU3YjQ3MS1lOWMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ergmAOZM01cvN2kiPeu32sSSmQoI0D09wLwLM0H9Fyo=&emci=dbcb8565-92c1-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ea57b471-e9c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

Kim has been hearing from business owners, trade experts, and community leaders on how President Trump's reckless tariffs are impacting families and employers across Washington.

Washington exports more than almost any other state in the country, which means the president's chaotic trade war hits us especially hard. And business leaders told Kim plainly: **The GOP's tariffs are raising costs, stalling investment, and making it harder to keep good jobs right here in our communities.**

The fallout from Trump's political games aren't just abstract numbers on a spreadsheet. It's hurting our farmers in Ellensburg who are losing overseas buyers, small manufacturers struggling to keep workers on payroll, and families across the WA-08 who are paying more and more for everyday goods.

That's why Kim is fighting every day for real solutions that support our workers, strengthen our small businesses, and keep our district competitive in a global economy. But to keep up this work, she needs you standing with her.

**[We're less than a year out from the midterms, and what we raise now helps Kim prepare for the fight ahead. Can you chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help her continue fighting Trump's reckless policies and keep advocating for Washington families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119466287/583153663/1491818712?refcode=em25_251117_newdem_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251117_newdem_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=ea57b471-e9c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&refcode2=ea57b471-e9c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTU3YjQ3MS1lOWMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ergmAOZM01cvN2kiPeu32sSSmQoI0D09wLwLM0H9Fyo=)**
