name: Connor Miller
subject: Can you help us close the gap before tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
There’s too much at stake to fall short.
#
Hi, it's Connor. I’m the Finance Director for Sarah’s campaign.
I’m proud to work for Sarah. She’s not in this for the headlines or the political points. She’s in this to do the real work. To show up, listen, and fight like hell for Delawareans _every single da_ y.
**Sarah relies on grassroots contributions to sustain this work.** And with the midterms coming up fast, building the resources to run a strong campaign is more important than ever.
But right now, our fundraising isn’t where it needs to be. We set a $23,000 goal by midnight tomorrow to get back on track, and we’re still $16,000 short.
[**If you believe in the work Sarah’s doing in Congress, will you pitch in to help us reach our mid-month goal? I’d love to tell her personally that you stepped up to support her today.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251117-1.Yf1syl&refcode=em20251117-2509&t=1&akid=2509%2E21716%2EKbrWsH)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251117-1.Yf1syl&amount=5&refcode=em20251117-2509&t=2&akid=2509%2E21716%2EKbrWsH)**
Keeping our fundraising on track is essential for Sarah to stay focused on what she was elected to do.
Sarah has been one of the loudest voices in Congress demanding action to protect families and stop Republicans from dismantling health care.
The next few weeks may be the last chance to extend ACA subsidies before it’s too late, and we need to keep Sarah 100% focused on that fight — not on dialing for donations.
But we’re falling behind, and with the holidays coming up, we can’t afford to wait to catch up. That’s why these next 24 hours are so critical.
[**If you’re in a position to do so, will you please consider chipping in before midnight tomorrow? Every dollar makes a difference in helping us close the gap and hit our $23,000 goal.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251117-1.Yf1syl&refcode=em20251117-2509&t=3&akid=2509%2E21716%2EKbrWsH)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251117-1.Yf1syl&amount=5&refcode=em20251117-2509&t=22&akid=2509%2E21716%2EKbrWsH)**
Thank you.
— Connor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251117-1&t=23&refcode2=2509_21716_KbrWsH&akid=2509%2E21716%2EKbrWsH)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=2509%2E21716%2EKbrWsH)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=25&akid=2509%2E21716%2EKbrWsH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2509%2E21716%2EKbrWsH)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Laura Gillen
subject: I’ll be honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
We narrowly won this race in a year that was tough for Democrats and I know that together, we can do it again in 2026.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119466347/583153867/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-11-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjcyYzg4Zi1lOWMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nqxiM8u5MmsswpxH8IJAuqfOmkGsIvWQDxpaNJDf7Os=)
---
| Peter,

This will only take a moment.

I just wanted to thank you for being part of this campaign, and to be honest about where things stand.

We’ve made real progress, but this race is still one of the toughest in the country. Republicans are outraising us, running attack ads and doing everything they can to take this seat back. And as New York’s most vulnerable Democrat I feel that pressure every single day.

Still, I believe in what we’re building together. We narrowly won this race in a year that was tough for Democrats and I know that together, we can do it again in 2026.

clean_body: We narrowly won this race in a year that was tough for Democrats and I know that together, we can do it again in 2026. | = | Peter, This will only take a moment. I just wanted to thank you for being part of this campaign, and to be honest about where things stand. We’ve made real progress, but this race is still one of the toughest in the country. Republicans are outraising us, running attack ads and doing everything they can to take this seat back. And as New York’s most vulnerable Democrat I feel that pressure every single day. Still, I believe in what we’re building together. We narrowly won this race in a year that was tough for Democrats and I know that together, we can do it again in 2026. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for believing in this work, Laura * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

clean_body: Rule 10 of the Authoritarian Playbook is simple: rig the elections. | | | | Rule 10 of the Authoritarian Playbook is simple: rig the elections. Last week, Donald Trump rewarded the people who tried to carry out that vision during his first term. Trump granted pardons to Rudy Giuliani, Mark Meadows, and others involved in the effort to overturn the 2020 election and illegally install Trump as president. This is corruption in broad daylight. It is a direct attack on the rule of law. And it is a warning of exactly what will continue in Trump's presidency: total loyalty to corrupt insiders, zero accountability, and an open campaign to dismantle our democracy. We cannot meet this moment with silence. We must show strength. = = If Trump can erase accountability for an attempted coup with the stroke of a pen, he will do it again. And we already see him plotting for 2028 — he's trying to gain access to state voter rolls to create a national voter database, and is sowing doubt about Vote by Mail, despite its security. He's also pushing state legislatures across the country to draw new congressional maps — diluting Black and Brown voter representation in many cases — to create additional Republican seats in Congress, which could potentially keep the House of Representatives in Republican hands in 2027. Every day, the stakes get higher. The threats get bigger. But so does our resolve. We have beaten back authoritarian power grabs before because grassroots supporters like you refused to look away. Now we need that energy again. = Our democracy only survives when people fight for it. Let's fight. Onward! name: Team Cooper
subject: Roy knows how to win.
body:
We need you with us.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=52%2E124072%2E2iypLf)
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2024?t=6&akid=52%2E124072%2E2iypLf)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=52%2E124072%2E2iypLf)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=52%2E124072%2E2iypLf)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=52%2E124072%2E2iypLf)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=52%2E124072%2E2iypLf)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=52%2E124072%2E2iypLf)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=7&akid=52%2E124072%2E2iypLf)

subject: We’re one step away from a serious national security crisis.

body:
Seize ALL CCP Assets NOW

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTExN182Ry1DRC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTM5OTUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMTdfNkctQ0QuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzUzOTk1LTI4OTkifQ/ByE4qoTpF1gOOJ68eQbItw)Peter,
Go to China and try to buy land.
__See how that works out for you.__
Now, try buying land near their military bases.
**__You’d vanish without a trace.__**
But here in America?
**__China continues to buy land dangerously close to U.S. military facilities.__**
Whoever allowed this has betrayed our country.
It’s time to **SEIZE that land** and shut this down, permanently.
**[Do YOU agree?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTExN182Ry1DRC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTM5OTUtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMTdfNkctQ0QuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzUzOTk1LTI4OTkifQ/MqjhEM1SKvA45fUBtUxymg)**[ VOTE NOW

Stand for America. Act now.
**— Team Downing HQ**| |

Peter,

If Republicans let the ACA tax credits expire, the cost of health insurance will more than double for millions of Americans.

And here in Arizona’s 2nd District, families would be hit harder than anywhere else in the state with _**premium increases as much as 416%.**_

Here’s the truth, Peter:
* Over **100,000** Arizonans could **lose coverage entirely**
* **More than 300,000** would see premiums jump by _**at least 100%**_
* Some families could face more than $2,500 a year in extra costs

**[Sign on now if you agree: Congress MUST take action to protect ACA tax credits before it’s too late.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467043/583156327/7824846?source=EM_NBI_NEZ_20251115_EN_Healthcare_0_3MO_JonathanNez_NA_NA_Healthcare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjE1MjkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NhZDFjMTEtZWRjMy1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VutsTsViJg-Mk1WuGVDpUXhnZDORPj2Aj2vYqbHrUI0=&emci=86269cac-ecc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3cad1c11-edc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=14453474)** | | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467044/583156328/7824846?source=EM_NBI_NEZ_20251115_EN_Healthcare_0_3MO_JonathanNez_NA_NA_Healthcare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjE1MjkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NhZDFjMTEtZWRjMy1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VutsTsViJg-Mk1WuGVDpUXhnZDORPj2Aj2vYqbHrUI0=&emci=86269cac-ecc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3cad1c11-edc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=14453474)

Eli Crane knows what’s at stake — but he’d still rather let these tax credits expire than come to the table and agree on a plan to extend them to protect Arizonans.

**That’s not leadership._That’s politics at its worst._**

While Crane plays games with people’s healthcare, Arizona families are the ones left paying the price.

When I represent AZ-02 in Congress, I’ll always fight to protect access to affordable healthcare — not take it away. Because no family should have to choose between paying their bills and seeing a doctor.

name: AZ Dems
subject: When judges stand up to Trump, Republicans attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467094/583156410/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM0MjZkMzQtZWRjMy1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4SLclTzrMZd1ZrvW_eRTL3ODLRsvMknO_-BuVPSne2E=)
---
Team, **Eli Crane and Andy Biggs just showed us what happens when judges stand up to the Trump administration.** Recently, Texas Rep. Brandon Gill filed articles of impeachment against U.S. District Judge James Boasberg, the chief judge of the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia. Biggs co-sponsored it. Crane publicly declared his support, saying "these radical judges will never stop unless Congress does its job." Let's be clear about what Judge Boasberg actually did: He temporarily blocked Trump's illegal mass deportation of hundreds of Venezuelan migrants. He's ruled against other Trump administration policies that violated the law. In other words, _he did his job as a federal judge — checking executive overreach and protecting constitutional rights._ **Republicans tried impeach him. **[**Well, let’s unseat them.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467095/583156411/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM0MjZkMzQtZWRjMy1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4SLclTzrMZd1ZrvW_eRTL3ODLRsvMknO_-BuVPSne2E=) This is the MAGA playbook: When judges rule against Trump, Crane and Biggs attack the judiciary itself, calling judges "activists" and "radical" for upholding the law. Gill accused Boasberg of "weaponizing the judiciary against critics of the Biden Administration" and committing "high crimes and misdemeanors." **Here's what they're not telling you: Other GOP leaders didn't even support these impeachment efforts.** Iowa Senator Chuck Grassley, chairman of the Senate Judiciary Committee, has said "you can't just impeach a judge just because you disagree with an opinion." California Rep. Darrell Issa said judicial decisions might be "wrong and inappropriate" but still "fall short of high crimes and misdemeanors." Even Chief Justice John Roberts issued a rare statement, saying impeachment is "not an appropriate response" to disagreement with judicial decisions. _But Crane and Biggs don't care._ They pushed forward anyway because they know their extremist base demands it. [**Will you support the Arizona Democratic Party as we defend judicial independence and hold extremists like Crane and Biggs accountable?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467096/583156412/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM0MjZkMzQtZWRjMy1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4SLclTzrMZd1ZrvW_eRTL3ODLRsvMknO_-BuVPSne2E=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467097/583156413/79744751?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM0MjZkMzQtZWRjMy1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4SLclTzrMZd1ZrvW_eRTL3ODLRsvMknO_-BuVPSne2E=)

clean_body: | = Team, Eli Crane and Andy Biggs just showed us what happens when judges stand up to the Trump administration. Recently, Texas Rep. Brandon Gill filed articles of impeachment against U.S. District Judge James Boasberg, the chief judge of the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia. Biggs co-sponsored it. Crane publicly declared his support, saying "these radical judges will never stop unless Congress does its job." Let's be clear about what Judge Boasberg actually did: He temporarily blocked Trump's illegal mass deportation of hundreds of Venezuelan migrants. He's ruled against other Trump administration policies that violated the law. In other words, he did his job as a federal judge — checking executive overreach and protecting constitutional rights. Republicans tried impeach him. = This is the MAGA playbook: When judges rule against Trump, Crane and Biggs attack the judiciary itself, calling judges "activists" and "radical" for upholding the law. Gill accused Boasberg of "weaponizing the judiciary against critics of the Biden Administration" and committing "high crimes and misdemeanors." Here's what they're not telling you: Other GOP leaders didn't even support these impeachment efforts. Iowa Senator Chuck Grassley, chairman of the Senate Judiciary Committee, has said "you can't just impeach a judge just because you disagree with an opinion." California Rep. Darrell Issa said judicial decisions might be "wrong and inappropriate" but still "fall short of high crimes and misdemeanors." Even Chief Justice John Roberts issued a rare statement, saying impeachment is "not an appropriate response" to disagreement with judicial decisions. But Crane and Biggs don't care. They pushed forward anyway because they know their extremist base demands it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Crane and Biggs want judges who will bow to Trump rather than uphold the Constitution. They're willing to tear down one of our democracy's most important guardrails to get their way. Arizona deserves better than representatives who attack judges for doing their jobs. Thanks for standing with us, AZ Dems Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. GREG FREEMAN, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG

Thank you, Derek.

I know the past 10 months of this administration has been difficult for all of us. Yet through it all, this team continues to speak out and push back on Trump’s harmful, dangerous agenda.

I’d like to personally thank you for all that you’ve done – that’s why I asked my team to select a handful of grassroots donors that I can call to extend my gratitude.

**Derek, I hope to see your name on my call list. So will you contribute your first $5 to my reelection campaign before our mid-month deadline? If you do, you might just get a call from me thanking you for your donation.

[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-251113-callcampaign_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467156/583156646/1841968466?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_callresend_251117_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTFlNmY1OS1lZGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OS2_Cz9v4OySSogi5-3L4LIjAXCUj3BuPY0ciTJlc6o=)**

I know I ask for your support frequently, and I hope you know how much I appreciate you being part of this team – whether that’s by chipping in when you can or just reading emails like this one.

I really do feel confident that with supporters like you on my side, we can hold on to this seat and flip the Senate for Democrats.

But right now, we’re staring down an important mid-month deadline, and this morning’s numbers show we’re still coming up short. So, if you can, I’m hoping you’ll chip in to my reelection campaign to help us close the gap.

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 donors we need to give before our deadline? Don’t forget – my team will be selecting a few grassroots donors for me to call personally. I hope to see your name on my list so I can thank you for everything that you’ve done.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467157/583156647/1841968466?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_callresend_251117_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTFlNmY1OS1lZGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OS2_Cz9v4OySSogi5-3L4LIjAXCUj3BuPY0ciTJlc6o=)

Every dollar you give helps us hold this critical seat for Democrats and flip the balance of power in Congress so we can turn the tide on the Trump administration’s incessant chaos, corruption, and incompetence.

Talk soon,

Mark Warner **Before you go:**

Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters.

**And they know that there’s no Senate majority for Democrats without Virginia.**

[_**Will you consider a contribution today as an early investment in the campaign infrastructure we're building to reelect Mark Warner and flip control of Congress? Your donation today will have a much bigger impact than a donation of the same amount made right before the midterm elections.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467158/583156648/1841968466?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_callresend_251117_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTFlNmY1OS1lZGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OS2_Cz9v4OySSogi5-3L4LIjAXCUj3BuPY0ciTJlc6o=)**__********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467159/583156649/1841968466?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_callresend_251117_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTFlNmY1OS1lZGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OS2_Cz9v4OySSogi5-3L4LIjAXCUj3BuPY0ciTJlc6o=)**********

name: Fair Fight
subject: With foxes guarding the henhouse of democracy, our work is even more vital
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
They have no place in public office, and we have to stop them from subverting democracy. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467222/583157134/1793776944?refcode=emm_ff_20251117_T1_ElectionDeniersUpdate_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjNlNzNiMi1lZGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PEWpd6pZYw6LsfQ7XUQyRxr86G-BSRc5-NGzmiQ1lqw=&emci=348de32a-e7c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b23e73b2-edc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1037277)

| | There's no sugarcoating this: The foxes are guarding the henhouse of our democracy. **Twenty-four election deniers now serve in statewide offices overseeing elections in 18 states — ten governors, four secretaries of state, two state elections board members, and eight attorneys general.** Of course, it doesn’t stop there. Another 155 election deniers serve in Congress. The President and Vice President of the United States are election deniers, for crying out loud. And Trump’s appointed a slew of election deniers to election-related offices in the federal government. Election deniers have used their positions of authority to weaken election administration, push dangerous, unfounded claims of voter fraud, and pull out of an effort to ensure accurate voter rolls. These anti-voter extremists have no place in elected office. We’re fighting to elect pro-voter candidates in 2026 and beyond. And no matter how hard some politicians try to suppress the vote, we’ll work even harder to make sure eligible voters have the resources they need to cast their ballots. But this work depends on grassroots support from activists like you. The amount of donations we receive from emails like this one informs how much we can invest in protecting the freedom to vote. [**Can you make a donation of any amount to help defend free and fair elections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467225/583157138/-413138639?refcode=emm_ff_20251117_T1_ElectionDeniersUpdate_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjNlNzNiMi1lZGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PEWpd6pZYw6LsfQ7XUQyRxr86G-BSRc5-NGzmiQ1lqw=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467228/583157141/-413138639?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=emm_ff_20251117_T1_ElectionDeniersUpdate_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjNlNzNiMi1lZGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PEWpd6pZYw6LsfQ7XUQyRxr86G-BSRc5-NGzmiQ1lqw=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119467231/583157144/-413138639?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=emm_ff_20251117_T1_ElectionDeniersUpdate_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjNlNzNiMi1lZGMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PEWpd6pZYw6LsfQ7XUQyRxr86G-BSRc5-NGzmiQ1lqw=)

clean_body: They have no place in public office, and we have to stop them from subverting democracy. | | | There's no sugarcoating this: The foxes are guarding the henhouse of our democracy. Twenty-four election deniers now serve in statewide offices overseeing elections in 18 states — ten governors, four secretaries of state, two state elections board members, and eight attorneys general. Of course, it doesn’t stop there. Another 155 election deniers serve in Congress. The President and Vice President of the United States are election deniers, for crying out loud. And Trump’s appointed a slew of election deniers to election-related offices in the federal government. Election deniers have used their positions of authority to weaken election administration, push dangerous, unfounded claims of voter fraud, and pull out of an effort to ensure accurate voter rolls. These anti-voter extremists have no place in elected office. We’re fighting to elect pro-voter candidates in 2026 and beyond. And no matter how hard some politicians try to suppress the vote, we’ll work even harder to make sure eligible voters have the resources they need to cast their ballots. But this work depends on grassroots support from activists like you. The amount of donations we receive from emails like this one informs how much we can invest in protecting the freedom to vote. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Together, The Fair Fight Team * = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. body:

So national Republicans are doing everything they can to prevent a fair fight.** Donald Trump is demanding that states from Texas to Missouri to Indiana gerrymander their maps to keep Republicans in power. He’s continuing to baselessly attack mail-in voting. And he’s hired some of the most virulent election deniers in the country into his administration. **But make no mistake: if we keep building our grassroots power in Oregon and across the country, there is NOTHING Republicans can do to stop us from staging a MASSIVE comeback in the 2026 midterms. name: Justice Democrats
subject: Every Justice Democrat in Congress supports this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last week, Rep. Rashida Tlaib introduced a resolution to formally
recognize the Israeli government’s genocide in Gaza and push the United
States to meet its legal obligations to prevent and punish it.

Every single Justice Democrat in Congress is signed onto this resolution
as a co-sponsor.

Every corporate incumbent we're primarying this cycle is not.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251117.xbpyjw&refcode=ema20251117-37200&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37200%2E1203867%2EaySghg ]Oprah shrugging

This is exactly why we need to elect more Justice Democrats in next year’s
midterms: it’s time to replace do-nothing Democrats who enable genocide
with bold, working-class leaders who will use their votes in the halls of
power to stop it.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251117.xbpyjw&refcode=em20251117-37200&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37200%2E1203867%2EaySghg ]We’ve endorsed four Democratic primary challengers so far, and more are
on the way. Help us send all of them to Congress to build our progressive
bloc and end this genocide once and for all: pitch in $5 or
more →

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I need you to mark your calendar immediately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Van Epps for Congress
body:
It ALL comes to a head on December 2nd
Protect the House majority
| Peter,
Look, I’m not gonna sugarcoat it – we’re barely clinging to our majority in the House and there's a razor-thin line between forward progress, and watching the radical Left torch everything we fought for...

_**CLOSING Biden's open border.
DE-FANGING the Deep State.
PROTECTING girls' sports.
SHRINKING our massive bureaucracy.
CUTTING taxes for ALL Americans. **_

clean_body: Peter, did you see the news last week? I’m running for re-election in California’s new 41st District. | = | Peter, did you see the news last week? I’m running for re-election in California’s new 41st District. = We are in a critical moment for our country and our democracy. After Proposition 50 passed and redrew California's congressional boundaries, I had a significant decision to make about where to run. Ultimately, this was an easy choice. I would choose home every single time. Our communities aren’t defined by lines on a map. They’re defined by the people who live, work, and raise their families here. As Chair of BOLD PAC, I’m working hard to make sure we have the resources to elect progressive Latinos across the country and flip the House blue. This work is hard and it’s expensive. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Unidos en la lucha, Linda * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez PO BOX 4006 Whittier, CA 90607 United States | = = Congresswoman Linda Sánchez has dedicated her life to improving the community where she grew up and making Southern California a better place to live and work for generations to come. ### PA Statewide Call
Please join our statewide call Tonight, November 17th at 8pm. We're celebrating our wins from this month's elections and planning to make 2026 our biggest year yet. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u2Dt1n837RKwUJg_KtN7MY7q18JSzxr4IIh1PTMDpFPR0is-MT0e84ElB_muC6ZNAQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_november_remind&n=2) Looking forward to seeing you there.
* * *
### Looking for County Leads
There are 67 counties in PA. We're launching a new effort to have dedicated Volunteer Lead in each. This role can be what you make of it. Would you like to contact Forwardists in your area? name: Team Mazie
subject: The numbers speak for themselves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, If you’re wondering why Mazie has been fighting so hard to extend the _Affordable Care Act_ subsidies that are set to expire at the end of the year, take a look at this: A couple in Hawaii earning $98,000 will be forced to pay **_484%_** more next year if the tax credits expire — and families across the country will also face higher costs if Republicans refuse to extend the ACA subsidies. The numbers speak for themselves, Peter. Republicans are creating a health care crisis that will be a disaster for hard-working Americans. **[That’s why Mazie is working as hard as she can to extend the tax credits, but she can’t do it alone. Can you pitch in a donation to support her work and stand with her as she fights to prevent health care costs from skyrocketing for millions of Americans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119469334/583164334/-2048929197?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjhiMTBjOC1mMmMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4OchqClXicsUIgoEYUNAL-ab4Y1DCYjgWA-IZVIemVE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | **[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119469335/583164335/-2048929197?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjhiMTBjOC1mMmMzLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4OchqClXicsUIgoEYUNAL-ab4Y1DCYjgWA-IZVIemVE=)**

The numbers speak for themselves, Peter. | | Hey, it’s been a minute – I hope you’re doing well! On Election Day, Democrats across Virginia showed up, signaling loud and clear that our Commonwealth will not be used as a tool to push Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda.This was a hard-fought race from start to finish. Every door knock, every yard sign, and every single vote mattered. Together, we showed the nation that when Virginians are united and organized, we’re unstoppable. But victory on Election Night wasn’t the finish line — **_it was just the starting point._** We’ve got our work cut out for us. As Attorney General, I’ll fight to protect reproductive rights, defend our democracy, keep our communities safe, and make sure every Virginian has a fair shot at success. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf4i8qetveclbi8399gk24qlp627059g5atl07j0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5h61pb2clh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpcoqpgi10677bpgn5b9t0j7e333cjbipp5904po_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5h61pb2clh2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlon2h4e91fuc2dvaq2or13bel3tk30vg60ogs4o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5h61pb2clh2bs)
---

clean_body: Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Friend, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more...** And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: to catch a predator
subject: Mr. President, why don’t you have a seat 🪑
body:
It’s clear that Trump is desperately hiding something from the American people and we aren’t shocked—he’s a known predator and a serial liar.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oMTO3rgkSmutzih_ckrITvsf7NrtKFgruLMtLpVb5owoKcgA0Lo7dMj7ltUDBFdgUETI72DqAyESR3T1NyaZsVLScwkgVeHeVpvEhpF1ggcdTgpJ8qwGWAcSmdLtQPqRMGzEA2GiMV1WhPZfR8nmF-ddnU8pJmCr702IDAU1k7_FXjW8CsBQ6NetMZtjLdNeu3umB0X8pYCm-JZ7PE8D_KmXcBzP37Bi&c=WlVuIKqQ7Qk5yjBqwijDf2eczjo0mAU9YFy_DC5f3bDLvbxYuOWk4Q==&ch=KFXA5QHuI4OMLfzX1jyPblxs0bdVaMcyHYwjUYm_MzDww7fHewP1qA==)
---
|
Peter,
Donald Trump is on the hottest seat of his life.
Email after email revealed by the House Oversight Committee has confirmed that Donald Trump's ties to human trafficker and pedophile Jeffrey Epstein are closer than Trump has led the American people to believe.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oMTO3rgkSmutzih_ckrITvsf7NrtKFgruLMtLpVb5owoKcgA0Lo7dMj7ltUDBFdgUETI72DqAyESR3T1NyaZsVLScwkgVeHeVpvEhpF1ggcdTgpJ8qwGWAcSmdLtQPqRMGzEA2GiMV1WhPZfR8nmF-ddnU8pJmCr702IDAU1k7_FXjW8CsBQ6NetMZtjLdNeu3umB0X8pYA7_r3wPAbypdIRhNzAFNex&c=WlVuIKqQ7Qk5yjBqwijDf2eczjo0mAU9YFy_DC5f3bDLvbxYuOWk4Q==&ch=KFXA5QHuI4OMLfzX1jyPblxs0bdVaMcyHYwjUYm_MzDww7fHewP1qA==)
---
And the White House is scrambling to conduct a full-blown coverup.
A few days ago, Trump called MAGA Rep. Lauren Boebert to the White House Situation Room to try and strong-arm her into removing her name from a petition that would force a vote to release the Epstein files held by federal authorities.
And Trump is also pulling out all the stops to prevent Epstein's convicted accomplice Ghislaine Maxwell from revealing the truth, moving her to a minimum security prison with less restrictions and allegedly giving her VIP treatment like custom meals and a puppy to play with. That's right, special treatment for a convicted human trafficker.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oMTO3rgkSmutzih_ckrITvsf7NrtKFgruLMtLpVb5owoKcgA0Lo7dMj7ltUDBFdgUETI72DqAyESR3T1NyaZsVLScwkgVeHeVpvEhpF1ggcdTgpJ8qwGWAcSmdLtQPqRMGzEA2GiMV1WhPZfR8nmF-ddnU8pJmCr702IDAU1k7_FXjW8CsBQ6NetMZtjLdNeu3umB0X8pYDhRnKy6IT1ixPJfZdOZRWG&c=WlVuIKqQ7Qk5yjBqwijDf2eczjo0mAU9YFy_DC5f3bDLvbxYuOWk4Q==&ch=KFXA5QHuI4OMLfzX1jyPblxs0bdVaMcyHYwjUYm_MzDww7fHewP1qA==)
---
It's clear that Trump is desperately hiding something from the American people and we aren't shocked--he's a known predator and a serial liar.
And the extent of Trump's involvement in covering up the truth deserves investigating too. Jeffrey Epstein died in a federal prison during his presidency in 2019. Earlier this year, the administration released doctored video footage from the prison Epstein was held in to try and disprove any foul play in Epstein's death.
That's why I am not only calling for the release of the Epstein files, but also for an independent special counsel investigation into the extent of the Trump administration's cover up. We must fairly investigate the circumstances of Epstein's death while in custody.
Chicago is one of America's largest human trafficking hotspots. Combatting human trafficking will be a key issue for me from day one. I will be fighting for victims. clean_body: It’s clear that Trump is desperately hiding something from the American people and we aren’t shocked—he’s a known predator and a serial liar. | | | | | == | Peter, Donald Trump is on the hottest seat of his life. Email after email revealed by the House Oversight Committee has confirmed that Donald Trump's ties to human trafficker and pedophile Jeffrey Epstein are closer than Trump has led the American people to believe. | == And the White House is scrambling to conduct a full-blown coverup. A few days ago, Trump called MAGA Rep. Lauren Boebert to the White House Situation Room to try and strong-arm her into removing her name from a petition that would force a vote to release the Epstein files held by federal authorities. And Trump is also pulling out all the stops to prevent Epstein's convicted accomplice Ghislaine Maxwell from revealing the truth, moving her to a minimum security prison with less restrictions and allegedly giving her VIP treatment like custom meals and a puppy to play with. That's right, special treatment for a convicted human trafficker. | == It's clear that Trump is desperately hiding something from the American people and we aren't shocked--he's a known predator and a serial liar. And the extent of Trump's involvement in covering up the truth deserves investigating too. Jeffrey Epstein died in a federal prison during his presidency in 2019. Earlier this year, the administration released doctored video footage from the prison Epstein was held in to try and disprove any foul play in Epstein's death. That's why I am not only calling for the release of the Epstein files, but also for an independent special counsel investigation into the extent of the Trump administration's cover up. We must fairly investigate the circumstances of Epstein's death while in custody. Chicago is one of America's largest human trafficking hotspots. Combatting human trafficking will be a key issue for me from day one. Hi Peter,

Sorry to bother you on a Monday, but it’s important.

We’ve reached the midpoint of this fundraising quarter, and right now,
we’re 39% to our goal. We have to make up that ground ASAP. Here’s why:

* At the end of each quarter, every campaign’s finances become public.
Pundits and the press will line up our numbers next to our opponents’.
* If the old guard pulls ahead, we’ll default to the uninspiring style
of politics that has cost Democrats election after election — politics
that stand for nothing and maintain the broken status quo.
* But if we meet our fundraising goal and release a finance report that
showcases our strength, we’ll earn more media attention, more
endorsements, and more enthusiasm to fuel our campaign.

That’s why this moment matters. And because Abdul is the only candidate in
this race who’s never taken money from corporate PACs and AIPAC and never
will, he’s counting on us to power this campaign.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251117-1-ak.TwWFfe&amount=10&refcode=em20251117-1290&t=1004&akid=1308%2E251025%2EkEoWLr ]Peter,
pitch in $10 or any amount to help us catch up to our
mid-quarter goal:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251117-1-ak.TwWFfe&amount=10&refcode=em20251117-1290&t=1023&akid=1308%2E251025%2EkEoWLr ]Donate $10 ››

We have an important choice to make.

We can either fight to elect Abdul, the only candidate advocating for
Medicare for All and a government that truly supports working people, or
sit back and let the establishment and would-be oligarchs win.

This is our chance to reshape what the Democratic Party stands for. We
hope you’ll be one of the people to take action today.

Thank you,

Team Abdul

| Peter,
After a landslide victory in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election on Nov. 4th, Defend Our Courts is already getting back to work.
Why?
Because in 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states--Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan.
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B9fDWGG7thRJqoddi88lMqWBrCssDQHZ0hRUZFdsM3ZXK8JPd0T4zojzM_J5gkOClRhckkIADtFehDNDW3BbQC2fmc9zeX9MYg1pddrmVIDnGQR7BJJpTs9CP-K4n-J5ecDP65QP8zaSMTexjDJYidEicwWX8cjMufYkvX4AuZME4c2clK-eTBQHvPQFTg_gsavK1M_zMOloWJui10ieyV8LeW3tHqTc6XPJPW1xKLU=&c=ONfu4gjt5ce2rBMr70g_rMgHQ4tEuIXPL9v3qH4uIqTiDBy6yhPqUA==&ch=PLc99KFtZ7joz-nbzXrIIQvdtGWMhDZW1cuwlnDEVGMBfTbhOt6cxA==)
---
|
The stakes will be the same as PA for these elections--MAGA seizing control of these courts will give them control over election laws in each respective state, allowing them to issue decisions that could suppress Dem votes, and tilt the odds in MAGA's favor in future elections. This would all but make the Democrats path back to the White House impossible in 2028.
So our team is already looking ahead, crunching the numbers and identifying the Democrats that we need to turn out in each of these states to prevent a MAGA takeover.
But we haven't fully turned the page on PA despite our best efforts--we spent every last penny we had to fuel the massive blowout victory on Nov. 4th. We have bills and staff to be paid first before we can go full steam ahead in AZ, GA, and MI.
We know we've asked a lot of you recently, and we wouldn't have had the success we did without your support. But that's also why we are planning to triple down, and take our winning formula to defend three more crucial courts in '26.

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, After a landslide victory in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election on Nov. 4th, Defend Our Courts is already getting back to work. Why? Because in 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states--Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan. | | | | | == | The stakes will be the same as PA for these elections--MAGA seizing control of these courts will give them control over election laws in each respective state, allowing them to issue decisions that could suppress Dem votes, and tilt the odds in MAGA's favor in future elections. This would all but make the Democrats path back to the White House impossible in 2028. So our team is already looking ahead, crunching the numbers and identifying the Democrats that we need to turn out in each of these states to prevent a MAGA takeover. But we haven't fully turned the page on PA despite our best efforts--we spent every last penny we had to fuel the massive blowout victory on Nov. 4th. We have bills and staff to be paid first before we can go full steam ahead in AZ, GA, and MI. We know we've asked a lot of you recently, and we wouldn't have had the success we did without your support. But that's also why we are planning to triple down, and take our winning formula to defend three more crucial courts in '26. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == We truly appreciate all that you do for us and for Democrats everywhere. name: Jordan Wood
subject: my decision, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
I made an incredibly difficult decision that I want to share with you.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td80751d7-da99-4ff8-b9fc-3e46f1451758/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54f28cdf-1706-4d23-81cc-f4f213bee83d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I made an incredibly difficult decision that I want to share with you. It would mean the world to me if you'd read my message until the end. When I decided to run for Senate, it was because I believed -- and still believe -- I have something important to offer: A champion who fights for you as hard as I fight for my own family. But sometimes paths shift, and you have to meet your purpose as it comes. I recently learned the Congressman from my home district is stepping down. This is the place that shaped me, raised me, and gave me my sense of duty. Which is why I've made the difficult decision to step out of this Senate race and refocus my efforts to run for Congress in my hometown, instead. This was not an easy decision. So many of you invested your hopes -- and your hard-earned dollars -- into this Senate campaign. I don't take that lightly for a second. I will never forget how you believed in me. [But this Senate campaign was never about me. It was always about how I could best serve you, my community, and my country. I firmly believe I can have the most impact by picking up the mantle in this House race, and I am humbly asking you to join me by splitting a donation of $15 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action. This is the most competitive seat in the ENTIRE country. Republicans will spend MILLIONS to take it from us. If Democrats don’t hold this seat, our shot to flip the House is nonexistent. It’s that simple. I set an ambitious goal to raise 500 gifts in my first 24 hours to kick this new campaign off in an undeniable position of strength. I can’t tell you how much it would mean to me to see your name as one of my very first donors before midnight. Can I count on you? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06de1fdb-c461-49df-a806-bea79626c120/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2eaff7b-1b4b-45fb-b267-8f7897be042f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
CONTRIBUTION: PENDING
[Suggested Support: $15 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64e9ed8a-89c7-4383-9435-29c000495e2b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
Please allow me to explain why this House race in Maine’s 2nd district is so critical to Democrats’ chances of winning back the House.
* This is the MOST competitive seat in the entire country
* Democrats currently hold it – but Trump won this seat in the last election
* That means he sees it as one of his top pickup opportunities to keep the House red

Make no mistake, Trump and Republicans will spend MILLIONS to take this seat from Democrats. If we don’t hold onto this seat and protect it with everything we have, our chance to flip the House will be as good as gone. I don’t say this lightly. This is my hometown. And I intend to fight for it and ensure Democrats reclaim the House. I need you to fight with me, Peter. I set an ambitious goal to raise 500 donations in my first 24 hours. It would mean so much to me if you’d split a gift of $15 between me and Blue Amp Action to help me start this campaign off in an indisputable position of strength.
---
| | [DONATE $15](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26246afd-38c8-4d09-ba1f-152cf8e3b12a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d1d7c59-3e3e-4327-9e62-4a6e915e069c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07de72a4-acff-4862-82ed-2ea0f448d8ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you,
Jordan Wood
---
|

---
| | |
---
|

| | |

| | | | |
---

---|---
| | |
---
| |
| **Blue Amp Action**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampaction.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250923_senate-take-back_b2_f1_s1_c1_warmup_rs-t0_copy1_copy12?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5cecda08-9966-41c5-b84e-462a68c005a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampaction.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=3612a234-32c7-4ea5-9c00-d8aa6df27536&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampaction.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=3612a234-32c7-4ea5-9c00-d8aa6df27536&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: ✅The runoff races in Spartanburg tomorrow, and the women who can win,
body:
Your support means the world, what comes next?

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/24d0d5f26076/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6422623?e=edbde6c9b1)

|

| | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
| |
# The run off races in Spartanburg tomorrow and the women who can win.
---
|
---
| |
Dr. Octavia Amaechi, a family physician and Chief Medical Officer for Regenesis Healthcare who won 44% of the vote on November 4, is running against Dillon Swayngim, a Developer for Colliers, in a citywide race for Commission of Public Works that carries a six year term. [The race for CPW has taken a turn, and you can read all about it here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d42a44a272&e=edbde6c9b1).
Leslie Rodgers, who previously ran Atlas Organics here in Spartanburg and has a career as a Business and Marketing Director in the Sustainability Industry, is running against Josh Summers, a local Dentist, for the City Council 2 seat vacated by Rob Rain.
**I’m asking today for you to consider supporting Octavia and Leslie, so they can get to the finish line** **tomorrow.**
Both races will be extremely close due to low turnout and additional funds will pay for phone calls to remind voters to get out and vote. If you live in the city limits you can vote for Commissioner of public works at your local polling place, and if you live in Fernwood, Hillbrook, Hillcrest you can vote for Leslie Rodgers for City Council.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [Support Octavia ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6db5817dab&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | [Support Leslie](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8177e40048&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| |
# We didn’t get the result we wanted, what’s next?
---
| |

From the bottom of my heart, I am so grateful for your support, for the opportunity to have run (twice now) to represent my community and for what lies ahead. While my race didn't get the result we wanted we knocked 6,000 doors, made 2,000 calls and had amazing volunteers and community members show up for this race. Please don't lose sight of what we have built in just a few short years.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=26a7377ac9&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |

In 2024, over 20 Democrats ran up and down the ballot in the Upstate, and in Spartanburg where we challenged races, we moved the needle forward. In 2025, Democratically aligned candidates ran across the Upstate to serve their communities. From Greenville, to Travelers Rest, to Reidville, to Greer to Spartanburg, fourteen out of eighteen candidates won their races, two are in a runoff tomorrow, and two of us won over 40% of the vote in conservative districts in Spartanburg.
**This is what progress looks like, and now we must ready for the midterms.**
We collectively had so many wins in so many ways this November, and I hope you'll join me on December 1 as we celebrate the 2025 candidates who stepped up to run (and win!), and meet the 2026 candidates running for statewide office. Let's carry this energy into the New Year. [**Get your tickets here for our event in Spartanburg Monday, December 1**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7db66e95ec&e=edbde6c9b1)**.**
---
| |
# 2026 Candidates in Spartanburg December 1
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3872ceff42&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
Celebrate our 2025 progress and bring that energy right into the 2026 midterms as we host our statewide candidates for US Senate, Governor, Congress and Superintendent of Education on Monday, December 1 in Spartanburg at Mclellan’s Chicken and Fish 1441 Union Street.
---
| [Get Tickets](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=bf3bcae297&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| |

* **Rally at the State House for Reproductive Freedom 2pm Gressette Building**
* **November 18 Run off for Spartanburg municipal elections 7am - 7pm**
* ****[**December 1: SPCDP Statewide Candidate**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f24c0bbffb&e=edbde6c9b1)**M eet & Greet 6pm - 7:30pm **
* **December 18:**[**Rights & Empowerment Art Show Blue Spirit Studio **](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=681b411f32&e=edbde6c9b1)**5-7:30pm**
* [**Upstate artists can submit by November 24 for a show supporting WREN**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=257e5a93f3&e=edbde6c9b1)

|

|
---
| | **CALL & EMAIL YOUR SENATORS ABOUT SENATE BILL 323 **Ban all medication abortion and even its manufacture or possession. Remove exceptions for rape, incest, or fatal fetal anomaly. Redefine embryos as full legal persons, threatening contraception, IVF, and miscarriage care. Impose felony penalties up to 30 years on physicians and medical providers. Criminalize helping someone travel out of state for abortion care. Gag doctors and advocates from sharing accurate medical information — even online.
---
|
---
|
---
| |

# Will the Epstein files bring down Trump?
---
| |

Should it pass the House, it still faces an uncertain future in the Senate, which is under no obligation to even pick up the measure.
It remains unclear whether Senate Majority Leader John Thune will do so - but the Republican is under enormous pressure from both sides of the US political spectrum.He had previously suggested that while he was "not hearing" much desire from fellow Republicans to push for the release of the documents, a successful House vote could change that.
"I just hope John Thune will do the right thing," Kentucky Republican Representative Thomas Massie told ABC News over the weekend.
Another Republican, Senate Majority Whip John Barrasso, only told NBC's "Meet the Press" that the Senate will "take a look" at the bill if it passes the House."We'll see what it says," Barrasso said. "We all want accountability and transparency. But to me, this it not about the truth. It's not about justice."
"This is about an attempt by the Democrats to make President Trump a lame-duck president," he added. "And I'm not going to aid and abet them in their efforts to do that."
[Read More](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=2b1194dc2b&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7d82bd24ac&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
Just before the election I attended the 20th Anniversary of Emerge, the number one organization training Democratic women to run for office (and win). We heard from seven congresswomen about the state of our government and it lit a fire under me like you wouldn’t believe. The South Carolina Chapter of Emerge is accepting applicants for the 2026 Cohort. [You can apply here. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f265c6c879&e=edbde6c9b1)
These past couple of weeks I’ve had my head down helping my friends with their run off races! We’ve been knocking doors nonstop and I hope we’ll see two victories tomorrow night. I went and voted early with our former Mayor Talley last Friday, and my best friend’s mom had her book launch at Blue Moon, order[ Leaving Edgefield ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5a7f0fdb05&e=edbde6c9b1)today!
Democracy is a participatory sport, stay with me y’all.
---

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Ballrooms for billionaires. Nothing for the people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
[1]LeftNet

Families everywhere are struggling to make ends meet. The cost of everyday
life keeps rising while wages remain stagnant. Americans are doing
everything right, and are still falling behind.

And yet, Donald Trump is spending his time demolishing the East Wing of
the White House to make room for his newest personal vanity project: a
$300 million, 90,000-square-foot gilded ballroom.

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/22072?t=1001&akid=1353%2E2118727%2E9QBi4z ]Politico: 'It's your house. And he's destroying it': Trump demolishes
White House East Wing

Let’s be clear: this isn’t restoration. It’s desecration — an insult to
history, to democracy, and to every American who believes the White House
belongs to the people.

Preservation experts were ignored, federal oversight agencies were
bypassed, and centuries of American history were wiped away overnight, all
to make room for Trump’s latest monument to himself.

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/22072?t=1002&akid=1353%2E2118727%2E9QBi4z ]Will you add your name now to send a message that we won’t stand by
while Trump tears down history and erodes our democratic norms?

This is the same authoritarian mindset that’s defined his movement: tear
down what serves the public good, privatize it, and sell access to the
highest bidder.

This isn’t just about a ballroom — it’s about corruption, greed, and
power. Trump is reshaping our democracy in his image, turning the People’s
House into a symbol of everything we’re fighting against.

Staying silent now normalizes this abuse of power. And once that door is
open, it’ll be nearly impossible to close.

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are demanding transparency and
accountability. The People’s House should serve the people, not the
powerful.

Our Squad won’t stand by and let them transform our symbol of democracy
into a monument of greed and corruption. Let’s prove that no tyrant, no
billionaire, and no ego is strong enough to overpower our movement.

We still have a fight to finish, and we need you by our side. [ https://act.leftnet.org/go/22072?t=1003&akid=1353%2E2118727%2E9QBi4z ]Can you
add your name now to make it clear: we won’t stand by while Trump destroys
our history and rewrites our democracy?

ADD YOUR NAME

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress,
The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress,
Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC,
and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.leftnet.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1353%2E2118727%2E9QBi4z

name: Gaza Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Stop the killings in Gaza
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib just introduced a historic resolution to do
what Congress has refused to do for too long: officially recognize
Israel's war on Gaza as an act of genocide.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34694?source=email-20251117&t=1011&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]Headline: As Israel keeps killing Palestinians, Tlaib leads bill
recognizing War on Gaza as Genocide

Our Revolution is proud to stand alongside Rep. Tlaib as an official
co-sponsor of this effort. And now we need to show Congress that the
American public DEMANDS action.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34694?source=email-20251117&t=1012&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]Will you add your name to tell Congress: Israel's war on Gaza is
genocide – pass Tlaib's resolution NOW?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34694?source=email-20251117&t=1013&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]ADD YOUR NAME

The facts are stark. Since October 2023, over 69,000 Palestinians in Gaza
– the vast majority women and children – have been killed by Israeli
airstrikes and ground assaults. Hospitals, schools, and residential
buildings have been reduced to rubble. International organizations like
the UN documented forced starvation, destruction of critical
infrastructure, and deliberate targeting of civilians.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34694?source=email-20251117&t=1014&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]Headline: Gaza death toll tops 69,000 as Israel and Hamas exchange more
remains

These are not accidental tragedies – they are the predictable, preventable
consequences of a war strategy that has put an entire population in the
crosshairs. And it is not over – since the ceasefire took effect last
month, the deaths haven't stopped, with hundreds more being killed in
recent weeks.

“The Israeli government's genocide in Gaza has not ended, and it will not
end until we act,” Tlaib said in a statement Friday. “Since the so-called
'ceasefire' was announced, Israeli forces haven't stopped killing
Palestinians.”

The U.S. government supplies billions every year in military aid to
Israel, and Congressional leaders have enabled and excused these
atrocities. This must end. Passing Tlaib's resolution is not just a
symbolic act – it is a clear demand for accountability and a step toward
stopping the violence.

We CANNOT allow Congress to look away from the facts, to pretend these war
crimes are just tragic accidents, or that U.S. aid comes with no strings
attached. Which is why it's so important we generate a tidal wave of
grassroots support for Tlaib's resolution – so our representatives know
there is a political cost to standing by or making excuses for genocide.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34694?source=email-20251117&t=1015&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]Enough is enough. Add your name now to demand Congress pass Rep.
Tlaib's resolution.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34694?source=email-20251117&t=1016&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251117.nRV522&t=1007&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251117.7HfkOF&t=1008&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251117.UajK7c&t=1009&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251117.BavzIO&t=1010&akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9842%2E5885482%2EKQq2kF

### This is just political theater to preserve unaffordability in desirable towns
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| Nov 17
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)

Connecticut Passes The "Affordable" Housing Law"

November 17, 2025
Where I grew up in rural western Pennsylvania, the value of a house was determined by its structure, maintenance requirements, the number of bedrooms, the number of bathrooms and acreage. But in Connecticut, housing values are determined by three things, "location, location and location."

This results in significant value differences between similar houses depending upon which town the house is located. Thus, there is constant demand for more "affordable housing," but what this really means is affordable housing in desirable towns. There is plenty of affordable housing in Connecticut. For example, you can buy a house in Hartford for close to [$100,000 or a condo for $80,000 ](https://substack.com/redirect/59ab5c26-51a0-4d5f-839d-ca9dccdc9585?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)- easily affordable. But few people want to move to Hartford.
My family has the good fortune of living in Fairfield. The streets are safe; the schools are fine and there is a beachfront on a lake within walking distance. We have pristine beaches that overlook The Sound, two Audubon Society parks for birding, excellent restaurants (although overpriced), the Fairfield Theater Company and a train that gives us access to New York City, Boston and even Washington D.C. It doesn't matter who wins the local elections. The town is run either by Republicans or Democrats who think like Republicans. Fiscal responsibility is the norm.

As I joke with my neighbors, "After Fairfield, there is only heaven."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4fdab0d2-48f9-4edb-9ba5-39d9ebd4de58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

The result is that the average home price in $907,000. $500,000 gives you a shack with an optional roof. Other desirable towns such as Madison, Guilford, Westport, Darien, New Canaan and Greenwich have similar or even higher prices. The rest of Connecticut is on the outside looking in.
In order to force the desirable towns to build more affordable housing, the Connecticut legislature passed [Law 8-30g](https://substack.com/redirect/b3beec5c-d579-47dd-8c8b-61ba3dd637ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) requiring all towns to provide at least 10% of their housing to be affordable. Towns that refused could not use their zoning regulations to stop developers from building housing as long the development was 30% affordable.

This law was a real estate lawyer's dream, resulting in endless litigation but little affordable housing being built. Towns with savvy political leaders such as Fairfield and New Canaan managed to [receive waivers from the law.](https://substack.com/redirect/61db2a85-638f-4ec4-a824-192abcf4652e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thus, the Connecticut Legislature recently passed HB 5002 where liberals prevailed in making it much easier for the state to repeal town zoning laws. But reaction was quick and furious from the wealthier towns and Governor Ned Lamont, eyeing reelection in 2026, vetoed it. The resulting [special session ](https://substack.com/redirect/3ac9765b-f88c-47b3-8876-abd101c7f511?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)weakened the law.

But this does not mean legislators should give up on increasing the stock of desirable housing. The following should be considered:

1\. Allow school vouchers. This has become increasingly popular in other states and allows our poorer citizens to have the same choice as the wealthy. The main factor in housing prices in Connecticut is the school system of the town. I have patients who are gay and have no intention of raising children who have told me they bought their house in a town with a good school system because they know it will preserve its value. Our poorer citizens do not see an increase in housing equity as the wealthy, further accelerating wealth disparity and ill will.
2\. Make the streets safe. At present, crime is not tolerated in wealthy towns and those who are arrested are treated severely. The same does not apply to crime committed in our poorer cities. Allowing carjackers to be freed without bail or career criminals to continue to ply their trade destroys housing values in our inner cities.
3\. Stop the generous subsidies for Section 8 Housing. Section 8 is a well-intentioned plan that allows the state to subsidize the rental income to landlords so that our poor citizens can have place to live. The problem is that these subsidies have become so generous that landlords are buying houses in towns like Bridgeport because they can make a profit renting them out to the poor. This escalates housing prices and pushes the poor out of the market.
4\. Lower property taxes in the cities. Our cities are run by Democrats who have given municipal unions competitive salaries with huge benefits such as outstanding health insurance and generous pensions, even with early retirement. The result, taxes on houses are astronomical. In Hartford, [taxes are 6.90%](https://substack.com/redirect/4de28240-5288-4e58-86b4-66a5a10f3159?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of a house's assessed value whereas in [Darien, it is 1.76%](https://substack.com/redirect/abdeaace-13a9-4364-857d-00ef99e11e66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Thus a house in Hartford assessed at $500,000 has an annual tax of $34,500 whereas a house of the same assessment in Darien is $8,800! This is not only unfair, it is insane.
5\. The Federal Reserve has to stop printing money. Obviously, our state officials can do little about this, but our Congressman and Senators need to speak out on this issue. Flooding our economy with fiat money has resulted not only in unaffordable housing for many, but asset bubbles in gold, silver, the stock market (especially tech stocks) and cryptocurrencies. This will not end well.

High housing prices are forcing people to leave the state while causing ill-will among those who remain. But nothing our legislature is doing will change this. Bold alternatives must be considered.
