Two novels on Fairfield County politics and race relations, [The Lords of Greenwich ](https://substack.com/redirect/2d754fcf-8515-4882-96d6-87beebbac5e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and [Respect.](https://substack.com/redirect/874b383e-c889-4a97-a5dc-b8b407d78468?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Dr. Bentivegna's year in Haiti as a young doctor. [The Neglected and Abused: A Physician's Year in Haiti.](https://substack.com/redirect/5e971d56-6d48-42dd-99f0-e1d6c4b7badc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

And just because it is open and notorious does not make it any better. In the first half of 2025 — just the first six months — the Trump Organization’s income soared to $864 million from $51 million in 2024. That’s a 17-fold increase in the family fortune – and it’s all built on Trump’s corrupt abuse of power for his own financial benefits. Trump is using a White House dinner as a reward for top investors in his crypto company, and he is pardoning criminals who help him grift, as well. Even former Trump officials are sounding the alarm on the most corrupt administration we've ever seen in the United States. Meanwhile, House Republicans are still bending the knee to him in Congress. We need to win back the House for Democrats and elect leaders who will stand up to this corrupt administration. We can’t do it without a Democratic Congress. We’ve got one year to ensure we take back the House to hold Trump accountable for his unprecedented grifting. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Team Stevens
subject: Will you take a moment to sign our card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Speaker Pelosi is a trailblazer. A fighter. An expert legislator.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1342%2E49239%2ED75sdT)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8192?t=2&akid=1342%2E49239%2ED75sdT)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8193?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1342%2E49239%2ED75sdT)
null,

Speaker Nancy Pelosi – the first woman to ever lead the U.S. House of Representatives – recently announced her retirement from Congress.
**[Will you take a moment to sign our card to give a simple but deeply heartfelt t hank-you to Speaker Pelosi?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8193?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1342%2E49239%2ED75sdT)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8193?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1342%2E49239%2ED75sdT)
---
She’s a trailblazer. A fighter. An expert legislator.

She led House Democrats through some of the most consequential battles of our lifetimes – from passing the Affordable Care Act to holding Donald Trump accountable. And she knows what it takes to win tough races and defend democracy.
In 2018, Haley was proud to be part of the class that flipped the House and sent a wave of women and first-time candidates to Washington. That victory was possible because of Nancy Pelosi’s leadership and vision.

Now, Speaker Pelosi is on Team Haley – helping us keep Michigan blue and flip the Senate for Democrats.
And as she closes this chapter of public service, we want to show her just how much appreciation and admiration this grassroots team has for everything she’s done.

**[Will you take a moment to add your name to our thank-you card for Nancy Pelosi?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8193?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1342%2E49239%2ED75sdT)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8193?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1342%2E49239%2ED75sdT)
---
With gratitude,

Team Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8895?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1342%2E49239%2ED75sdT) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8192?t=9&akid=1342%2E49239%2ED75sdT)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=10&akid=1342%2E49239%2ED75sdT)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

body:

---
I won't sugarcoat this, Fellow American.

_I'm in the fight of my life._
The attacks on President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate have been relentless. They're rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country.

**Last quarter, Democrats outraised us by a 4-to-1 margin.** If you look at the numbers of our grassroots support, the gap is even wider.

They outraised us **10 to 1** in small-dollar donations. _Donations from folks just like you._

_We're falling behind._

It will be a bare-knuckle fight to the finish because Montana could determine who controls the Senate Majority. So we cannot afford to let Democrats outwork us. **I'm going to need your help to keep Montana in Republican hands.**

Fellow American, if we want to catch up this month, we need to surpass our November fundraising goal. clean_body: I know you are tired of receiving these emails. | I won't sugarcoat this, Fellow American. I'm in the fight of my life. The attacks on President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate have been relentless. They're rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country. Last quarter, Democrats outraised us by a 4-to-1 margin. If you look at the numbers of our grassroots support, the gap is even wider. They outraised us 10 to 1 in small-dollar donations. Donations from folks just like you. We're falling behind. It will be a bare-knuckle fight to the finish because Montana could determine who controls the Senate Majority. So we cannot afford to let Democrats outwork us. I'm going to need your help to keep Montana in Republican hands. Fellow American, if we want to catch up this month, we need to surpass our November fundraising goal. Right now, halfway through the month, we're not meeting our numbers. You can help us catch up. Please, before midnight tonight. Help however you can. Thanks, Steve Daines PS: I really don't want to keep sending these types of emails. I hope we can catch up to the Democrats' fundraising numbers. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Lauren Babb Tomlinson
subject: I was always told that people like me should wait their turn. So I’m running for Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Our futures are at stake — but together, we can build the change our communities deserve.
| Hi friend, I’m Lauren Babb Tomlinson — a working mom, community healthcare advocate, former union organizer — and today, I’m launching my campaign for Congress in California’s 6th Congressional district.

[**We need a new generation of leadership in Washington — so I’m stepping up to run. And I can’t do it alone. We’re building a winning campaign from the ground up, and early support makes all the difference. Will you be a Founding Donor by splitting $10 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project? Every penny helps.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96653?t=6&akid=21879%2E878179%2ELJdv6V) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lauren Babb Tomlinson and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96654?t=7&akid=21879%2E878179%2ELJdv6V)

[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96655?t=8&akid=21879%2E878179%2ELJdv6V)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96656?t=9&akid=21879%2E878179%2ELJdv6V)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96657?t=10&akid=21879%2E878179%2ELJdv6V)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96653?t=11&akid=21879%2E878179%2ELJdv6V)
I was raised by strong women — my whole life is shaped by it. They taught me that you take care of each other, even when times are tough. They also taught me to fight for the things that you believe in.

Throughout my career, I’ve never been afraid of a tough fight — from protecting reproductive healthcare access in California, expanding access to affordable healthcare, and ensuring that people are treated fairly in the workplace. **It's been my life’s work to fight for our rights.**

So while the Trump Administration continuously attacks reproductive freedoms and healthcare for millions of Californians, I’ve helped lead the efforts at Planned Parenthood to provide lifesaving medical care to thousands.

This is the new leadership we need — leadership that’s not afraid to fight. Leadership that’s not afraid to stand up to bullies. Leadership that knows what it’s like for a working family who are facing rising costs.

**For me, it’s simple: my family always comes first. And I’m running for Congress to fight for families across our country like they’re my own to make life affordable, expand access to quality healthcare, improve wages for workers, and protect our rights.**

[**It’s time for change. That’s why today, I’m announcing my run for Congress. And I’m hoping I can count on your support. Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96653?t=12&akid=21879%2E878179%2ELJdv6V)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96653?t=17&akid=21879%2E878179%2ELJdv6V)
In solidarity,

_Lauren Babb Tomlinson_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21879%2E878179%2ELJdv6V). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21879%2E878179%2ELJdv6V).**

name: GIFFORDS
subject: 2025 Gun Safety Survey enclosed for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We want to hear from you to help us shape our priorities.
#

Friends —
While we have made strides towards a future free from gun violence, we’re still in the midst of an epidemic. We are the only developed country in the world that has mass shootings on a regular basis, and there is clearly so much more work to do.
As we write this, House Republicans are preparing to pass a bill for a national concealed carry mandate. If passed, this would force states to allow people to carry hidden, loaded guns anywhere, without meeting state or local safety standards.
We’ve spent much of this month reflecting on the progress we’ve made as an organization over the past decade — but we cannot let our guard down.
With the fall 2025 elections over, we’re planning our goals for the rest of this year and beyond. We want to hear from you to help us shape our priorities, team.
[**Will you take our November strategy survey to share your top gun safety priorities with us?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/nov25-priorities-sv/?source=em251117-1-b&refcode2=11046.3935704.4akt05&akid=11046%2E3935704%2E4akt05)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/nov25-priorities-sv/?source=em251117-1-b&refcode2=11046.3935704.4akt05&akid=11046%2E3935704%2E4akt05)**
Our work is only possible through supporters like you — people who care about commonsense gun legislation like universal background checks.
People who care about making sure children can’t access firearms.
People who care about a future free from the senseless gun violence that impacts communities nationwide.
Your priorities influence the work that we do. [**So please, use this link to take our November 2025 Gun Safety Priorities Survey today.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/nov25-priorities-sv/?source=em251117-1-b&refcode2=11046.3935704.4akt05&akid=11046%2E3935704%2E4akt05)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/nov25-priorities-sv/?source=em251117-1-b&refcode2=11046.3935704.4akt05&akid=11046%2E3935704%2E4akt05)**
Thank you so much for taking the time to complete our survey. We really value your input as we work to focus our organization’s goals for the future.
More soon,
The team at GIFFORDS
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/63914?t=1&akid=11046%2E3935704%2E4akt05)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=11046%2E3935704%2E4akt05) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

clean_body: If we keep this up, she doesn’t stand a chance... | Friend, The outpouring of grassroots support I’ve received since officially announcing my gubernatorial campaign has been truly incredible. Within just a few hours of my announcement, we raised over $1 MILLION for my gubernatorial campaign and the New York GOP! Those kinds of numbers will send a shiver down Kathy Hochul’s spine. The worst governor in America knows she can’t win a free and fair election that’s decided on the issues. Her only hope is to BUY her way to reelection – so if we can keep this momentum going, she won’t stand a chance! But that last part is key, Friend... To compete with the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys and win this race, we have to keep our momentum going from today all the way through Election Day. That’s why I set an ambitious goal of raising an additional $1,000,000 by midnight tomorrow to ensure we close out our launch week in the strongest possible position. Let’s CRUSH this goal and show Hochul that her days in office are numbered! Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Team Heidi Hall
subject: The only candidate supporting Medicare for All & rejecting AIPAC funds
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251117_em_fr_b1_THH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251117_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
Friend,
Heidi Hall isn't an extremist.
She's a mom, a former EPA worker, and a Nevada County Supervisor who flipped a purple seat to represent her local community.
It's her opponents that are extreme.
Their refusal to condemn "politics as usual" and commit to fighting for real meaningful change is an endorsement of the status quo and should be disqualifying.
This is an unprecedented moment, and we need leaders who are ready to be bold and unapologetic as a response.
By supporting Medicare for All, the ending of stock trading by members of Congress, getting big money out of politics, and rejecting funds from AIPAC, Heidi is stepping up to meet this moment and be the leader that our district needs.
Friend, believing that nothing needs to fundamentally change is extreme. And we can't afford to elect another extremist to Congress.
Will you donate what you can today to help Heidi's common sense campaign flip this seat and represent real working people in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251117_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251117_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
In solidarity,
Team Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251117_em_fr_b1_THH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251117_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251117_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party
subject: Your PA WFP Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
We won the courts, built the largest program in PA, and we’re not done yet. | | | Hi Peter, It’s been a minute, and we’ve got a lot to catch you up on! This edition of the PA WFP newsletter brings together major election wins, updates from our Election Captains program, and ways to stand in solidarity with workers across Pennsylvania. Let’s dig in.
* * *
### Election 2025: People Power Wins Across Pennsylvania
This Election Day, working people across the Commonwealth showed what’s possible when we organize together. From the Supreme Court retention races to key county executive seats in Erie, Northampton, and Lehigh Counties, the Working Families Party ran one of our biggest programs ever __ — building the largest ground game program in the entire state. Here’s what our movement achieved: ✅ Knocked on 175,000+ doors
🏡 Organized neighborhood leaders in 18 counties
🗳️ Covered 500+ polling sites with Election Captains
📞 Made 700,000 phone calls and 50,000 texts
💰Ran powerful anti-billionaire ads targeting Jeffrey Yass and other right-wing megadonors **And it worked — all three Supreme Court justices were retained, and WFP-endorsed candidates across the Commonwealth won!** This is what it looks like when working people fight back and win. **[Become a dues-paying PAWFP member today with a recurring donation of $10 or more a month.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCvYwXVaSMl7bcmIwquvCZqf-cP7hHGnIptiujrnWlgSPGXtvCrVJZ6vXKdq_EmaXuvo4EuibT5fMVBiXq5NQgOefpnHRaB60f1wgZFzFX5acHfFOEyDTv4eT5S_19yNzb2763K6927lr7bUeG1lRqtbU37eWCt9iah1fQb4DdHga3Mk3jhkuC9mQfuaIAEoTRsjBSjJIrsaQNjwtybKE8zuqpKG4lTLskZNGQYo6iSZUNvnfqMLZo3OpMpCFdUVjZTFXwrLjuR8HGtx6RPmSq-5OJjdHCyLrWTnFCgMPVUqeqG1OkdsDds0EGvxUu5N6WEqUJyJqtJZSFydTSISMIoQ/4lo/-ytIUFcFTH-OHlypOpGqgQ/h0/h001.xDzjJuAzR7ZEapSigwEOshYps8TUi5l5nL2pTz7iAJM)** **[Become a PAWFP dues-paying member](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCvYwXVaSMl7bcmIwquvCZqf-cP7hHGnIptiujrnWlgSPGXtvCrVJZ6vXKdq_EmaXuvo4EuibT5fMVBiXq5NQgOf1s7fJCXW2FkJLvO7j78pDm_LfEuNVFv6qBACdn0qtf7Up8pdHDZRoj9WBWfxA-UwKE_ok0dEdXKmg7iTcAqRjwI_HtQn62Fuzy9CH_VNRNEU76J_mCO_NuBpFsH-qChhSG4jm6zNUia0q9F67b8cwhZNdS5F6_7m2Afmmp8fVSMwpkGcE5buGILK4RuDpmK3GivT7lHg06tfL4lbUyC9SmmczQDHZWQu9rfjZ8xpRLzdrgM5UeOQVO2pahxa3LnQ/4lo/-ytIUFcFTH-OHlypOpGqgQ/h1/h001.Id3E1nndEaLBgcwtjTETgwgvDRn8bmam01R8wq0Zqck)**
* * *
### Election Captains: Building Community and Turning Out the Vote
This year, more than 700 Election Captains took action across 18 of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties — nearly a 5x increase from 2024 and a powerful sign of how fast this program is growing. Election Captains knocked doors in their communities multiple times, led neighborhood canvasses, checked in with their neighbors before Election Day, and staffed poll sites to keep turnout high and voters engaged. The program shows the power of deep, local organizing — meeting people right where they are: on their block, their porch, or their front yard. And the impact was undeniable. Turnout reached 72% in precincts with an Election Captain compared to 64% in precincts without one — an almost 10-point jump. In Philadelphia, ballot drop-off fell from 30% in 2021 to just 2.8% this year. Statewide, it dropped from 17% to 2.2%, one of the lowest drop-off rates Pennsylvania has ever seen. When neighbors organize neighbors, people stay engaged, and they vote. 📸 **Election Captains in Action:** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCvYwXVaSMl7bcmIwquvCZqf-cP7hHGnIptiujrnWlgSPGXtvCrVJZ6vXKdq_EmaXuvo4EuibT5fMVBiXq5NQgOcJDdk5n9raImFyxJqcPN1hkI4cRMiI2yVMG-nK94Zs9u2bgZG6-MMC2SHf-lb7HOLTwhzYeg_Lk9Pqu9K_DiJzmwBKnCNucqHlbUENwg4X9_j2VHZgpWpBASMBKJWi6Mi6OVoHzSgis531IHJ5106d8ZhCx5DwmUv4-g7O3eKoKbTRNqSpJLR5tMFWSG_b946Rthgd1cK8-qqYSm9etEY_YDUzx0Z3__TEyMzehAd8mJQoHeGGIh3XciEMx33mRYQ/4lo/-ytIUFcFTH-OHlypOpGqgQ/h2/h001.kgb90yTkYMTpseEOjD5lH6J_To9jtHbLWtCOxVDUkAM) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCvYwXVaSMl7bcmIwquvCZqf-cP7hHGnIptiujrnWlgSPGXtvCrVJZ6vXKdq_EmaXuvo4EuibT5fMVBiXq5NQgOXGAn9qOSlHJNuHtlu69nrvZeiDPz5uVese9CKHHBWlIegAnYTLWTmD8Gsyp_SiHmZOpki9klzWZbLcOwbJoUrLY1iUEBasYV9L1y4fXrXCOoHajY7usDw44pqSVYNUUKYLc7DpOMT_KO6qIlV6qXpPso6v_Z9-7DExvzppjN65DCu6ba45EG5B8VOx34LeiG79bJOrqfgQ9Pw50nbTofr5CeJ5Pu7KVdt5UHYxF5el-nYZX7Ynd_4_UyoX5Et0TiQ/4lo/-ytIUFcFTH-OHlypOpGqgQ/h3/h001.rykbnWy19He-xSRAf3Ne-jfVSGwArXaivw4v-aVZ1NM) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCvYwXVaSMl7bcmIwquvCZqf-cP7hHGnIptiujrnWlgSPGXtvCrVJZ6vXKdq_EmaXuvo4EuibT5fMVBiXq5NQgOerRNZHeGxKcYONJfsKdqm4naKOPYwF_5mV5EWpYtBCGo88UEZ4ULWVm9VwkvOTRav4Bmx3ubpJUOMiWPc1P4fb6g7clW8z0q37aq3d1GtH_zNsmfyn4_xV9VDvBDrprf_UFg8lZZcZuwDKrvMTPWGMmuOib3AGpEYy8bZ7OD5pZwThKnkM2YDbvUjaW1Fhum_j1dCNCu9PWFnqFV7EpscC-vwGNGzeo4V10VQW31sseULB3iUOZXFQpDDq7jPKpxw/4lo/-ytIUFcFTH-OHlypOpGqgQ/h4/h001.xQvnZxdP9NQBBS9W80oXSSlPvtHsBsrY3X02F5pm8ww) Want to be a captain next time? Text “**CAPTAIN** ” to **30403** to sign up for the next round of training.
* * *
### Red Cup Rebellion: Standing Up for Starbucks Workers
Last week, Starbucks baristas in more than 40 cities launched an open-ended national unfair labor practice strike — and they’re not backing down. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCvYwXVaSMl7bcmIwquvCZqf-cP7hHGnIptiujrnWlgSPGXtvCrVJZ6vXKdq_EmaXuvo4EuibT5fMVBiXq5NQgOfdJw8I6m7I8MRAJ_HCp9oVMwRC9C60hl3OXZl8JCh33oKy6xbUQi8oiQaUqUCIZpfQiw448LCrBKSeYuiokKalp1yChKXxpoMWvIgorbxcYx-PO95r2rD9woP75w3L04cUIgh7TlDelIqBphTd4-NYew57qmpgaySypVpRBls3n4tZevMwUhw9Of9NabJ6E9zjddHwlzr9K4R3IniTycDXYnMY5n5odEWmwLR9FpjJ4ipjAOIHXvSoIFOQl77Wtug/4lo/-ytIUFcFTH-OHlypOpGqgQ/h5/h001.vyPV3V1Xwwn8C3TXQ8TihKhPHlcHcLFtxPW4V4NUEYg) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCvYwXVaSMl7bcmIwquvCZqf-cP7hHGnIptiujrnWlgSPGXtvCrVJZ6vXKdq_EmaXuvo4EuibT5fMVBiXq5NQgOTQFAMsz6hci2H2APd6DGLV04qxt1HbJ56zArU-9GZHcAV8arEwYrV-z3LOzrp7gMgjdx9xMB7DzNcYyUNkqjTSquJ6l_nSc2-JPGYFzUO0qVQtaqGkeS0gb1YZPOcDwTfq5G4AywT1dlFrVEw6Aur1DdzMK6ECRrqoQaaXI3r_AQJQ0ANiylg-qjIcg2Qn_li7gbJDLUFHkjZFe7bP_XVzFBC9oP8qQaX3OnbAE3EvB07qjQcjTqw5darZI1NOs-g/4lo/-ytIUFcFTH-OHlypOpGqgQ/h6/h001.Vab0yzD4vhVqYQzX3wQ5smKikH6zg2Xqw05FhrroOq8) After nearly four years of organizing, Starbucks still refuses to resolve hundreds of labor violations or negotiate a fair contract. Workers have had enough. They walked off the job to demand better pay, fair schedules, respect on the job, and an end to union-busting. And now they need all of us. **While baristas are on strike, our job is simple: d****on’t shop at Starbucks.** No contract, no coffee. Baristas brew our coffee — not billionaires. When they take collective action for dignity and fairness, our movement shows up with solidarity. More than 12,000 baristas have organized coast to coast, building one of the most inspiring worker-led movements in the country. But they’re up against a corporation pouring millions into union-busting. We don’t let billionaires win by staying quiet. **Skip Starbucks until workers win a fair contract. Share the message: #NoContractNoCoffee****— because solidarity is stronger than corporate greed.** When workers strike, we strike too. Together, we can show Starbucks — and every corporation watching — that working people won’t back down. In the meantime, support your local coffee shop. **Grab a drink, snap a photo, and post with #NoContractNoCoffee — and tag[@paworkingfamilies](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg47r0qlfETlonifpGUkk9zJWz4QvLdYPZvRbe_8wg8j2S1mAqnL6tf2hiGQL79bphcC60Wbx-eR-NdxuTS0iUPGBx7nTb6Ttmu8A-s_wlUzH8i1C2IwN4WytczTjhZDRaS3rp6iQ-4ugGmYBaOmPITQBIulyTJTfUppdNr7hrSfRk1cC96UuSfLEYLGFevrz04E6WI8WcIW0z65mAEOsQp5__u_v4aSX-LY9zJhMg-P0VQ/4lo/-ytIUFcFTH-OHlypOpGqgQ/h7/h001.n9yfRdGBAc6BWtz4xEcViBcs20lR7FHVb4Y0cac17JA) on Instagram and Threads. Let baristas know our communities are with them.**
* * *
### Upcoming Events
We’ve got some great events on the horizon — opportunities to connect, build community, and keep the momentum going together. If you’re able to join us, we’d love to see you there. **[Affordability Transit Town Hall with Councilmember O’Rourke](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfxSMBhy9NRCP6LaUIjLZe5w8kfNT6r58F9lvb-WLRydoMu4_Lq5fOfVpFkTqt1TX6_ZoAKeqnsU9RVX0ma0wcshzJxvdmsuik51FndyridkwrV0DEjrhGu7a4cisHisJ--Ww_S1RNeCIcmBe2v3PizEJomc-pOeQ2kh7kc_CPTcCj9xYe0_mMsS7tbmETGwC2wFds79_gQNd-QiUK_Z1ysAmz2iMKoBb8tHNQBIj2f1DFrhW23a45UNiGxScUpHFufzJ2rOWMXOWOJpGwAye6w/4lo/-ytIUFcFTH-OHlypOpGqgQ/h8/h001.r3BLvLFtbD75nMGBtAGD71mouMyyRiFrRTuwkAA0x5Q)** Join Councilmember Nicolas O’Rourke, Senator Nikil Saval, and Transit Forward Philadelphia for a Transit Affordability Town Hall at the Friends Center. 📅 Thursday, November 20th | 5:30-7:00pm

clean_body: We won the courts, built the largest program in PA, and we’re not done yet. | | | Hi Peter, It’s been a minute, and we’ve got a lot to catch you up on! This edition of the PA WFP newsletter brings together major election wins, updates from our Election Captains program, and ways to stand in solidarity with workers across Pennsylvania. Let’s dig in. Election 2025: People Power Wins Across Pennsylvania This Election Day, working people across the Commonwealth showed what’s possible when we organize together. From the Supreme Court retention races to key county executive seats in Erie, Northampton, and Lehigh Counties, the Working Families Party ran one of our biggest programs ever — building the largest ground game program in the entire state. Here’s what our movement achieved: ✅ Knocked on 175,000+ doors 🏡 Organized neighborhood leaders in 18 counties 🗳️ Covered 500+ polling sites with Election Captains 📞 Made 700,000 phone calls and 50,000 texts 💰Ran powerful anti-billionaire ads targeting Jeffrey Yass and other right-wing megadonors And it worked — all three Supreme Court justices were retained, and WFP-endorsed candidates across the Commonwealth won! This is what it looks like when working people fight back and win. Election Captains: Building Community and Turning Out the Vote This year, more than 700 Election Captains took action across 18 of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties — nearly a 5x increase from 2024 and a powerful sign of how fast this program is growing. Election Captains knocked doors in their communities multiple times, led neighborhood canvasses, checked in with their neighbors before Election Day, and staffed poll sites to keep turnout high and voters engaged. The program shows the power of deep, local organizing — meeting people right where they are: on their block, their porch, or their front yard. And the impact was undeniable. Turnout reached 72% in precincts with an Election Captain compared to 64% in precincts without one — an almost 10-point jump. In Philadelphia, ballot drop-off fell from 30% in 2021 to just 2.8% this year. Statewide, it dropped from 17% to 2.2%, one of the lowest drop-off rates Pennsylvania has ever seen. When neighbors organize neighbors, people stay engaged, and they vote. 📸 Election Captains in Action: Want to be a captain next time? Text “CAPTAIN ” to 30403 to sign up for the next round of training. Red Cup Rebellion: Standing Up for Starbucks Workers Last week, Starbucks baristas in more than 40 cities launched an open-ended national unfair labor practice strike — and they’re not backing down. After nearly four years of organizing, Starbucks still refuses to resolve hundreds of labor violations or negotiate a fair contract. Workers have had enough. They walked off the job to demand better pay, fair schedules, respect on the job, and an end to union-busting. And now they need all of us. While baristas are on strike, our job is simple: d**on’t shop at Starbucks. No contract, no coffee. Baristas brew our coffee — not billionaires. When they take collective action for dignity and fairness, our movement shows up with solidarity. More than 12,000 baristas have organized coast to coast, building one of the most inspiring worker-led movements in the country. But they’re up against a corporation pouring millions into union-busting. We don’t let billionaires win by staying quiet. Skip Starbucks until workers win a fair contract. Share the message: #NoContractNoCoffee— because solidarity is stronger than corporate greed. When workers strike, we strike too. Together, we can show Starbucks — and every corporation watching — that working people won’t back down. In the meantime, support your local coffee shop. Grab a drink, snap a photo, and post with #NoContractNoCoffee — and tag on Instagram and Threads. Let baristas know our communities are with them. Upcoming Events We’ve got some great events on the horizon — opportunities to connect, build community, and keep the momentum going together. If you’re able to join us, we’d love to see you there. Join Councilmember Nicolas O’Rourke, Senator Nikil Saval, and Transit Forward Philadelphia for a Transit Affordability Town Hall at the Friends Center. 📅 Thursday, November 20th | 5:30-7:00pm 📍Friends Center, 1501 Cherry Street, Philadelphia, PA 19102 Join us for a community potluck and election debrief as we celebrate our Election Captains, reflect on this season, and look ahead together with WFP! 📅 Friday, November 21st | 6:30 – 9:00 pm 📍This event's address is private. Sign up for more details. Join Councilmembers Kendra Brooks and Nic O’Rourke for a Holiday Fundraiser with the PA Working Families Party! 📅 Tuesday, December 16th | 6:00 - 8:00 pm 📍 Honeysuckle Restaurant, 631 N Broad St, Philadelphia, PA 19123 Keep Building the Party We’re proud of what we’ve accomplished, but we’ve got work ahead. From defending our champions to building local power, your monthly support keeps us in the fight. In solidarity, always, Pennsylvania Working Families Party Become a Working Families Party Member! Other political groups have corporate donors. We have you. . Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party | | Sent via . clean_body: | | | GOING LIVE THIS WEEK: OUR LATEST BILLBOARD! Thanks to thousands of grassroots donors like you, we have expanded our billboard to Memphis – one of the cities where Donald Trump abused his authority, sending in the National Guard to intimidate a Democratic city. Every day this billboard is up, we are building a movement – organizing residents to call upon their representatives to support impeachment. Together, we can hold Trump accountable and protect our democracy. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. name: Did you forget?
subject: Today is National Defeat Boebert Day 🥳
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vOIzHnC497dQ3O1jRn5nUlI6F9u9QRNt-JjfIbGrzYEkGmIR_MqJwwd-3cZxQ-s-Y0KOHnFNAyiS7lsublviZYqAFOEFA3-Dz_goBFB6AGFeWjVFjf4V9y1gHbPHeialiNa8EEeNuUoA0yldR3sbL6nOE5T2J-drZOV7jLTQXKpLFo1-pkNZLUeIB-Uq9LEzHcPLOEXAoN-d03jH1M8kB158J_lm02djTIQWESlEGDE=&c=OOsb2sRVxlhElK8pTKqgC9CPStoZixmnbZnHgP4_GgKZTlR8rAc_xQ==&ch=roJCqKjftXjZopDzE8MVrHIMpvld0hDqOX_Vqbm4UXD5YR1kNW7MmQ==)
---
|

Peter,
Yes, it's that time of the year again--the most obscure, bizarre, and completely made-up holiday on the Democratic calendar: National Defeat Boebert Day.
But don't be fooled, today is critically important.
We celebrate today because Democrats have a real shot at sending Lauren Boebert packing once and for all. We can end her politics of hate, violence, and racism on route to winning back the U.S. House in 2026.
And honestly, it might be the greatest gift our party gets in 2026.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vOIzHnC497dQ3O1jRn5nUlI6F9u9QRNt-JjfIbGrzYEkGmIR_MqJwwd-3cZxQ-s-Y0KOHnFNAyiS7lsublviZYqAFOEFA3-Dz_goBFB6AGFeWjVFjf4V9y1gHbPHeialiNa8EEeNuUoA0yldR3sbL6nOE5T2J-drZOV7jLTQXKpLFo1-pkNZLUeIB-Uq9LEzHcPLOEXAoN-d03jH1M8kB6th54j1_M6XgD0EmXWGOUg=&c=OOsb2sRVxlhElK8pTKqgC9CPStoZixmnbZnHgP4_GgKZTlR8rAc_xQ==&ch=roJCqKjftXjZopDzE8MVrHIMpvld0hDqOX_Vqbm4UXD5YR1kNW7MmQ==)
---
Why do we celebrate today of all days? Well, because Boebert is more vulnerable than she has ever been. She's literally in Congress because of just 546 votes. Last quarter she raised just $100,000 (5 times less than us), which would be a competitive haul in a county dog catcher race--not so much for a sitting member of Congress.
And when labor leader, public servant, and Democrat Trisha Calvarese ran against her in 2024, our campaign had the best Democratic performance ever in this district and outperformed Kamala Harris by six points.
These are the ingredients for a political miracle--but opportunities like this don't come around often, and they don't last long. That's why National Defeat Boebert day exists: to remind us that this chance is right in front of us, and we have to take advantage of it.
So let's celebrate properly.
[Will you give a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you to support Trisha on this extremely important and not totally made up holiday?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vOIzHnC497dQ3O1jRn5nUlI6F9u9QRNt-JjfIbGrzYEkGmIR_MqJwwd-3cZxQ-s-N37mspcBTQ416A0YPv2E2B8IoLHnMfZ-nymPvfkLfuXAPr06jIl-S4cA6uEu2jPYV7SwC5NpNklPz1drh7Ptqhyklxu2bL7uMuf5uLtV_EAuJw1FHONrmWePXUtZdPNOmYMsKjttPfcsHOJpnD1tkudGgD7Z4UCCMbMX6OJLo-EuNGiXOI5Idg==&c=OOsb2sRVxlhElK8pTKqgC9CPStoZixmnbZnHgP4_GgKZTlR8rAc_xQ==&ch=roJCqKjftXjZopDzE8MVrHIMpvld0hDqOX_Vqbm4UXD5YR1kNW7MmQ==)
---

Peter,
Yes, it's that time of the year again--the most obscure, bizarre, and completely made-up holiday on the Democratic calendar: National Defeat Boebert Day.
But don't be fooled, today is critically important.
We celebrate today because Democrats have a real shot at sending Lauren Boebert packing once and for all. We can end her politics of hate, violence, and racism on route to winning back the U.S. House in 2026.
And honestly, it might be the greatest gift our party gets in 2026.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017iwOC4X8d4hiMDPWv2rNkE8T3StWF5U-5SWfunV9EH92hogbmrBFpf_AvQGEywWjq1t4bdJWBm7nMWzI2NeGK7YMCG6s5WgcC3ixZbUJvMYGLG7Zu2Ei2UYOmYm_0efMkg1dzFLf3dkTu5Wd-uo22FvzgvkBpo3LxHxuWzdYJjD2LaQ_HRzYrGG5E3Y-AX_CeC24jaOH01xP-qLl4j3QCZunVKPdAhShius7GlYl5v4=&c=B7VeOATXq__dkK16IMdHtEYUkYLqYTR7oXzmyA69T3BxhFmRZsaMdA==&ch=JGRu3RBPZikujhuoTqw8YcGjHd_t9u73wczHf5tEOYN1hDxJxkDE7g==)
---
Why do we celebrate today of all days? Well, because Boebert is more vulnerable than she has ever been. She's literally in Congress because of just 546 votes. Last quarter she raised just $100,000 (5 times less than us), which would be a competitive haul in a county dog catcher race--not so much for a sitting member of Congress.
And when labor leader, public servant, and Democrat Trisha Calvarese ran against her in 2024, our campaign had the best Democratic performance ever in this district and outperformed Kamala Harris by six points.
These are the ingredients for a political miracle--but opportunities like this don't come around often, and they don't last long. That's why National Defeat Boebert day exists: to remind us that this chance is right in front of us, and we have to take advantage of it.
So let's celebrate properly.

Protect the House majority
| Peter,

_**CLOSING Biden's open border.
DE-FANGING the Deep State.
PROTECTING girls' sports.
SHRINKING our massive bureaucracy.

#

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Documents Detail Michigan Att. Gen. Relationship with Leftist Nonprofit to Target Trump and Republicans Over 2020 Election Disputes
body:
Judicial Watch announced it received 5,789 pages of records from the Michigan Department of Attorney General in a Michigan Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request that show the state’s coordination with the nonprofit States United Democracy Center, which pushed indictments of President Donald Trump’s supporters, lawyers, activists, and Republican Party officials who disputed the 2020 election.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 17, 2025
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77789&L=36515&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWljaGlnYW4tYXR0LWdlbi1sZWZ0aXN0LW5vbnByb2ZpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=04447159b20b9067e0bb2875ba206866ef1c7602c285be60745c6ab759066158) | **[Judicial Watch: Documents Detail Michigan Att. Gen. Relationship with Leftist Nonprofit to Target Trump and Republicans Over 2020 Election Disputes](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77789&L=36515&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWljaGlnYW4tYXR0LWdlbi1sZWZ0aXN0LW5vbnByb2ZpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=04447159b20b9067e0bb2875ba206866ef1c7602c285be60745c6ab759066158)** Judicial Watch announced it received 5,789 pages of records from the Michigan Department of Attorney General in a Michigan Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request that show the state’s coordination with the nonprofit States United Democracy Center, which pushed indictments of President Donald Trump’s supporters, lawyers, activists, and Republican Party officials who disputed the 2020 election. Indictments of Trump alternative electors by Michigan Democratic Attorney General Dana Nessel were thrown out by a judge earlier this year. The documents suggest a broad conspiracy by several states to prosecute Americans over 2020 election disputes. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced it received 5,789 pages of records from the Michigan Department of Attorney General in a Michigan Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request that show the state’s coordination with the nonprofit States United Democracy Center, which pushed indictments of President Donald Trump’s supporters, lawyers, activists, and Republican Party officials who disputed the 2020 election. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 17, 2025 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced it received 5,789 pages of records from the Michigan Department of Attorney General in a Michigan Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request that show the state’s coordination with the nonprofit States United Democracy Center, which pushed indictments of President Donald Trump’s supporters, lawyers, activists, and Republican Party officials who disputed the 2020 election. Indictments of Trump alternative electors by Michigan Democratic Attorney General Dana Nessel were thrown out by a judge earlier this year. The documents suggest a broad conspiracy by several states to prosecute Americans over 2020 election disputes. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton announced that the Supreme Court of the United States has granted review in a landmark election integrity case brought on behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi. The case seeks to uphold a ruling by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit, which struck down a Mississippi law unconstitutionally allowing election officials to count mail-in ballots received up to five days after Election Day. Fitton stated: The Supreme Court now has an opportunity to reaffirm that “Election Day” means what it says under federal law. Counting ballots received after Election Day not only violates federal law but encourages voter fraud and undermines voter confidence. The Supreme Court should uphold the historic decision by the Fifth Circuit that sensibly concluded that counting ballots received after Election Day is unlawful.” ---|--- | | | | | “We are helping to keep an eye on tax-supported universities with connections to hostile foreign governments,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. “The American public deserves a full accounting.” ---|--- | | | | | When it comes to border security, fiscal year 2026 got off to a remarkable start with the lowest illegal crossings in October in history, according to preliminary figures released by Customs and Border Protection (CBP), the Department of Homeland Security’s (DHS) frontline border agency. It is welcome news after a record-breaking 7.6 million illegal aliens entered the country under Biden, including hundreds of thousands with serious criminal records and over 1.7 million from countries DHS says pose a national security threat to the U.S. Classified as Special Interest Aliens (SIA) by the government, the migrants that pose a security threat came from some 26 nations, including Afghanistan, Cuba, Iran, Iraq, Libya, Nigeria, Syria, and Turkey, China, North Korea, Kyrgyzstan, Mauritania, Tajikistan, Uzbekistan, and Venezuela. Many SIAs—including some on the U.S. terrorist watchlist—were released inside the country under Biden, risking public safety and national security. ---|--- | | | Reuters President Donald Trump on Sunday urged his fellow Republicans in Congress to vote for the release of files related to the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, reversing his earlier resistance to such a move. House Speaker Mike Johnson said earlier that he believed a vote on releasing the documents should help put to rest allegations that Trump had any connection to Epstein's abuse and trafficking of underage girls. PJ Media The U.S. Supreme Court (SCOTUS) will hear a case that will decide if Election Day actually exists in America anymore. SCOTUS will decide if states can accept mail-in ballots days after the designated Election Day. Judicial Watch’s Tom Fitton, whose organization wrote an amicus (friend of the court) brief in support of the Supreme Court taking the case, said, “The Supreme Court now has an opportunity to reaffirm that ‘Election Day’ means what it says under federal law.” He said that, “Counting ballots received after Election Day not only violates federal law but encourages voter fraud and undermines voter confidence.” This is objectively true. Pinal Central Judicial Watch is suing Gov. Katie Hobbs, accusing her of ordering state police and National Guard to not cooperate with federal immigration authorities and then hiding that fact. The national organization, which is known for filing public records lawsuits, contends that statements the governor made shortly after President Trump was elected in 2024 are tantamount to declaring she won’t use state resources to enforce his order for mass deportations. And that, the lawsuit says, runs afoul of a state law that bars public officials from restricting the enforcement of federal immigration laws, a position buttressed in a statement in a press release from Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

Hey Peter, The most recent election results show that Americans reject the MAGA program to steal from working people and give to billionaires while shredding our freedoms and abducting our neighbors. Voters in Pennsylvania understood what was at stake because of your support. PA’s own version of Elon Musk, billionaire Jeffrey Yass tried to buy our court, we fought back and won. One PA members stepped up as volunteers, election captains and micro-influencers. Together, One PA’s programs contacted tens of thousands of voters with person-to-person conversations, and reached millions through creative new media channels. Not only did Pennsylvanians soundly reject a right-wing takeover of our courts, voters from New York to Virginia to California rebuffed MAGA. We must now make sure every voter that we contacted will join with us for the long-haul fighting for an affordable city and freedom for all our community. We must also grow our base and sharpen our programs in anticipation of a possible Philadelphia occupation, next year’s budget and legislative fights, and the critical congressional and gubernatorial elections. _**[Can you help us maintain momentum and pitch in to One Pennsylvania right now, to help us make the most of this win and get prepared for 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119472112/583173884/-1740112306?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20251117_fr_posteday_cm_oc_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxNWE4MGQyLWZkYzMtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dzA7-ng6o3h6B18zmyxW5IjG8wN3hBnHYYQ4mvp83bY=)**_ | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: GOP Leadership @ Senate Leadership Fund
subject: President Trump’s final 2 years in office could depend on YOU.

clean_body: As the next Governor of Virginia, Abigail will protect the Commonwealth from the administration's bad policies. = Have you seen this headline, Peter? = Abigail delivered a message to the entire nation: Americans are tired of the chaos coming out of Washington. Voters are ready for leaders who will put the people before a President, and who will work to make life more affordable instead of firing thousands of hard-working public servants. As the next Governor of Virginia, Abigail will work to protect Virginians from Trump's attacks on the Commonwealth. But if we want to deliver an even bigger blow to the Trump Administration, we can't make this historic win a one-time event. We need to win in 2026, and then we need to take back the White House in 2028. = = = = = = = Thank you for your continued support, Team Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Fellow American, the Democrats are piling into my race to defeat me, and their reasons are crystal clear:
**
1. I proudly support President Trump.
2. I'm a steadfast conservative.

** _**That's it.**_ They're coming after me because I stand firm for our values.

But I won't shy away from tough competition. **In 2020, my opponent raised $132 MILLION to defeat me, and _it didn't work._**

I'm sure my new opponents will use the same playbook to try to defeat me, but nobody will outwork me or my team. **We won't stop until we win for South Carolina.**

I know that the fight will be tough, but I am lucky. I have the support of true conservatives from across our state and nation who are ready to stand up and fight with me, however, we cannot take anything for granted.

clean_body: Fellow American, the Democrats are piling into my race to defeat me, and their reasons are crystal clear...They’re coming after me because I stand firm for our values. | Fellow American, the Democrats are piling into my race to defeat me, and their reasons are crystal clear: 1. I proudly support President Trump. 2. I'm a steadfast conservative. That's it. They're coming after me because I stand firm for our values. But I won't shy away from tough competition. In 2020, my opponent raised $132 MILLION to defeat me, and it didn't work. I'm sure my new opponents will use the same playbook to try to defeat me, but nobody will outwork me or my team. We won't stop until we win for South Carolina. I know that the fight will be tough, but I am lucky. I have the support of true conservatives from across our state and nation who are ready to stand up and fight with me, however, we cannot take anything for granted. We saw how hard the Democrats and opposition went after candidates in 2024 for supporting President Trump and standing up for our values, and I'm sure 2026 will be no different. | Please, help however you can before my opponents start ramping up their attacks, and we risk falling behind. Fellow American, I am counting on you. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23625%2E4449941%2EvMGsAL) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23625%2E4449941%2EvMGsAL) [ **!!️Please read this email and complete our urgent poll below !!️**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70059?t=3&akid=23625%2E4449941%2EvMGsAL) **Look, Elizabeth Warren is CALLING OUT the Electoral College: ** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70059?t=4&akid=23625%2E4449941%2EvMGsAL) She’s so right! Donald Trump is only President because of the **OUTDATED, UNFAIR,** and **UNDEMOCRATIC** Electoral College.

Remember: Hillary Clinton won the popular vote in 2016 but her victory was overruled, _all because of the Electoral College._

**We’ll be blunt. It needs to go IMMEDIATELY!**

So, we’re launching an urgent poll for Democrats in your area to gauge support for the Electoral College. Here's the honest truth, team.
[ **The Electoral College is a 238-year-old antiquated system that NO LONGER serves the American people.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70059?t=10&akid=23625%2E4449941%2EvMGsAL)
BUT, Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans know that they will never win another Presidential election if we get rid of the Electoral College!

All they care about is holding onto power and they will do whatever it takes to keep it – even if that means silencing voters...

[**Voting is an ESSENTIAL building block of our democracy and when its integrity is compromised, so is our Democracy.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70059?t=11&akid=23625%2E4449941%2EvMGsAL)

[**We need 9,382 more responses from your area before midnight in order to gauge support. If we don’t hit our goal, it will make it incredibly difficult to formulate our strategy moving forward. Your response is crucial.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70059?t=12&akid=23625%2E4449941%2EvMGsAL)

name: Team Crow
subject: Hegseth is pushing women out of the military
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
So-called “Secretary of War” Pete Hegseth’s crusade against women in uniform is pushing qualified service members out of our military, folks.

Exclusive: ‘She was the best man for the job’: Hegseth’s policies are pushing qualified women out of the military
— November 2025
CNN spoke to more than a dozen active-duty women across the military branches, all of whom expressed a deep and growing alarm that Hegseth’s actions, policies and rhetoric risk pushing out both experienced soldiers and those interested in joining. Several said they knew of other female servicemembers who had recently been passed over for deserved promotions. Others said they are now considering leaving the military.

Hegseth has consistently undercut the commitment and service of the hundreds of thousands of qualified women who serve in the U.S. military.

Someone like this has no business being in charge of our troops.

Jason’s military service was defined by a shared sense of duty, devotion, and sacrifice. He served with men and women overseas — and the only thing that mattered was their commitment to our country and their fellow soldiers, not their gender.

Right now, women are serving our country all across the world in some of the most dangerous locations imaginable — for the freedom of every American, including Pete Hegseth.

Our troops deserve better. Will you chip in to Jason’s campaign today to help him keep up the fight to hold this administration accountable? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-nov25]

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

A new demonstration video just surfaced — investors everywhere are taking notice.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: A new demonstration video just surfaced — investors everywhere are taking notice.| | | | November 17 | | | | | Elon’s New AI Could Transform More Than Cars | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | | | | 🟡 News From "American Alternative Assets" | (Sponsored) ---|---

Friend,
We have an important update about the Special Election Runoff:
• Special Election Runoff Election Day: Saturday, January 31, 2026
• Early Voting Begins: Wednesday, January 21, 2026
• Early Voting Concludes: Tuesday, January 27, 2026
Your vote is crucial, and early voting is the perfect way to make sure your voice is heard. Together, we can show the strength of our community and build momentum heading into the runoff.
What You Can Do Now:

• Check your voter registration by visiting: harrisvotes.com [https://www.harrisvotes.com/Voter]
Every vote counts, and your support is what will drive change for our community.
Thank you for standing with us.

name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: We’re kicking off our biggest campaign of the year
body:
Our End-of-Year Giving Campaign Begins Now! | | | Peter, Right now, the stakes for immigrant communities couldn’t be higher. All over the country, immigration agents are roaming the streets, disappearing people outside courthouses, schools, and even graduation ceremonies without any form of due process. DACA recipients are being snatched despite their valid, active, and _protected_ DACA status. Federal agents have been deployed to intimidate peaceful demonstrators standing up for their neighbors. This is not a moment for silence. It’s a moment to rise. **That’s why we’re launching United We Dream’s End-of-Year Giving Campaign with a bold goal: raise $100,000 to protect and defend our communities heading into 2026.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8hyCmECnODiQzfTWOA-yBF6gZ1ndf2071BvFqsQ62H6prPfSgfRCTTZRdWv8OLJoRFDc_9Ue-DoXnFxEK7npVfWpEVS_79YWYATKqR79k5sLTwf3V6EStkE2eoGyfLpkQa9Chmhu3XVI1ZcXrlunwYV4TUaOWYZ0bWBg3SIEVoQSmOX6WJNwbqMJ_VGry_PH6CyG9UUCk-Dq7BBuZ9L5t16vUdDXdO9nMUgHiMr4beqaDJEjSppnS0LJc5ug3wL-r4b7goNFLCrF1LQg54ol1x5uZ8a4xdRt45u9gzwWurD9oX9JDk9nmQc0OKmDfMHlcyF9aZQs3U6DDoHWqqZeuKMzzCFuWPxbR2xVQozvBENEnybL_tNr789j2VCsQzllhy0kN186mVNcA8P4IZYBstGMkw13WRtDCY3UeomDdAh0/4lo/k4sH_BM9SJWNiUFJeDxZLg/h0/h001.XwFrYYnrIcTuPp3LKrgDHrxnEXMLB-A7UUpqM4Ck7XU) **We’re asking you to be one of the first to give, and to give early, so we can keep building a future where everyone is free to live, speak, and be themselves; Thank you for standing up, showing up, and never backing down.
— Matias, United We Dream

clean_body: Our End-of-Year Giving Campaign Begins Now! | | | Peter, Right now, the stakes for immigrant communities couldn’t be higher. All over the country, immigration agents are roaming the streets, disappearing people outside courthouses, schools, and even graduation ceremonies without any form of due process. DACA recipients are being snatched despite their valid, active, and protected DACA status. Federal agents have been deployed to intimidate peaceful demonstrators standing up for their neighbors. This is not a moment for silence. It’s a moment to rise. That’s why we’re launching United We Dream’s End-of-Year Giving Campaign with a bold goal: raise $100,000 to protect and defend our communities heading into 2026. We’re asking you to be one of the first to give, and to give early, so we can keep building a future where everyone is free to live, speak, and be themselves; where our communities have what they need to thrive, regardless of their background. ****** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. Your donation helps United We Dream respond quickly when immigration agents escalate, train young people in organizing and advocacy work, and fight back against anti-immigrant policies in every corner of this country. The threats we are facing are real. But so is our power** — and it starts with people like you, giving what you can, as early as you can. Thank you for standing up, showing up, and never backing down. — Matias, United We Dream | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**

name: Seth for Massachusetts
subject: Giving veterans a voice
body:
From classrooms to combat zones, real leadership starts with service.

| |
---
Hi friend, Veterans Day was last week — but honoring service isn’t something that happens once a year. After coming home from Iraq, Seth saw how few veterans had a seat at the table in Washington. That’s why he founded Serve America: to help more veterans, teachers, health care professionals, and public servants run for office and bring a sense of duty back to government. Since then, dozens of those leaders have been elected across the country, flipping seats and proving that courage, integrity, and service still have a place in our politics. That’s the same spirit Seth is bringing to this campaign, because the challenges we face now demand leaders who’ve put others first and know what it means to serve. **[If you share that belief, chip in to help Seth keep building a government that reflects the best of those who’ve served it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119473305/583177821/2090747700?refcode=251117_sfm_vet2_l1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODA2MGI3Yi0wMGM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dpdzQ121j0171h6f5dW0uGOdJJDhT0S2MBoTdNr1U3E=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119473312/583177828/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=251117_sfm_vet2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODA2MGI3Yi0wMGM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dpdzQ121j0171h6f5dW0uGOdJJDhT0S2MBoTdNr1U3E=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119473313/583177830/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=251117_sfm_vet2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODA2MGI3Yi0wMGM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dpdzQ121j0171h6f5dW0uGOdJJDhT0S2MBoTdNr1U3E=)

clean_body: From classrooms to combat zones, real leadership starts with service. | | Hi friend, Veterans Day was last week — but honoring service isn’t something that happens once a year. After coming home from Iraq, Seth saw how few veterans had a seat at the table in Washington. That’s why he founded Serve America: to help more veterans, teachers, health care professionals, and public servants run for office and bring a sense of duty back to government. Since then, dozens of those leaders have been elected across the country, flipping seats and proving that courage, integrity, and service still have a place in our politics. That’s the same spirit Seth is bringing to this campaign, because the challenges we face now demand leaders who’ve put others first and know what it means to serve. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. name: David Hogg
subject: Chuck Schumer had ONE job.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
The cost of Schumer’s leadership? Our healthcare.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251117-1&t=1&akid=2848%2E587540%2EmhjPYN)
Hey Peter, David here — and I'm pretty pissed off right now.
Chuck Schumer had one job: **hold the line for working people.** He failed. _Again._
For over forty days, Democrats stood their ground. They _finally_ had real leverage to protect affordable health care for millions, backed by public support, a fresh mandate from voters, and the moral high ground.
And after all that? **They walked away with NOTHING** — not a single concession or win for the people who were begging them to keep fighting and not to fold.
They caved for a “compromise” with Senate Republicans to _maybe_ talk about ACA subsidies in December. Now those same Republicans are saying it’s dead on arrival unless they can attach it to abortion restrictions.
That’s not a compromise. **That’s total surrender.**
You’d think Democrats in D.C. would know by now: when you give MAGA an inch, they take a mile. Show weakness, and they go for blood.
And the eight Senate Democrats who caved? They weren’t the new or younger members. They were the _“steady hands”_ with over 120 years in office between them. The same steady hands who promised to protect our care, then went on TV and said: _It was too hard to stand up to Trump, so we gave up._ As we’ve said over and over again, experience means _nothing_ without courage.
This all begs the question: where the hell was Chuck Schumer?
The Senate Minority leader has one actual responsibility: **keep your caucus unified when it matters most.** Senator Schumer either has completely lost control of his caucus, or he has let corporate donors, airlines, and lobbyists push him to reopen the government on _their_ terms, without securing anything for working people.
I know which one seems more likely to me. But neither is acceptable. Because they both send the same message to voters:
**Your health care, your stability, and your basic needs are negotiable. They’re not _really_ worth fighting for, even though we spent 40+ days telling you they were and when we had maximum leverage and we were winning we gave up with nothing to show for it.**
This is why the Democratic Party brand is toxic. This is why trust is collapsing. This is why we need new leadership and this is exactly why LWD exists.
So I’m saying it plainly:
**Chuck Schumer must step down as Democratic leader.**
Not in 2030. Not eventually. **_Now._**
And when Democrats pick a new leader, it can’t be another “steady hand” from the same Senators who have more experience in folding than governing. We need someone who can communicate, inspire, and actually fight, no matter if it’s someone with decades of experience or someone newer. What matters most is that they have the courage to make any amount of experience meaningful.
That’s what Leaders We Deserve is building: leaders who don’t cave the second corporate donors get uncomfortable. But to take on the Democratic machine and corporate PAC network, we need real grassroots power behind us.
Your support is the _only_ thing that powers us to primary asleep-at-the-wheel feckless Democrats and elect a new generation of leaders, not folders.
**[If you’re ready for new leadership and a Democratic Party that _actually_ fights for us, please chip in $5 to fuel this movement.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251117_1_schumer.ijGN_d&refcode=em20251117-2848&amount=5&t=3&akid=2848%2E587540%2EmhjPYN)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251117_1_schumer.ijGN_d&amount=5&refcode=em20251117-2848&t=22&akid=2848%2E587540%2EmhjPYN)**
We have to build a party that fights like people’s lives depend on it — because they do.
Thank you for standing with us,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251117-1&t=23&refcode2=2848_587540_mhjPYN&akid=2848%2E587540%2EmhjPYN)**
