name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: The 'cost of capitalism'
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Take a look at some of this country’s most popular programs: Medicare, Social Security, public schools, libraries.
None of those are capitalist inventions. None of these are corporate-backed, and none of these are initiated by tax-based incentives.
And what do we call $700 billion in 2008 Wall Street bailouts?
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251117.TfeKLc&refcode=em20251117-10222-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10222%2E2526796%2EB3hm6_)
As MLK said, “All too often, we have socialism for the rich and rugged individualism for the poor.”
[Help us continue the fight for a system that works for each and every one of us with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251117.TfeKLc&refcode=em20251117-10222-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10222%2E2526796%2EB3hm6_)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251117.TfeKLc&refcode=em20251117-10222-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=10222%2E2526796%2EB3hm6_)**
In solidarity,
Team AOC

name: Gov. Josh Shapiro
subject: Not a walk in the park.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

[
---
Peter, I want to reach out on behalf of my friend, Senator Jon Ossoff, who is running for reelection in Georgia next year. [**I’ll share more in a moment, but if you are already aware of the stakes in Georgia and are ready and able to chip in, you can do so here.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251117-1-f&t=2&akid=1101%2E5691347%2EdpON_V) **Jon’s reelection is _not guaranteed._** Elections in Georgia are notoriously close and competitive. In 2021, Jon won his runoff election by only 1.2% of the vote — and now, as the only Democratic Senator running in a state Donald Trump won in 2024, he is one of the far-right’s top targets. _And Republicans are already spending _millions of dollars_ on attack ads against him. _ **But his reelection is critical.** Democrats have to retake the Senate majority to put a stop to Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. And we need fighters like Jon who have the guts to stand up for our future. **Winning in Georgia is not a given, and this race isn’t going to be a walk in the park. It’s going to take all of us, chipping in when and where we can. That’s why I’m asking:** [**Will you chip in $5 to help us build up the resources Jon needs to win this critical race and help Democrats take back the Senate majority? This is the most important Senate race in the nation, and it will take ALL of us to win.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251117-1-f&t=3&akid=1101%2E5691347%2EdpON_V) **[CHIP IN](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251117-1-f&t=4&akid=1101%2E5691347%2EdpON_V)** Let's seal the deal, folks. Whatever amount is within your means, I promise you it will be spent strategically and will make a real impact in winning in Georgia next year. Thank you, Josh Josh Shapiro
Governor, Pennsylvania
Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=5&akid=1101%2E5691347%2EdpON_V) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1101%2E5691347%2EdpON_V) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

In 2021, Jon won his runoff election by only 1.2% of the vote — and now, as the only Democratic Senator running in a state Donald Trump won in 2024, he is one of the far-right’s top targets. And Republicans are already spending millions of dollars on attack ads against him. But his reelection is critical. Democrats have to retake the Senate majority to put a stop to Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. And we need fighters like Jon who have the guts to stand up for our future. Winning in Georgia is not a given, and this race isn’t going to be a walk in the park. It’s going to take all of us, chipping in when and where we can. That’s why I’m asking: Let's seal the deal, folks. Whatever amount is within your means, I promise you it will be spent strategically and will make a real impact in winning in Georgia next year. Thank you, Josh Josh Shapiro Governor, Pennsylvania Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click if you'd like to unsubscribe.

body:
| | | Friend, This is critical. **Combat veteran and conservative leader John James** just missed his mid-month fundraising goal in the race for **Governor of Michigan** – and Democrats are already flooding the state with cash to stop him. Reports show that **Gretchen Whitmer’s allies and national Democrats** are about to post some of their biggest fundraising numbers of the year. If we let them outraise us, they’ll use every dollar to smear John and prop up their failed agenda. We can’t allow that to happen. Michigan’s future is too important. That’s why we’re **EXTENDING our mid-month deadline until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT** to close the gap and show that this campaign has the strength to win. John James has fought for our country. Now he’s fighting to win in the most crucial swing state in the nation. But he can’t do it without your help. Please, chip in **BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT** to help us hit our new extended mid-month goal and send a clear message: [**Michigan is ready for new leadership.**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=424cbe57c83b47059da1bc7f5debcfd1&_e=RS6gvEOa8MimxuBL9R8ovJOYJjemWsHW-cIYeMPO5GBUcdEgfoebhmWYIeUUcgRJiLmX-glmLuXBWbJFDyrBHH3FDJ23I6VBc2sJMNnlLqv1uBsQfD1EXHo0b3GxH5HymfRyeNV3RIgV0ej8bWzXvcgaK1MGdyEY2lXiCC6S2ho2WJ8NMx1YMAeugjWxzUILlYPHeLiXgcHPiw609omzo3Rf7bzjlh4AA6ePoSPF99mfmkMjZr1vjgTbF104MXg30z0cKBbkxIlrMPM1-PsLaESvrnYz-bbLtMuikwKDv7UbQ1cohnQfaqtaJEKHN5qzBBzFLS_tE-oz8BpHD6tTK-z-u8fyGU7mE0BZzxeY2qrPqkGNLA7x0c_S_TfrS2L_VEKSVnL4rc-sZ1IaeymKNMrsn7sAgsPNrxkRxoicX0Y%3D)

clean_body: | | | Friend, This is critical. Combat veteran and conservative leader John James just missed his mid-month fundraising goal in the race for Governor of Michigan – and Democrats are already flooding the state with cash to stop him. Reports show that Gretchen Whitmer’s allies and national Democrats are about to post some of their biggest fundraising numbers of the year. If we let them outraise us, they’ll use every dollar to smear John and prop up their failed agenda. We can’t allow that to happen. Michigan’s future is too important. That’s why we’re EXTENDING our mid-month deadline until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to close the gap and show that this campaign has the strength to win. John James has fought for our country. Now he’s fighting to win in the most crucial swing state in the nation. But he can’t do it without your help. Please, chip in BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to help us hit our new extended mid-month goal and send a clear message: Thank you, Co-Pilot Alerts | John James is a West Point graduate, combat veteran, and job-creating business leader. A new poll shows him ahead by only 1 percent. Your support today defends this lead, expands our reach, and helps Michigan choose stronger leadership. | | Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312 | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for MI Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: we’ve got an economy that’s not working for a lot of people
disclaimer_text: paid for by new debt and cuts to healthcare
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119474077/583180633/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTgyYjEwYi0wM2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPl3blGyIrrQtTPKBPLn8_nNHRKA0WdKLqA6jAVzDjU=&emci=16c7c704-03c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f582b10b-03c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894) I’m going to be straight with you, Derek: we’ve got an economy that’s not working for a whole lot of people.

It’s not just the rent that’s too damn high—it’s everything. The costs of groceries, housing, childcare, and utility bills are all going up. Health care is a ripoff, and college or trade school is just too expensive. This cost-of-living crisis is pounding the American people.

But what are Washington Republicans doing? Taking healthcare even more expensive, jacking up costs with dumb trade wars, and funneling huge tax giveaways to their billionaire and corporate buddies.

**I’m sick and tired of the GOP's weak and failed management of our economy.** [**I’m in the fight to lower costs and unrig our economy. I’m working to bring down costs and clean up corruption so the economy works for hardworking people. If that’s the kind of leadership you can get behind, then help me hold this battleground seat by chipping in a few bucks to my campaign today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119474078/583180634/981825435?refcode=email_111725_americandream&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTgyYjEwYi0wM2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPl3blGyIrrQtTPKBPLn8_nNHRKA0WdKLqA6jAVzDjU=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119474079/583180635/981825435?refcode=email_111725_americandream&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTgyYjEwYi0wM2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPl3blGyIrrQtTPKBPLn8_nNHRKA0WdKLqA6jAVzDjU=)
---
I believe in something pretty simple: if you work hard and play by the rules, the American Dream is yours.

But right now, the American Dream isn’t real for a lot of hardworking people; it’s been ripped away.

This didn’t happen by accident — for decades, politicians have failed and instead have made it easier for powerful corporations to steamroll the American people.

Just look at what they've been up to, Derek. Republicans have been in full control in DC for almost a year, and they've done nothing to bring down costs or make life easier for people working their butts off.

Know what they have done? Passed more fiscally reckless tax handouts to the richest and most powerful corporations and people in human history, paid for by new debt and cuts to healthcare.

**I’m determined to pump muscle back into the American Dream and unrig our economy—and that’s exactly what I’m fighting for in the House.**

I’m taking on unchecked corporate power, working to give small businesses a fair shot to succeed, fighting to bring down costs, and crushing corruption so that the American Dream is real for everybody.
[**We need an economy that rewards hard work, not just wealth. If you’re all-in on the fight to restore the American Dream and unrig our economy, please chip in now to help me defend PA-17 and keep fighting for Western Pennsylvanians →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119474080/583180636/981825435?refcode=email_111725_americandream&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTgyYjEwYi0wM2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPl3blGyIrrQtTPKBPLn8_nNHRKA0WdKLqA6jAVzDjU=)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 11/17/2025
body:
Polis’ budget disaster has Coloradans fired up
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**November 17, 2025** **MONDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Hey friends — Team RMV here.
Colorado is at a crossroads — and your voice has never mattered more.
In his latest commentary, [“The Voice of Colorado,”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) RMV Ambassador Drake Hunter reminded us why our movement exists: to bring truth, trust, and participation back to Colorado’s public square. As Drake wrote, _“Every community has a story worth sharing... RMV is reigniting civic engagement and rebuilding trust in media—one authentic and valued voice at a time.”_
That’s what makes Rocky Mountain Voice more than a media outlet — it’s a movement. A gathering place for citizens who are tired of being silenced and ready to take action. If you’ve ever thought about writing, speaking, or sharing your story, **[now is the time.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) **We need every conservative Coloradan—students, business owners, parents, pastors, and patriots—to step up, speak out, and help lead the charge as we head into the most important election season in a generation.
And judging by what Coloradans are reading and sharing, people are fired up.
Our most-read pieces this week—[“Bill Search Reveals How Polis Grew Medicaid—Yet He Blames Rising Costs”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and [“Governor Polis Pushes Record $50.7 Billion Budget Amid Fiscal Concerns”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—blew up across social media, hitting a nerve statewide. Why? Because everyone can see what’s happening: **Jared Polis has driven Colorado’s budget off a cliff.**
While he's busy making TikTok videos about how he's "throwing a fit" over the Epstein files, extending federal healthcare credits, and our favorite: _"Colorado's budget is balanced, you should try it sometime"_ [[Watch for yourself]](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ... His record-breaking [$50.7 billion spending plan](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and admitted “unsustainable" Medicaid costs are anything but BALANCED. It's a crisis is his own creation.
Over the past five years, Polis [expanded Medicaid through dozens of new bills](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), adding benefits, broadening eligibility, and burning through federal COVID funds—all while pretending the problem came from nowhere.
Now he’s lecturing taxpayers about “fiscal responsibility” while our roads crumble, our sheriffs beg for funding, and working families face higher costs on everything from groceries to gas.
The good news? Coloradans are waking up. Our readers, followers, and supporters are uniting like never before—and your response online this week proved it. As one commenter put it: _“We’re done letting Polis bankrupt Colorado while blaming everyone but himself.”_
That’s the spirit.
**Because 2026 isn’t just another election year. It’s a reckoning—for policies that have failed, leaders who’ve lied, and citizens who’ve finally had enough.**
So this week, we’re asking you to do one thing: **use your voice.**
Write. Share. Speak up. Help us build the movement that puts Colorado back on solid ground.
This is your state. Your story. Your fight.
— Team RMV
---
| | |
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Governor Polis Pushes Record $50.7 Billion Budget Amid Fiscal Concerns](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Governor Jared Polis recently proposed his more than $50 billion Colorado state budget, requesting a flood of money to education and public safety while acknowledging Medicaid spending has gotten out of hand. __
**[Bill search reveals how Polis grew Medicaid—yet he blames rising costs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _I recently saw a couple articles covering Gov Polis’ budget recommendations to help cut costs in this state and get our budget to (at least temporarily) balance. You’ll see lots of his ideas in the Sun and CBS articles, big among them Polis’ brave words about Medicaid funding in this state being one of our biggest costs, and how continuing to expand it is unsustainable._
__
**[Debate erupts as Eagle County high school students launch TPUSA chapters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) When students at Eagle Valley and Battle Mountain high schools set out to form local chapters of Turning Point USA, they probably didn’t expect the stir it would cause. At Eagle Valley, the club had just cleared the approval process when pushback started rolling in.

|
---
**STATE**
**[The cost of obedience: How Colorado’s senators strengthened economic malfeasance](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _It is both sad and disappointing that Colorado’s two U.S. senators are incapable of independent thought. As the simple puppets of their overlords, they have selfishly voted fifteen times NOT to reopen the federal government—even though their “no” votes hurt the Coloradans they supposedly represent. Colorado was already struggling economically before the federal shutdown._ __
**[A mother, a signature and a shutdown: The Waltmans’ five-year battle for answers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) For years, John Waltman carried his mother’s notarized Medical Durable Power of Attorney. “It was supposed to mean that we had decision making power for her medical care,” he said. “But the minute COVID hit, that signature meant nothing. After the first lockdown orders, The Good Samaritan – Bonnell community in Greeley, Colorado shut their doors to us and violated our rights we possess as Power of Attorney.”
**[Weiser’s Anti-Trump Agenda Comes at Taxpayer Expense](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser says he favors trashing Colorado’s legislative reapportionment system to get more Democrat members of Congress elected. His statement offers some useful instruction in how, when conservatives make political deals with the left, it usually comes back to bite them.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[FBI Under Fire After Blaze Report Links Ex-Capitol Officer to Jan. 6 Bombs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE BLAZE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A forensic analysis of a female former U.S. Capitol Police officer’s gait is a 94%-98% match to the unique stride of the long-sought Jan. 6 pipe-bomb suspect, according to a Blaze News investigation confirmed by several intelligence sources.
**[Democrats Claim Trump-Epstein Proof Then Delete Post After It Collapses](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE WESTERN JOURNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Democratic Party is staking a lot on the rather thin gruel in the Jeffrey Epstein emails they’ve released. So much so, in fact, that they’re not apt to check whether the claims of a serial fabulist and convicted sex offender are verifiable. Spoiler alert: They are, and not in the way they had hoped.
**[The Math Behind America’s Slow Surrender](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SEAN POND, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Every generation tells itself the same lie, that compromise keeps the peace, that negotiation is what holds a democracy together. But if you trace it out in hard math instead of soft emotion, you’ll see that every “reasonable middle ground” we’ve chosen has moved this country one step closer to socialism and one step further from the principles our Founding Fathers built this nation on._
__
_**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Faith and friction: A nursing student’s stand at Regis University](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) John Scarboro thought the meeting would be simple—just a quick talk with ministry leaders at Regis about forming a student group. It didn’t start that way. The 32-year-old nursing major and new father met with university staff on September 12 after campus security stopped him for talking about Jesus with students.
__
**[Fort Lewis College Reverses Course and Quickly Approves TPUSA Chapter After Student Backlash](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A Colorado college student government reversed its decision to block a Turning Point USA (TPUSA) chapter during an emergency meeting on Friday night. The Associated Students of Fort Lewis College (ASFLC) voted to approve the TPUSA chapter after previously rejecting senior Jonah Flynn’s proposal to register the group with the university.
**[Denver’s Inflation Rate Leads Nation Despite Cooling Elsewhere](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Denver has some of the worst inflation problems of large metropolitan areas across the nation, according to new data. Personal finance website WalletHub released a study showing the changes in inflation for 23 major metropolitan statistical areas across the U.S., with the Denver-Aurora-Lakewood metro area having some of the biggest inflation problems.
**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[The Myth of the Montrose Mandate: Low Turnout Exposes Recall Farce](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MICHAEL J BADAGLIACCO "MJB", [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _In the world of local politics, few things are as amusing as watching a vocal minority pat themselves on the back for what they call a resounding victory. On November 4th, the recall of Montrose County Commissioner Mijares (R), has the so-called recall crew crowing about how “the people have spoken.” But let’s take a closer look at the numbers, shall we? With only 8,439 votes cast to oust Mijares out of 34,187 registered voters, that’s a paltry 25% turnout. Hardly the stuff of democratic thunder._
**[The sky is not falling, my friends](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY HEIDI GANAHL,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _It’s easy to get swept up in the daily drama of social media — the sky-is-falling headlines, the endless doomscrolling, the “we’re doomed” takes from people who haven’t walked outside to notice the mountains still standing tall. But every so often, someone breaks through the noise with a dose of reality._

**[Grassroots effort pays off as GOP-endorsed school board candidates win big in Delta County](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY ANGIE MANY & SHIRLEY BAUER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _We won! We won! At the Watch Party after the monthly Delta County Republican meeting, the mood was ‘Elation!’ as it was almost certain that GOP-endorsed candidates Adena Kreutz and Sheldon Kier had become newly-elected members of the local school board._
__

**[The Whole Armor: Where Humanity Meets Holiness](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Are you a half-dressed soldier in the Lord’s Army? During my time in the Air Force, one lesson stuck with me: readiness is everything. There’s no such thing as being partially prepared for a mission._
__
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

|

It even boasts the world’s largest comic book collection.

name: Suzanne Beecher
subject: The Supreme Court could protect female athletes—will you stand for truth?
body:
As a defender of truth, you know that women shouldn’t have to share locker rooms with men.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/VPmazqMHMnRMOtpCs_jCIVmA5CjUmbdSF_DRbawWQv8YzHhsm8WEZU6HXFcrPRXNgYqGhFeNUhJJOllZ1XbME8kqYDlQ9KegYQo67U2XLnHp9OX6-uAZ3J-W8_hKEgH4pCQkVrWLDbitm4HntbTdjE_ZejOCJ2Bv3JmA5pZEpcCZkGFTjJIADBaK/Mq_lyAvrfm3KQ_6mY_L0cwitS314p12X/14)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/dc4-LBStcSME336sqIg3u4HWMCy0hIpz1uon4Y3fhHHI0j5hvAoK0Ucdf2B57Rtum1uVrY87Y9ugEXPetPmiaRIAUSJrv87VOIXf7rZRSpgna04nPmCD6TVwtX7_AOQeiRDfVuKgVWNE6cQR3Qk2jPFoo5xl0HjWA-Jrfgp-ytEGdGgsMe_KgqgNDszmN7wJ-TXL3CS5pSZUM8ODiHSUv1TccuEwpJXTxqcNdtFRvQXhTH78B8saqVTdLi_qATGvmwoX6Gf0vS3woCImbEY2oqRJuW-DftFhZCKJ2vcVvj-b1Gj1nEn7cIsP-qIURu9_XHLPMJAURup71ykBMy7odpRX4JCSsd4K4y6Z4iZIt024nF1V_4CHG-MylMjxoumg3IwpHj4WUllZ3y_cO-tzlYXLGMoN9OaVHa50o0H6EGYZ4xIRQaluZX0Q9X4zSq9RPe_1dL65CnwzaAdGefJc13zji-pKA4Nc8hoPZXYZ-vjz_zDI4hREKgbdDpZ03rRRXGP1uGnHdI60z3O3WuXOZhxdUOH7MW-hUb4D9zolVKgiJM-Tcgpor2DGIBn4UnhBYcaskhuNf1QYqqnUwrRL8OViZiOrDLhuZNayFpLJoH1WPoaJKL6Lio0_BiRY9eaO92XAR8-LJ2c9Fowzjgx1ZISSO0ErSEdrnIJvbUr6NHLeqVK7A49Rtwl_FI-f0LX14bc0_NMEObT4RHJien4iq1Avug1Nm-5vY1QpNXciojbN1eTX5Sfg2fexE1qDcris89dR/eAOBBDbTH0tnAREAM9744iiyjHb6QtjF/14)
**** Dear Fellow American, As a defender of truth, you know that women shouldn't have to share locker rooms with men.

They shouldn't have to compete against male athletes. And they shouldn't be punished for speaking the truth.

But across America, that's exactly what's happening.

Men are being allowed to compete in women's sports--robbing girls of scholarships, medals, titles, and safety.

Now, for the first time in history, the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear two cases--_State of West Virginia v. B.P.J._ and _Little v. Hecox_ --that could decide the future of women's sports nationwide.

This could be a watershed moment in the fight to protect biological reality and fairness.

If you believe women's sports should be reserved for women, we need your voice today.
[ Sign the Declaration on Women’s Sports](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/lwdu2W7jwzBRbakYo5uXgUrO2A8EeC9pm8lI2s0tLq-jt5hJf47bnFafxKr_qnJK50rWfjdtHAnytuukO9wWOYDj5VFwHfbrRFrsOshMAHMw-ZFowm7mq3TrZ247pZUqHCDuHUofcftr9ZTFhECaOZi7gXMSCkbzSZtFrEN-sS_e8-T4AXZ4ylujNHILuw4Jegg8NnolymMn9POsf2PTP3gnkMcz-goupiFIi7VqH-JYvYGzIlc7IiUQf5Vqcq6o-roPUKvBUT62rX4d0DhhWHnrHT1pRtg6lTiqVafNvE2xKFkjrQIhmqtxJk-lGU66L05R7ag46lmMLmUnn25fUmfnquYx-G5bXo1PaOxUcgfyio1wwtzpsDNHi19nMB0r5Ma7nx5cAv18mGXZNGpJol4g8Li5Y-IdMhTTz42MNEAkKDaga1ovg1xrzFO8NwBShXeRiAVv6n2RjGieYnHQG7PvvoNP41C-k__jR34R4mvfKptmd1C6_Q6PPlnd3q84tMDa67PXFgKZI6HHl8_F7BW1quXr5CPr8_mSc6_qfDD_hF9jiLXfq6bfIaNtLtc8vqD3X365h9AkpdoMNGMDLBFtY7BgV4JGctxhuOmDDETeCWCG8Q8cw9t2smRJx-zZQqV6_y9BcQGgfwd9R5YZ2GMMa3ev8iIH-KYOq4CWECTy31Ts8q11iAe3PAn4zWXj6hmfxIkzC9AsUwXD8xYNPU9r2GWtOUgNoLLKGlcX_rsQbCRay0YO6u8y_3khfjjgOtZ0/QYo-vZnLB4lAM83_43nQvhXKRUBIWs4L/14)
Your signature will say clearly:

✅ Men should not be allowed to compete on women's teams
✅ Women deserve privacy, fairness, and safety
✅ Radical gender ideology ignores biological truth This is more than athletics. It's about truth, justice, and standing up to gender ideology's dangerous, reality-denying agenda.

When our culture accepts the lie that men can be women and women and be men, the downstream effects victimize women and children most of all.

Doctors end up criminally charged for blowing the whistle on the medical industry for preying on children. Young girls end up sharing locker rooms and bathrooms with boys. Female athletes lose out on opportunities to males. Parents get pushed aside by government officials, who make life-altering decisions for kids on their behalf.

Men haven't stopped competing in women's sports just because it's 2025. You only have to scroll X or watch the news to see new examples of men invading women's sports and spaces.

The thing is, courageous female athletes like Madison Kenyon and Mary Kate Marshall have been sounding the alarm on this issue for years--standing up when it wasn't popular to do so.

Madison and Mary Kate are former college athletes who ran track and cross country at Idaho State University.

Both found running to be their happy place. Both invested years of training into becoming college athletes. But both had to face a male athlete in college.

Madison and Mary Kate, represented by ADF, intervened in _Little v. Hecox_ to defend Idaho's women's sports law. They don't want other girls to lose the opportunities they did.

But, soon, they're getting their day before our nation's highest court.

Please stand with Madison and Mary Kate and add your name now to the Declaration on Women's Sports.

clean_body: As a defender of truth, you know that women shouldn’t have to share locker rooms with men. | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this ** Dear Fellow American, As a defender of truth, you know that women shouldn't have to share locker rooms with men. They shouldn't have to compete against male athletes. And they shouldn't be punished for speaking the truth. But across America, that's exactly what's happening. Men are being allowed to compete in women's sports--robbing girls of scholarships, medals, titles, and safety. Now, for the first time in history, the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear two cases--State of West Virginia v. B.P.J. and Little v. Hecox --that could decide the future of women's sports nationwide. This could be a watershed moment in the fight to protect biological reality and fairness. If you believe women's sports should be reserved for women, we need your voice today. Your signature will say clearly: ✅ Men should not be allowed to compete on women's teams ✅ Women deserve privacy, fairness, and safety ✅ Radical gender ideology ignores biological truth This is more than athletics. It's about truth, justice, and standing up to gender ideology's dangerous, reality-denying agenda. When our culture accepts the lie that men can be women and women and be men, the downstream effects victimize women and children most of all. Doctors end up criminally charged for blowing the whistle on the medical industry for preying on children. Young girls end up sharing locker rooms and bathrooms with boys. Female athletes lose out on opportunities to males. Parents get pushed aside by government officials, who make life-altering decisions for kids on their behalf. Men haven't stopped competing in women's sports just because it's 2025. You only have to scroll X or watch the news to see new examples of men invading women's sports and spaces. The thing is, courageous female athletes like Madison Kenyon and Mary Kate Marshall have been sounding the alarm on this issue for years--standing up when it wasn't popular to do so. Madison and Mary Kate are former college athletes who ran track and cross country at Idaho State University. Both found running to be their happy place. Both invested years of training into becoming college athletes. But both had to face a male athlete in college. Madison and Mary Kate, represented by ADF, intervened in Little v. Hecox to defend Idaho's women's sports law. They don't want other girls to lose the opportunities they did. But, soon, they're getting their day before our nation's highest court. Please stand with Madison and Mary Kate and add your name now to the Declaration on Women's Sports. Together, we can ensure every girl has a fair opportunity to play--and win--on a level playing field. Thank you for standing for truth. With gratitude, Suzanne Beecher** Legal Counsel Alliance Defending Freedom Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

On January 3rd, 2021, I stood in the House chamber and swore to support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
Three days later, the Capitol was attacked, and I had a choice to make: _be a politician, or be a patriot._
**I put our republic first: I served on the January 6th Committee, seeking truth, justice, and accountability for the American people.**
That decision may have cost me my House seat in 2022, after an onslaught of MAGA cash targeted our district. But I’d make the same choice all over again, because I took an oath—the same oath I swore at 17 when I entered the Naval Academy—to protect the country I love.
**That’s why I’m running for Congress in 2026.**
I’m running to help families get ahead instead of just getting by, to ensure veterans have the support they need, and to defend our Constitution.
These aren’t just talking points. **We _can_ win this.** We’ve already done so twice before. And in the recent election, Virginians proved they’re intent on a new direction.
I’m ready to bring tough leadership to communities across Coastal Virginia, but I can’t go it alone.**I’m counting on patriots like you to join me on the right side of history.**
The first weeks of this race will be a proving ground for the strength of my campaign. [**If you’re ready to take back our district and flip the House majority, will you become a Founding Donor of my 2026 Congressional campaign by making a $25 contribution today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119474736/583182846/-593605332?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_251114_FR_Launch2ND_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2RmNWMwYy0wNmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SPqdhqk22wYdDJ85ePY2OjvCi3rSwUaKXbYDNL_rvCg=)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Don’t Miss the New Live Daily Jenny Beth Show
body:
Catch the new live daily format of The Jenny Beth Show.
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/0100019a93fdcad9-56d88ec9-a7f6-4b4f-b38d-9e1212a12cb6-000000/CtUqZxaaecKgH6W4rdOBFIviGvNhuo80KSdIFcfjI5g=431)Patriot–We’ve taking The Jenny Beth Show to the next level.In the month of November, the show is being **broadcast live every day** , bringing you real-time coverage of the stories shaping our nation — along with the insight, analysis, and guests you expect.No fluff. No filters. No corporate media spin.Each live episode will feature:
* **Breaking news and rapid-response analysis**
* **Top conservative leaders, experts, and insiders**
* **Action steps you can take immediately**

This new format allows us to speak directly to you — and with you — as events unfold. Whether we’re covering Congress, the White House, the courts, grassroots victories, or threats to our liberties, you’ll hear it live and unedited.**Join us every day at 1pm ET on**[ _**Facebook**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fjennybethm%2Flive_videos/1/0100019a93fdcad9-56d88ec9-a7f6-4b4f-b38d-9e1212a12cb6-000000/crA-nklOnPR8ndmnYRSAyl8zKQBfO3X8Knv0g-1MelQ=431)**,**[_**YouTube**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2F@jennybethm%2Fstreams/1/0100019a93fdcad9-56d88ec9-a7f6-4b4f-b38d-9e1212a12cb6-000000/KUhJ6hUU6b8RRo2RrLrGTWwsBO-C__fCbsIZLuKRAC8=431)**,**[_**Rumble**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Frumble.com%2Fc%2Fjennybethm/1/0100019a93fdcad9-56d88ec9-a7f6-4b4f-b38d-9e1212a12cb6-000000/XHGSqCRz3c1u06OKvxg_CXRBxqaBF_QktKb0xYuNrwA=431)**, and**[ _**X**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fx.com%2Fjennybethm/1/0100019a93fdcad9-56d88ec9-a7f6-4b4f-b38d-9e1212a12cb6-000000/jrBdFjUIJ_8Vgo1KkVd1cR-ZZkawK2JiQ155R2fshNw=431)**.**
* * *
**ICYMI: One of Our Most Popular Episodes So Far** If you missed it, here’s a powerful recent episode worth watching:[_**“Shutdown Ends, 50-Year Mortgages, Election Integrity & Campus Chaos | Sec. Chuck Gray, Rod Martin”**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Flive%2Fc-CjnFX8Ck0/1/0100019a93fdcad9-56d88ec9-a7f6-4b4f-b38d-9e1212a12cb6-000000/Bcnd-2TgHxPGfcW41v90KUFFGtCLUsDNHu-C1fzmSFU=431)A hard-hitting discussion on the government shutdown, the housing crisis, election integrity battles, and the wave of campus unrest gripping the country.
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Flive%2Fc-CjnFX8Ck0/2/0100019a93fdcad9-56d88ec9-a7f6-4b4f-b38d-9e1212a12cb6-000000/VF6AZgU2oNHgxBr8PzpDSlEve4Fb7tCcjBM-LJ3T5Dw=431)
* * *
If you can’t tune in live, [_**full episodes and clips will be posted**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fjennybethshow.com%2F/1/0100019a93fdcad9-56d88ec9-a7f6-4b4f-b38d-9e1212a12cb6-000000/PWkFxMe9-KuLQ6T1tmoH7N75y71LNsr97lrE-ZLMn_w=431) shortly after each show on all platforms, including all of your favorite podcast platforms.This is a major step forward for our movement, and your engagement is critical to making it a success. Thank you for standing with us as we fight to defend liberty and hold Washington accountable.In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Why I keep fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
When people count you out, you show up anyway. |
#
---
Team — When I first ran for office, a lot of people told me not to do it. Some said I was too young. Others said the timing wasn’t right. More than a few told me that a woman couldn’t win. But I knew why I was running. I believed in what I stood for, and I refused to let cynicism make decisions for me. I’ve never forgotten that feeling, which is why I believe so deeply in the work of Fight Like Hell PAC. Because every day, there are people out there who are told the same things I once was. That they’re not the right fit. That politics is broken. That it’s just not worth it. **But it _is_ worth it.** Public service matters. Good things happen when the right people say yes. And we’ve seen the cost when they don’t. That’s why we’re working to bring new people into this fight. We’re helping everyday folks step into leadership, connect with their communities, and build the tools they need to run — and win. I know it can be tempting to give up or tune out, especially in the moment we find ourselves in. But the truth is, **progress only happens when we decide to show up anyway. ** **[If you believe that too, I hope you’ll consider making a donation today. It’ll go directly to efforts like finding and supporting the next wave of leaders we need. clean_body: When people count you out, you show up anyway. | Team — When I first ran for office, a lot of people told me not to do it. Some said I was too young. Others said the timing wasn’t right. More than a few told me that a woman couldn’t win. But I knew why I was running. I believed in what I stood for, and I refused to let cynicism make decisions for me. I’ve never forgotten that feeling, which is why I believe so deeply in the work of Fight Like Hell PAC. Because every day, there are people out there who are told the same things I once was. That they’re not the right fit. That politics is broken. That it’s just not worth it. But it is worth it. Public service matters. Good things happen when the right people say yes. And we’ve seen the cost when they don’t. That’s why we’re working to bring new people into this fight. We’re helping everyday folks step into leadership, connect with their communities, and build the tools they need to run — and win. I know it can be tempting to give up or tune out, especially in the moment we find ourselves in. But the truth is, progress only happens when we decide to show up anyway. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for staying in the fight. — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. FightLikeHellPAC.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee

name: Wes Moore
subject: I have a quick question
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=936%2E1086043%2EpzkeHf)
Hi Peter, it’s Wes. I have a quick question:
**[Will you chip in to support our re-election campaign right now?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251117-1.oWi3cf&refcode=em-20251117-1&t=2&akid=936%2E1086043%2EpzkeHf)**
I know that’s direct — but your grassroots support is so important.
We’re building a Maryland where we leave no one behind, and we’re facing an uphill battle with the federal government shutdown and the Trump administration coming after Democratic governors like me.
**But I won’t let that stop me from delivering on that mission.** I’ve got a calendar on my desk that reminds me of how many days I have left in this term to make progress for Marylanders, and I’m not wasting a single one.
**[I need your help to stay in that fight. Will you chip in $5, $25, $50 or whatever you can today so we can win the progress Maryland needs?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251117-1.oWi3cf&refcode=em-20251117-1&t=3&akid=936%2E1086043%2EpzkeHf)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251117-1.oWi3cf&amount=5&refcode=em-20251117-1&t=22&akid=936%2E1086043%2EpzkeHf)**
Thank you for being a key supporter of our movement, Peter.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251117-1.oWi3cf&refcode=em-20251117-1&t=23&akid=936%2E1086043%2EpzkeHf)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251117-1&t=24&refcode2=936_1086043_pzkeHf&akid=936%2E1086043%2EpzkeHf)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=936%2E1086043%2EpzkeHf)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=936%2E1086043%2EpzkeHf)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

## Commonsense Corner:
---
America is back in business! Our troops [have been paid](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/_kUkUvJGCE9ZdK9H59Kh_jTbwO8iDA-7dSq8Z5I7LSQzNRB38YvHifY2tMbria_s819RJ_KdzOaebuWbU4BhoyxCeeMwUlfie-3DyScIq1Q0rEw2RwDh-8wHSxHbYV5bbq4Sk8QfeAZFsdITKAaGOKPiWwXD2a9rkacCM5buuabqRBvH9riMYXDMcjrSKTC2JyUdQLMeBf8SVtj0st4OS2kW9RFLIe2J-fXEuIgjiwOmj-L465Ytdvo-a9QqCC0vblIEp0ATdL_5-2_vdEA8D_VJryTRiXYShsJrjxx7Hx_qpxvpJGU1sgqHfDft5B03gHjWEpySitcvS34mHMEL1i2uIEjjmcat-tt0wPlLKbVAIoKa_ykjHveLyQHQe2qMmSAXSFpUy-rEchPVqz5LAIWDm819FuDBXda9sr5BKadt9HO-Pkzhp_vBc0Z5kI8wqYsaiI9j9XfrAOYxSlpXjP09XhBtJLPaaCoSlWt0feJ2ayBoAtLFP_GOwYcQibFT17qMg3c77RhJv2vPyq2kZvWr_BWl3s145gO-eSgkXFO8f5h51lEMLrEUBLpwiNvo_4W5qiSNedbjs96s0K8p0CKSW8C8xSk/XYP3hrkp-Jfq3Os1hOwM_X5ZFFP_2FaO/14), flights are returning to normal [today](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/b9Id5p-uB2vLj5N1XNxV9qui5DdtXxBB5SIyzP7sdj_CrfjDHv7PTZ4rZgj7FFtpPoY0DhBHXCXW_xyinBegyAAZ2HfwmA7X-YMy8xfYq7s0-3rFv5D69o75qjcm6QE8TaQl_fM712F6iNxpoYNz6w7cwifRRkNsw4ox9Ckxg3HQ39sJOa2OXEoNauGEMH_WytqOTntWEP4EiiQOuWASJeOK9ityj5bxy5MyTp2xcQKOINx0hFtVlzIBlogeOkJJZy9OwNV4-qTPnTv_eNURroXzkGkfIpALMt5NX7xRCUApc4erHgNEhbQeZI-OePgbw_ZXv8u3dN9wrdNKIupYLW_q25zZjgl0-1mMiv5BF4JRXMb83kHgpQrzbQUNF1f9Dg5LhCV_b0ic-mIjjqX8Yi7rSzPtc-Y-ntSQ-NPdg1is88Np23M7n0JgtxF4bZpZusT7c5F5aJ9iUeB19VVUicbxthLJL5c0eH88MyxXVu9i-M3pu3IQbo-HN_L8e-lvFOA27Xka2B2SHIawsuIhnfYbb2UtTkVqY4e-RJiykhj6Qy3Ct3WZpUVmcaf5923XV_Yd3zEeM3wA-5I/DrNCeQVdMBBq81XQOwkUxhRWNdURc4XM/14), and [SNAP benefits](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/MH5HYZZG6YAzKGdoRWIfCV1FN2gJZDDUGn6Oz_4msKQOEizDflDN2WHuTPPSRhaDj9vm5BX5wl-lJwe9xRCrcc4SJzOuupGpYI7H4scclAlxsXuSE9mwWxBU7apgh1m_ZRpIUwM8xubTflegPfEoJ8GNxvF_w0Fu1JQgDbMV9AE70Puubtj3-nB6NAqEKoQmBsVpHQ1SR0lMvitCQW0lNDUI9GMe2jwCxQJ3T9yCJN6TSkf6uOiSs92jK2hJ7EnxbD7_a4GMkXB1UN0K4DfwpZn8u6xeDqB7c_zH7fQOP9ZQYR_vWGb1XTDIjG3a9huBxFCsgD_c1EdCSbYhb0c_ouMTTI30chuA0VC07E0k2FjGV5iyfvOyex9BvLWODBGwbXs94_gK9_ZmV9a1SRkitc8yvj8SpzsBCp-R0b2H5_ldP8mzwPVBKOrwIzfU41AuWCMU-4rDr90BtCZKQp9vfRJjjvGBWTGVzOVF2aTTRCKk-P8fviBhEvx2vFPyZzXM_KQmKm3XUJ1qkVKOUpxzppw3rzJuC61pihMY/rwXQjsj0MrYnEnAAD5y3xuF7rcrmSCl_/14) are being sorted out just in time for the holidays. Nobody wins when Washington grinds to a halt—and Democrats are gonna own this one. But here’s the elephant in the room: This shutdown opened our eyes to**** just how many Americans rely on government programs. To be specific, nearly [**42 million**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/gavzIjjBFkF45A25qj1g5oMhNaoAW_JS6k71hSdD5XJY54hyzerlr3_MfMWp0YcESQLmHg4WTpzh8Z5XMLHHSBYfzoCcVilu3bZUfhf2mIfoiNZdDArxpVqe_-h1U-vUwqnXSLJp1WqdLOIsIt63aui-25k08iL3DSvvw29rf_SytTh-BTIIDdJAsz63bBHvJ-N2fGDH0MzwAdeXn7lKkDIq3oEnoVAqrrD407Ji1X6XpKdkwqJBPqW2ff6VHgBbbfzINJpYvVPQMwf4Z-cmcM_FaVUtbUKadzg4wLZhKX_kefihziC9fPOvYUfQJPmEpe_b5n0o5e8DqOR1pRYC0G8prnf92NfWmIozuAlRSp9S6_vngl1rWSvaQoIetlRhr_XKKbw2fZtv-Ct3XdkBr3vKZUfJvLpaoTndTrd_XZBtGOjBSfdUxc_Dw8suxyhZ_MtW-I6mg1o8_kLvIqIGt9WVzb0Fd6Nx7249HniJV5iJSTNVKRemph4AKk9Dfgsl9gRU7zTcDydUGIg02-bW4wdNSbrT3zf2QxvtJbqN_N2Hbtc2JUjrll_mikEXdVm1yPAGOFnSO4hqIKBzuR7lJL1jOzeoSqqz_uGsaTjTabENbCLEBhYauD-JqGkmNmnAwUnU/zoJYtoVnHV6r5RNm4ghavesLy27i_a54/14) people receive food stamps. There are folks who truly need that help, and we should have their backs. But Democrats don’t want to help people when times get tough—they want to keep people dependent, stuck, and easy to control. **That’s not opportunity. And it’s not the America conservatives like us believe in.** Republicans want to get this country running on good jobs, affordable living, and freedom—not a system that boxes you in. All’s to say, the shutdown may be over, but the fight for a government that actually works for the people is far from finished.

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: America is back in business! Our troops , flights are returning to normal , and are being sorted out just in time for the holidays. Nobody wins when Washington grinds to a halt—and Democrats are gonna own this one. But here’s the elephant in the room: This shutdown opened our eyes to** just how many Americans rely on government programs. To be specific, nearly people receive food stamps. There are folks who truly need that help, and we should have their backs. But Democrats don’t want to help people when times get tough—they want to keep people dependent, stuck, and easy to control. That’s not opportunity. And it’s not the America conservatives like us believe in. Republicans want to get this country running on good jobs, affordable living, and freedom—not a system that boxes you in. All’s to say, the shutdown may be over, but the fight for a government that actually works for the people is far from finished. | Boots on the Ground Poll: How would you describe the current level of participation in America’s SNAP (food stamps) program? Last Week’s Poll Results | This Week in Tim’s Feed | Sport Your Support: | | | | | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress**

Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren't interested in these messages?

clean_body: Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder? I know I've reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they've texted and emailed at least twice too! Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren't interested in these messages? That would be truly shocking to me since you've always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump's mission to save America, so I'm giving you one more chance! Really, that's it! I just need your feedback, nothing more! | You still have time, but not much, so I encourage you to complete your profile sooner rather than later! I'm also really starting to worry that we haven't heard from you! THANK YOU, Marsha Blackburn | | | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. # **Senate Democrats demand investigation into Trump admin 's shutdown messaging on federal sites**
Senate Democrats led by Elizabeth Warren and Adam Schiff are calling for a federal probe into **[alleged partisan messaging the Trump administration](https://substack.com/redirect/e36a4a65-e3b9-4f1f-ab95-96f6f2f64c75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** displayed on official government websites during the record-breaking shutdown. The lawmakers claim agencies violated federal appropriations law by posting blame-focused statements targeting Democrats rather than providing neutral updates about government operations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e36a4a65-e3b9-4f1f-ab95-96f6f2f64c75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Alleged Propaganda Violation:** The senators pointed to Department of Housing and Urban Development website language accusing "the Radical Left" of shutting down government over demands, arguing such statements may have illegally used taxpayer funds for partisan propaganda. Federal law prohibits agencies from spending appropriated money on publicity designed to influence congressional action on legislation or appropriations.
* **Republican Pushback:** Heritage Foundation legal fellow Hans von Spakovsky dismissed the complaint as a "publicity stunt" by Democrats deflecting from their own shutdown role, noting Democrats voted over a dozen times against reopening government. The White House called the messaging "objective fact" and defended sharing truth with Americans about Democratic responsibility for the funding lapse.
* **GAO Reviewing Request:** The Government Accountability Office confirmed receiving the congressional request and is evaluating whether to launch a formal investigation into the matter. The shutdown ended Wednesday after 50 days when Trump signed legislation funding government through January 30, following disputes over healthcare provisions including Affordable Care Act subsidies and Medicaid eligibility for non-citizens.

# **Poll: Majority across all parties blame political rhetoric for Charlie Kirk assassination**
A new NBC News survey reveals rare **[bipartisan consensus](https://substack.com/redirect/e38762e4-f2cd-4cea-811b-44dd8eb52f13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that extremist political speech played a major role in conservative activist Charlie Kirk's assassination, with 61% of Americans linking inflammatory language from media and political leaders to his death. The poll marks the first time in 15 years that majorities across all major political groups--including 73% of Republicans, 54% of Democrats, and 53% of Independents--agree that extreme rhetoric significantly contributed to a violent political incident.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86ad56a9-77af-46c9-8907-f0932c232f40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Historic Shift in Blame:** The findings represent a dramatic change from past political violence, including the 2011 Gabrielle Giffords shooting where 71% blamed the lone attacker versus just 24% citing rhetoric. By the time of President Trump's second assassination attempt, those numbers had reversed with 54% blaming rhetoric and only 37% pointing to the individual attacker alone.
* **Suspect Faces Capital Charges:** Tyler Robinson, Kirk's alleged killer, faces aggravated murder charges carrying potential death penalty in Utah, with family members reporting he became increasingly politically extreme and moved further left in the year before the shooting.
* **Limited Lone Actor Theory:** Only 28% of poll respondents attributed Kirk's killing primarily to a disturbed individual's actions rather than the broader political climate, while 4% said it was a combination of both factors. Robinson's first in-person court appearance is scheduled for January 16, 2026, though he has not yet entered a plea.

_**_To compete with the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys and win this race, we have to keep our momentum going from today all the way through Election Day._**_

clean_body: If we keep this up, she doesn’t stand a chance... | Friend, The outpouring of grassroots support I’ve received since officially announcing my gubernatorial campaign has been truly incredible. Within just a few hours of my announcement, we raised over $1 MILLION for my gubernatorial campaign and the New York GOP! Those kinds of numbers will send a shiver down Kathy Hochul’s spine. The worst governor in America knows she can’t win a free and fair election that’s decided on the issues. Her only hope is to BUY her way to reelection – so if we can keep this momentum going, she won’t stand a chance! But that last part is key, Friend... To compete with the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys and win this race, we have to keep our momentum going from today all the way through Election Day. That’s why I set an ambitious goal of raising an additional $1,000,000 by midnight tomorrow to ensure we close out our launch week in the strongest possible position. Let’s CRUSH this goal and show Hochul that her days in office are numbered! Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

She's not focused on lowering costs, helping our veterans, or creating good-paying jobs here. She's focused on headlines and division. Thank you, Shawn Harris | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Why I’m optimistic about our future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

I just got home from a really successful Texas organizing trip that left
me even more optimistic about our future.

First stop was the University of Houston (go Coogs!) where I joined more
than 30 of my fellow Powered by People volunteers on the North Lawn. We
met hundreds of students there, taking the time to listen and talk with
them about what’s happening in the country and our power to do something
about it.

Over the course of six hours of nonstop engagement, we registered 95
students to vote and added more than 330 to our contact network. We will
stay in touch with every single one of them over the course of this
election to answer their questions, help them with information about
voting, and ensure they ultimately cast their ballots. And we will do this
within a personal, volunteer-to-voter relationship—no spam, no mass
texting. This kind of direct connection defeats the cynicism and apathy
bred by the cold, soulless automated politics that turns off so many young
people today. And the proof is in the pudding. This program produced a
turnout rate of 79.5% with the students we worked with last year, compared
to a state average of 37% and a national average of 42%.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251117.NLXXqC&refcode=ema20251117-240468&t=1002&akid=240468%2E444211%2E9L446o ]Beto speaking with students.

On Friday, I drove to San Antonio where I joined our organizers at the
University of Texas at San Antonio to meet with, register, and commit to
staying in touch with more young voters. I was especially encouraged by
how many of our volunteers in San Antonio are students at UTSA, joining
our more seasoned team to learn the ropes and take the lead on their
campus.

Later that evening, I joined a candidate recruitment event on the West
Side of San Antonio, encouraging the folks who came out to fill empty
places up and down the ballot and, for those unable to run for office, to
join Powered by People as a volunteer. I told them if ever there was a
time that our country needed us, it is now. If ever there was a people who
could save it, it is us. 21 of those in attendance signed up to run for
office, and over 60 filled out the form to become a Powered by People
volunteer.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251117.NLXXqC&refcode=ema20251117-240468&t=1003&akid=240468%2E444211%2E9L446o ]Students signing up to join.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251117.NLXXqC&refcode=ema20251117-240468&t=1004&akid=240468%2E444211%2E9L446o ]Beto speaking at a candidate recruitment event.

And then on Saturday, I spoke at the Texas Tribune Festival about what’s
at stake, what we’re fighting for, and what we can accomplish when we
organize in person and meet people where they’re at. Afterwards, people
once again came up to ask how they could volunteer for Powered by People.
We signed up more volunteers for our Austin team, which means we’ll be
registering and staying in touch with more voters there, which means we’ll
be helping to send more new votes to key races across the ballot—including
Senate, Governor, and Attorney General.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251117.NLXXqC&refcode=ema20251117-240468&t=1005&akid=240468%2E444211%2E9L446o ]Beto speaking at the Texas Tribune Festival.

In all three cities, I experienced the power of action. It is the antidote
to despair. It is the key to victory. It is hope in motion. And it’s not
just me—these kinds of organizing events take place every day in Texas,
all across the state. Amazing, everyday people stepping up at this moment
of truth.

This is how we win the 2026 midterms. By doing the hard work now in 2025.

Help me and the thousands of other Powered by People volunteers continue
this work, today and every day until we win the political power necessary
to save Texas and save the country.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251117.NLXXqC&refcode=ema20251117-240468&t=1006&akid=240468%2E444211%2E9L446o ]Can you chip in today to Powered by People to help us keep this going?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251117.NLXXqC&refcode=ema20251117-240468&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=240468%2E444211%2E9L446o ]DONATE $3

Thank you,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=240468%2E444211%2E9L446o

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Suzanne Beecher
subject: Will you stand up for women’s sports today?
body:
As a defender of truth, you know that women shouldn’t have to share locker rooms with men.

| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/_25z1k_sxIZX9_0pPy885j9OrlFjrI8UwcGZFwSaZFd5_7Az6ANdtuUtaBo6M0LuDa5-czndPYESnc0xL6ry5cFgQmg-3R_goxCQ6d7m_sZsv2-5d1bIa9pB3VRW8pEMdTeKlk2QVQi0dYVE_UMOUGbzK9_pBcfvfZTq01mgdgIbefcd6xXL5mM2/iJyKFFsWO0bgWPfjFB0elYyVkgxpzBXW/14)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/SdeJI7srOYgDzF9jkSBv2pAqjtPRi5-3UhENzae4VzxfpWwIPfNGLbh2rJOscynyGUA--xTcy_xNcScwpE6UULpo8tUsB09dEhbSFUkpHPbeERsMTmhYB2ApZAkKwWwjS36Z0r9ayEB_YyNeqxtzTohmxo8juuPMYxqg5njSGQrcVq5BvmkYnrVhnzTm-sf_OMTrh9YwCOmeGuG68j81sPYHUVs5zXuK11pzobsFHXTBSLSMlmkGSY6Xp_V4-fvNYQcSQM5lfxB4BNCgml6C46_-h0Lcg0-cLr1rxM99l6q3iOM-ml5TvNbsMqbLcW9-AAm_nWaVwDRfuEglmtohnksJjtYTm7h83FkDYQLmuOGeVPVJqQevIgA1RCONG8BShe6e2rX45dlyyJolTyYYfJhaIexg9-UsgqSdfopr9LW1ojH7w8cawJlNWHcsM1p04MLIbx66QpPTt5yLTSembjoiXMC6lnVXKl6s2zIh6VOr7uzzaEJrJD3DSdz6qk4Mibb06A83xK4jUnWlPa7HGkWDzHkYNmdNEiYq_Ng_KqJDy4mwgI-lL1Mda1EUum9tDmQTALqhvduvrY6mDDGYZ-WvEw-jeV9RJ4-t9kNFjtGQlFe3CHM_LoBZiZunfRLbBsYwn7qIwGAw-yUBKALztlurm3FiuNT9greDm7lPIkIsrunniV-4rKA1qtOrFuNmzmPjhImUiIBoa6PrRhG69aZHj-ep7PKKA6k4RfnsnPcAHET4XKtrZQ-jfiGwab4N4Yf0/-RvI2ZYuGHJgRPX5foxTXNY70sIoRUs1/14)
**** Dear Fellow American, As a defender of truth, you know that women shouldn't have to share locker rooms with men.

They shouldn't have to compete against male athletes. And they shouldn't be punished for speaking the truth.

But across America, that's exactly what's happening.

Men are being allowed to compete in women's sports--robbing girls of scholarships, medals, titles, and safety.

Now, for the first time in history, the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear two cases--_State of West Virginia v. B.P.J._ and _Little v. Hecox_ --that could decide the future of women's sports nationwide.

This could be a watershed moment in the fight to protect biological reality and fairness.

If you believe women's sports should be reserved for women, we need your voice today.
[ Sign the Declaration on Women’s Sports](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/nN7i_rbfzpRKD1U01l20M3NiRXLGaWzDiYuAaEMFoNI9aS_b5RMHoaQuSXucIGsc-tMSIh_825senPj86ZD_-7br8vD-EsKSN-g5Mtb1WBr9_rJ0bEeXqQRwWGAT6BAWVVZ8wLfOs8Hbi7vr_PFcc-M4dNjTFvTxmORSQaaHU39yscBr6_xKEwAKJLFkwW5Bab-usLELgxkQH5Kz02bRCjlESglu3hET_m4QxW3RRdXFjG_uKc9GXqiLjPmDggANQvrOaJQn4ZhwS7s8ECC_bXMBY3JS-K4exlEQ_Ea2I4SXGNq_r_UYhSFjmuUzWHmn1dPYrwfw1eqF7TnvjGaiVpGk0p2-SvcQ7w-MZv0JeKIHdnPoPM7X7xG-IGwLwP8rRUTH_USxfH6dW2Z4GS970U5tbojfju8ANDkj_DdrNzuip7zyP-glquutRiCym2ft2tqWYiUsnI3tFYX-VRI-PjQjn3wDO7xeTQeIM7n_8smnhg50z3m6wBBPDMfj3QI6wv4xLsNwJbdc4qJq6AHs-9W_JL9g_386LASH4MBdsvhTldfMYGh6xSqP_pzswOGpcw_7OXia4SpmGiic7xZSUoMfiexRHt3E4DYVNoFu_6QE-YFcC-uNhi_W6gi9VzNt41BGTXT87ATuMIPDPoU5lDvKDh7L7EABY5ZEVIoPdXuE13jxFAJd2b5RgQZto8Z0CP73YtFLbSxPwemmZf7XmhT6NZJP4d8tmCu1Cotg19HsWMlzNvSLNKTbKpfqsRoykypR/fZqi2hPg6oP0LnboEi2lw-UQ86bCwXBp/14)
Your signature will say clearly:

✅ Men should not be allowed to compete on women's teams
✅ Women deserve privacy, fairness, and safety
✅ Radical gender ideology ignores biological truth This is more than athletics. It's about truth, justice, and standing up to gender ideology's dangerous, reality-denying agenda.

When our culture accepts the lie that men can be women and women and be men, the downstream effects victimize women and children most of all.

Doctors end up criminally charged for blowing the whistle on the medical industry for preying on children. Young girls end up sharing locker rooms and bathrooms with boys. Female athletes lose out on opportunities to males. Parents get pushed aside by government officials, who make life-altering decisions for kids on their behalf.

Men haven't stopped competing in women's sports just because it's 2025. You only have to scroll X or watch the news to see new examples of men invading women's sports and spaces.

The thing is, courageous female athletes like Madison Kenyon and Mary Kate Marshall have been sounding the alarm on this issue for years--standing up when it wasn't popular to do so.

Madison and Mary Kate are former college athletes who ran track and cross country at Idaho State University.

Both found running to be their happy place. Both invested years of training into becoming college athletes. But both had to face a male athlete in college.

Madison and Mary Kate, represented by ADF, intervened in _Little v. Hecox_ to defend Idaho's women's sports law. They don't want other girls to lose the opportunities they did.

But, soon, they're getting their day before our nation's highest court.

Please stand with Madison and Mary Kate and add your name now to the Declaration on Women's Sports.
[ Add Your Name](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/P32dOIXBOuwXUrWjU4jUO4c9y6tBQ_ySif1CBRPV3R0zEgZfhP7dZcv9Mrws-p-wTJrNK_VuWGNg-w-6A3qRwZeU-BUZtjppRQcX1lP2nOUXfNr0UNtFmYx4LUi5Ey8SOkwPUVWVM_w_AGpZbDFDrLBb5N4qqWYTlgeXiwBOn6VaDhK93PkHgpBWozhyVbTlbELwd0OxYiRvkzZy4usHebq0jhmElowEFKeSamvMs4GLdRp0U1Wqi4v7jIeQ3WBGrd_fCrYAUpb2lFA7Q02h1K2BepGzCjc_UpFneDO2lQ_N1U9-LfYWASzNE_FrohBhZBLRT7mcMseT_eUEGTBoLmG5ZkmpDnlBf32lFb6_8tsCrlozWBvST8zvB9nP5fUMmRHmri35vsuaYnW8lkqpovzLP3sD6PQVgJFErGmyGdbCIzT6nHWSCvVqX9XjcJbC2XI6PBjeLEEyAicEHBzki3iHhCJ_ckbK3tLSKRL01-PFGUl7233J_qNDpoyeyraeZP5Deg0AHkL_m7AZllUCqK9UuDbXMaRwVnuafnKrmxXpgNMeLIFJzqEe-dpQwVff5HL5oWyGOJp4leB8VYmGCJRa_XStQSSLMU52hgdmBqf0sdVh-eqOtG0Kr62KbWqVW44EoFxBUuYNNZYmknech5k8bI8wmqwmb-fTbmu6o8cIFmVbeh-Bta07rVGPEdzfBpKcwyoaNChRIGgYFHUlZoCJz9CCKpMBFBBSRthkU0AKhDKZguu5FVAqdHL5cD6oIspG/zUdnLv97WutYQwRaH4O051WXHKXK7V44/14)
Together, we can ensure every girl has a fair opportunity to play--and win--on a level playing field.

Thank you for standing for truth. With gratitude, **Suzanne Beecher**
Legal Counsel
Alliance Defending Freedom [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/6FPtwmeevM5gOYdZsmzZThtOtwDAA_rxBXLw2r3CHiLh3p_TpnOesbCPGdKi6cVdnExP4r5cr7Wp5wj8woTLZN1kXTocfzj-twDq8G4kIealqNAls24RhX8oDeZr0dHxV3LmfWl1gdw3RJEdZ-GoIMXVqEYETGewS4KlaGPw8-GufuFO81nzTs4_C5DldmPYaGUtjYJzK9HDxAe4HqMmC-PfNEcsE2hAYrXQlmKnsy33ZuN8uGkkZ2tGX47BUcJRNqBQ2d7L4Ck1EqyAo9d4CoknIwNtlLRQ_LWQ4NPGsubWuWDXVzvLNdPsEK9quMZupoi7ONbwGCeTUHjoPcvEehl4fhBG7qphZd7vFNdwDOA4PciqgckiorwWA97f5mbLmYEt7CAyO2QV6gidMfSg_GkE_c2QswA9dxbZ9xIKC8GsSKAywWOxkX7PcEzo5-o9K3hLM-807jGMJ0vWKPyTcC-GbJNIMiWfqpc5VikJI3GVOMXne2G2bC_W2QKltbkExU28piG_aopFNwEu1xaoEb-Yyevy1A56Qu-3qjvUByxjg3SF-z7RpV16UeCuF0XZjWjvExiEcoBYhbXGBMOkBnxmF7ACAeGDjJWgia4_ot-LFISGpJn-Zla2ba9xAJ7q060DXzagsKotoT5ZgYX1FeYqIQrs5i6TRPru5QewSM92JBS6Os-zHBLk9uBfL_gEwh900v2aXJ04UTaDUvFWLa1_8XWcNjt74iYthDH-fRODiSTZPgGoXsQ8LfQoyx252ySs/PD6imEp3sZMA1uaU3UcFkbzOSNqtKLjI/14)

Fellow Patriot,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**

Fellow Patriot, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=68c78ba8b3a7432995514f6bf7cbdd26&_e=xep245FRMdzTYU0jCb_ZFsA_b6OAZYRKij1WIUbmq7EosEwuBADKyvGitpBP4EDmiQ7rgSw2Vo9Pn6b2TpPhM5fnlb5d-EZJ3ljk-CLZetnkr7JCrcbLfQdfkVuKhwSGbuD4lTJVtk4zDo438sYO3sEjJrDkuT71sw-Ft223eQ7NryTCICsEI1gUS7TuwKLdTyl9e8j67MjlhJ_s0tFxKmuBRmWzSkUMrfY_37UC0GqaU6A52ErIcZe1AVqLdr9bskKr6U6ikmaYf7TC0OMSkYkCcKW-zT-Hmws9qCfEVImV-OktAW2KNunpfgV8L2A9NLS9K4_qEkybuTB39EV72zgwfRMMmvcATxxx2q-Oc6aFe1emwW8OSlQt2vDrGHuVGNXF75WeHIyUF0eoUKchxl8P4ypZwSl5m98ZANQXUkE1M98QaPzr8f7z0DY-FSkhESSfrePKOcakydcLMmpJ5h2GpLJlgLg9x9bpgP_UHvxV0c-osCUQFpzJoojurXj91NNSbgsNhNoDmW3ICo5J7SEwaRfVtT_mp9uR_ISVt1b_tIx71B2lb7aKSovrTqzYbAlukEY_rHB8S86RmzeP90HcWGr1WMbBWGTArXabpZzF0KFYcW4pTQQnMIc_Bk2EOyXNoYofztCm6Hfrg9Q5qNDKstvnJMPMoCU48qi0x-Irq7nGVHLwWoZKmV3bJCema2bEyQ1_r-xuOeiS7XiM9SJ0cJ1yfIH9EqFAmcxtx_E%3D)

Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Fellow Patriot. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. clean_body: He didn’t just write it — he lived it| | | Fellow Patriot,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. He built a movement that's changed history. And long before he left us... he wrote How We Win -- the playbook that lays it all out. Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward. Fellow Patriot, this isn't just a book... It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to: 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states 🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists 🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. He showed us HOW WE WIN. Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you. How We Win is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up." Let that be you, Fellow Patriot. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. Faith. Freedom. For Charlie, The Turning Point USA Team 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

But Trump doesn’t want transparency. And he certainly doesn’t want accountability. If he did, he wouldn’t have fought the release tooth and nail.
**I’m not sure what game he’s playing now, but I’m not going anywhere. Neither are my demands for transparency and accountability.**
One way or the other, we are going to get the Epstein files — _and we are going to release them to the public._
I’m using every microphone I have, every committee hearing, every interview, every platform available to me because this is too important to let slip away. The American people deserve the truth. Full stop.

body:

Folks - it's John Kennedy.[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3063fce0d8154f7186500488e9863a37&_e=UA2I-Z6li0_L1CXgAhjLEHIgqUCKN2JuJxr5vsvjU74p6bJMdQ8NcAoN7Cg5mEP1RCMof65CoxFPZV_VdcdcpM0DkM95K_xV-YEbZrBZeyQ6n3kmQgH0NAEJ6Nu-Xz9-5LgRsu3rSyJoGwlt_vk4adBpBwqw1Wb2ejwfWg5vHPEftwL6Tfp9DnbXvZ_xmEE74sJF3LOSuspKhq7g6vNsBYKjoJ6dwxOVqq1yBoWV4oM31aCBiPmD0lineIey1DZpvqkbYtCjDmHVNbcaQv9MaVAKh_kSqa8LTGPO6-PbcbP3u1x1JMrfqTJhAFdWChLUmBezLg7-FgTRAaWxTvHoAkdAw6-Xd8KpHVakiH3SSCG9oKMWS819_seTPiNLlapLlHONGHqT2Ycl9_9TrMVrUh26kdw1UTzqA8K3Nci6Tc_rNIo461vsUV4P2U__gNG9xlLwLiqTw5nud3243kftur0XRT_8ccAfBOEj5BnyHxlFlK1W1tncFcBDY8XZ7v-CgM_Q1PF1HPXkhyvYhP7u7iXFJGhcjcZdBQgz-WV9fpdcz4E_Oz9f2Uhqhz1NxmxtiINTfNOWvAdvGUORdKoHaGWx94dGKGcN0xXWyS24hw01_YoSplnSD4_hmUyItLG-oWO8RwOWmDCN-TTfn8SljNoiyEBno2HZiesS709dEaOvLORW8Ijgx-XWT4iaYMc4ZkJddOa4k-faqEYYWaRU0zLVMP6mtiOu5E3ROmh7VZfCeMRWUGHX_T5ocfW3i9V6lttemSq1KLVSrQcCEIhCzE71ZRe2UH_h5u5kukMlTfxt1-V2EBc2VX7SF3-pndszIACmd1NMyqZ7YhEeqFeJdg%3D%3D)I'm told my reputation precedes me.
I hope that's a good thing.
I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart.
So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now.
My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before.
That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives!
_And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal.__
_It 'll be a real disaster if they miss it.

My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before. That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives! And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal. It 'll be a real disaster if they miss it. name: Rick Larsen
subject: Working with veterans in Northwest Washington:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
From my first days in Congress, I have made working with veterans in Northwest Washington a top priority.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119476797/583189885/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mjc0N2IwOS0wZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9MaFPuQqLcJDIbXRU0xBscK2BnGFz-f6EUffIca5NYU=&emci=4ccb2ffd-05c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=62747b09-0ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **From my first days in Congress, I have made working with veterans in Northwest Washington a top priority.** Last weekend, I wrote a piece for the South Whidbey Record to talk about veterans and the recent report I released. [**You can read the whole piece here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119476798/583189886/908500904?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mjc0N2IwOS0wZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9MaFPuQqLcJDIbXRU0xBscK2BnGFz-f6EUffIca5NYU=&emci=4ccb2ffd-05c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=62747b09-0ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9494239) **[Read More](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119476799/583189887/908500904?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mjc0N2IwOS0wZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9MaFPuQqLcJDIbXRU0xBscK2BnGFz-f6EUffIca5NYU=&emci=4ccb2ffd-05c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=62747b09-0ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9494239)** My report, "Listening to Veterans in Northwest Washington," is based on the four pillars that guide my work for veterans in Congress: health care, housing, education, and employment. In order for veterans to have access to timely, quality health care, stable and affordable housing, educational opportunities, and employment that provides for a smooth transition to civilian life, Veterans Affairs (VA) must have proper staffing to process claims and deliver care. Unfortunately, since January, VA has lost about 30,000 employees because of the Trump administration's mass firings, early retirements, and limited recruitment. VA should be focused on shortening wait times and reducing backlogs, and to do that, VA needs more staff, not fewer. **I remain committed to holding VA and the Trump administration accountable for meeting the needs of veterans in Northwest Washington.** More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: From my first days in Congress, I have made working with veterans in Northwest Washington a top priority. | | | | From my first days in Congress, I have made working with veterans in Northwest Washington a top priority. Last weekend, I wrote a piece for the South Whidbey Record to talk about veterans and the recent report I released. My report, "Listening to Veterans in Northwest Washington," is based on the four pillars that guide my work for veterans in Congress: health care, housing, education, and employment. In order for veterans to have access to timely, quality health care, stable and affordable housing, educational opportunities, and employment that provides for a smooth transition to civilian life, Veterans Affairs (VA) must have proper staffing to process claims and deliver care. Unfortunately, since January, VA has lost about 30,000 employees because of the Trump administration's mass firings, early retirements, and limited recruitment. VA should be focused on shortening wait times and reducing backlogs, and to do that, VA needs more staff, not fewer. I remain committed to holding VA and the Trump administration accountable for meeting the needs of veterans in Northwest Washington. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by .
