name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: No more cover-ups. Release the Epstein files now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re closer than ever to the truth. Add your name now.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251117-5635-footer&t=1&akid=5635%2E420207%2EN83uuH)
Peter,
More waves of the Epstein Files are coming out — and **Donald Trump’s name keeps showing up.**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/sign/tell-congressional-republicans-release-epstein-files-now/?source=em20251117-5635&t=2&akid=5635%2E420207%2EN83uuH)
**Coincidence? I don’t think so.**
Let’s be clear: Republicans spent all of 2024 demanding “transparency.” But the moment they had the chance to release the full Epstein files, they reversed course and started blocking it at every turn.
We can’t let them bury the truth again. Not when we’re _this_ close to accountability.
[**That’s why I’m asking you to sign my petition demanding Republicans release the full Epstein files and stop the cover-up.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/sign/tell-congressional-republicans-release-epstein-files-now/?source=em20251117-5635&t=3&akid=5635%2E420207%2EN83uuH)
**[Sign The Petition](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/sign/tell-congressional-republicans-release-epstein-files-now/?source=em20251117-5635&t=4&akid=5635%2E420207%2EN83uuH)**
Why are they doing this? Because they found out that **Trump’s name is all over the files.**
Newly released emails allege that Trump spent hours with one of Epstein’s victims and that he _knew_ about the abuse of underage girls.
Now the GOP is calling the investigation a “hoax” and accusing Democrats of playing politics, even though nearly 80% of Americans — including two-thirds of Republicans — support a full release of the files with victims' names protected.
And they’re willing to go to disturbing lengths to protect Trump. When the House was just _one_ signature away from forcing a vote to release the files, Speaker Johnson delayed the swearing-in of Rep. Adelita Grijalva for 50 days, blocking the 218th signature and denying representation for more than 800,000 Arizonans.
But here’s the good news: Adelita is _finally_ sworn in. The discharge petition is complete. **And a vote to release the full Epstein files is coming up soon.**
And Trump? He’s in full-blown panic mode. He’s personally calling the few House Republicans who signed the petition. He even dragged one member into a Situation Room meeting with the Attorney General and FBI Director to try and intimidate them into backing down.
**It begs the question: if Trump is fighting this hard to stop the truth from coming out, what else is he hiding?**
The public has a right to know who enabled Jeffrey Epstein’s horrific abuse — especially if it included the sitting President. And we need to call out every Republican in Congress who’s choosing to protect Trump instead of survivors.
Survivors deserve justice. The public deserves the truth. And our democracy demands accountability — not another cover-up for the wealthy and well-connected.
If we don’t raise our voices now, Trump will bury the truth again. We can’t let that happen.
[**Please add your name to our petition and tell Congressional Republicans to vote to release the full files.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/sign/tell-congressional-republicans-release-epstein-files-now/?source=em20251117-5635&t=5&akid=5635%2E420207%2EN83uuH)
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251117-5635-footer&t=6&refcode2=5635_420207_N83uuH&akid=5635%2E420207%2EN83uuH)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Out of thousands of dedicated patriots, our team has personally handpicked you to be a founding member of the President's Senate Legacy Defense Team. We are launching this presidential initiative because our hard-won Senate majority is already under attack. Our enemies are not waiting—they are mobilizing now to dismantle everything we fought for. If we lose this majority, our President's entire agenda is in grave danger. This is your chance to get in on the ground floor and be a part of this vital mission. Your place on the Defense Team is being held for the next After that, the spot will go to someone else. | | – Founding Membership Alerts (via Team Whatley) Paid for by Whatley for Senate |

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Their latest target: Charlotte, NC
body:
This doesn’t make us safer. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119476916/583190350/1573338254?refcode=ea.701ed174-0ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.701ed174-0ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDFlZDE3NC0wZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ltgjdfAAz0EoMaqWTrWzFpnUeO7aox7lf0LAqcn9V4=) Peter — Over the weekend, federal agents descended on Charlotte, NC, conducting raids designed to scare North Carolinians into submission. They swept people up randomly — including American citizens and those with no criminal records — targeting them for arrest just because of what they look like. This doesn’t make us safer, Peter. Let me be clear: I’ve prosecuted violent criminals and fought to keep them behind bars, so I know the importance of using federal resources that focus on keeping those bad actors off our streets, deporting violent criminals, and keeping our borders strong. That’s not what this weekend’s actions in North Carolina were about. These actions risk leaving violent criminals at large while hurting families and the economy. **To truly protect communities, federal leaders should concentrate their efforts on deporting those violent criminals, not scaring folks who are just going about their days.** Peter, as the next Democratic U.S. Senator from North Carolina, I will work with anyone who wants to help keep our country truly safe. And I’ll stand up to attempts to intimidate our people for blatantly political purposes. **[I’m asking for your support now to help me get to Washington and get this country back on track.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119476917/583190351/1573338254?refcode=ea.701ed174-0ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.701ed174-0ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDFlZDE3NC0wZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ltgjdfAAz0EoMaqWTrWzFpnUeO7aox7lf0LAqcn9V4=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119476918/583190352/1573338254?refcode=ea.701ed174-0ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.701ed174-0ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDFlZDE3NC0wZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ltgjdfAAz0EoMaqWTrWzFpnUeO7aox7lf0LAqcn9V4=)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Oregonians deserve better than a “pinky promise”
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119476933/583190398/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTU2NTJiYy0wZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEXF58PEG4nDp-DnUp2JDkPXkJKjSgy4eg7g1AZmpPU=&emci=65f8f6a3-fec3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7e5652bc-0ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Last week, the Senate voted to reopen the federal government _without _a firm roadmap for addressing the skyrocketing health care costs Oregonians and millions of Americans are facing. I made a promise from the start: **I couldn't support any legislation that failed to keep health care premiums affordable.** Donald Trump and his closest Republican allies in Congress have made it clear they have absolutely no interest in extending the subsidies that would prevent those premium hikes — and yet, the Senate has passed this bill on the mere "promise" that we'll get a vote to extend the subsidies in a few weeks. Just a vote. No guarantee that Senate Republicans will provide the support needed for passage. And _certainly_ no guarantee that House Republicans would take it up after. **It isn't even a pinky promise — and Oregonians deserve so much more than a pinky promise.** This is far from the situation I hoped we'd be in near the end of the year. I repeatedly called on Republicans to address the looming health care crisis. And now, we've got one more chance in December. Millions of families are facing skyrocketing costs. One couple from Eugene will see their premiums go from roughly $400 a month to $2200 a month because of failed Republican leadership. That's simply unaffordable. So I'm going to keep fighting. I'm going to keep amplifying the stories of everyone who depends upon Affordable Care Act subsidies to stay on their health insurance plans. **It's a life-or-death issue for them, and Senate and House Republicans must be reminded of it every day while we still have time to act.** On behalf of everyone in Oregon and across the country, fearful of soaring health care costs, I will not let your voices go unheard. More soon,
_Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

clean_body: | | | | Last week, the Senate voted to reopen the federal government without a firm roadmap for addressing the skyrocketing health care costs Oregonians and millions of Americans are facing. I made a promise from the start: I couldn't support any legislation that failed to keep health care premiums affordable. Donald Trump and his closest Republican allies in Congress have made it clear they have absolutely no interest in extending the subsidies that would prevent those premium hikes — and yet, the Senate has passed this bill on the mere "promise" that we'll get a vote to extend the subsidies in a few weeks. Just a vote. No guarantee that Senate Republicans will provide the support needed for passage. And certainly no guarantee that House Republicans would take it up after. It isn't even a pinky promise — and Oregonians deserve so much more than a pinky promise. This is far from the situation I hoped we'd be in near the end of the year. I repeatedly called on Republicans to address the looming health care crisis. And now, we've got one more chance in December. Millions of families are facing skyrocketing costs. One couple from Eugene will see their premiums go from roughly $400 a month to $2200 a month because of failed Republican leadership. That's simply unaffordable. So I'm going to keep fighting. I'm going to keep amplifying the stories of everyone who depends upon Affordable Care Act subsidies to stay on their health insurance plans. It's a life-or-death issue for them, and Senate and House Republicans must be reminded of it every day while we still have time to act. On behalf of everyone in Oregon and across the country, fearful of soaring health care costs, I will not let your voices go unheard. More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. clean_body: But I promise you this email is different. | Fellow American, You're probably getting lots of fundraising emails. Believe it or not, I get them too! In fact, Senate Republicans recently OUTRAISED Senate Democrats, so I'm not going to give you a sky-is-falling fundraising pitch. Senate Majority Leader, I'm focused on the ONE and ONLY thing that wins elections: So, my priority right now is fixing the fact that our party's voter file isLAGGING behind the Democrats'. Look, we can be winning in the polls (we are), we can be winning by passing President Trump's agenda in the Senate and HOLDING THE LINE against Schumer's Shutdown (we are), and we can be winning in popularity over the Democrats (we absolutely are)... ...But unless we have a 100% verified voter file, we'll lose everything to the Democrats, We need to MATCH that energy and determination. We can't let Democrats take back the reins of the Senate for the second half of the Trump-Vance presidency. Thank you, Senator John Thune If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. But the deep state is alive and well...

And they just scored a HUGE win for Jeffrey Epstein’s clients.

After years of hype, the DOJ has officially dropped the Epstein investigation...

And let countless unnamed conspirators off the hook.

But now the deep state has an even [**bigger target**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e27506291/VaHR0cHM6Ly9wcm8ubmhzLW5ld3MuY29tL20vMjQ5NDI2Ng/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMTc/LbmNsOVJEU0thMQ/gaRu1fg/s5m7c0d10d8).

RFK Jr and the Trump administration are now perfectly positioned to expose everything...

P.S. The [**deep state secret**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e27506291/VaHR0cHM6Ly9wcm8ubmhzLW5ld3MuY29tL20vMjQ5NDI2Ng/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMTc/LbmNsOVJEU0thMQ/gaRu1fg/s5m7c0d10d8) revealed in this video is explosive and may bring down a lot of very powerful people. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Why this race is so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Voters want to elect Democrats who will fight — and fight HARD — for working people.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2710%2E4032634%2E593jXc)
---
If you care about electing leaders who are fearless in the fight for working families and unafraid to take on the billionaire class, then Peggy Flanagan’s run for Senate in Minnesota is your fight. Voters sent a powerful message in this year’s elections: They want to elect Democrats who will fight — and fight HARD — for working people. No longer can we nibble around the edges and hope we can settle for safe, incremental change. We’ve got to stiffen our spines. **Because we’re not going to get out of Trump’s economic mess by just returning to the status quo. We need leaders in the Senate who champion bold, progressive policies. That’s why I’m proud to have endorsed Peggy earlier this year — she is exactly the kind of fighter we need more of in the Senate right now.** This race isn’t going to be a walk in the park. Peggy’s running a grassroots campaign and not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. That means she needs this team — our grassroots supporters — to contribute the resources she needs to compete and win. [**Will you split a donation of $28**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3236?amount=28&t=8&akid=2710%2E4032634%2E593jXc)[**or whatever you can give between Peggy’s campaign and our movement? Your donation will power Peggy’s fight in one of the most pivotal elections in our work to make life more affordable for working families.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3236?amount=28&t=9&akid=2710%2E4032634%2E593jXc)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3236?t=25&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2710%2E4032634%2E593jXc)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3236?t=27&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2710%2E4032634%2E593jXc)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3236?t=29&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2710%2E4032634%2E593jXc)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3236?t=31&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2710%2E4032634%2E593jXc)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3236?t=21&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2710%2E4032634%2E593jXc)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3236?t=23&express_lane=true&akid=2710%2E4032634%2E593jXc)
---

---
Peggy is no stranger to the affordability crisis Americans are facing right now. She’s the daughter of a single mom who understands what it’s like to worry that the bottom could fall out at any moment. Growing up, Peggy’s family was able to get by because of hard work and public programs like Section 8 housing, SNAP, and childcare assistance. That lived experience drove her fight to raise the minimum wage and make paid family leave a reality for Minnesota families. And it’s what’s driving her to run for Senate to fight for these kinds of policies at the national level. Corporate special interests will spend big to try to stop Peggy. The only way we win is with grassroots supporters like you. [**Can you split a donation of $28**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3236?amount=28&t=16&akid=2710%2E4032634%2E593jXc)[**— or whatever you can — to help send Peggy Flanagan to represent working families in the Senate and strengthen our fight for big, structural change?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3236?amount=28&t=17&akid=2710%2E4032634%2E593jXc) Thanks for being part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3236?t=13&akid=2710%2E4032634%2E593jXc)
